pericopes.title: Thigamna dinga Uilut nat hung lang
Chapang peng masa ho thiding kisei masah.
Gamna hise lang nukhah pen: Naosen peng masa jouse thigam
Pumhat a thilbol jeh a Danthu kisemho
Thil neiho anei chungchanga atoh diu thudol a dan kisemho
Thil kilepeh thudol a Danthu kisemho
Hinkhoa chondan le houthua chondan kisemho
Molsang chunga kona Mose hung kumsuh
Cholngah ni manchahna Dan kisem ho (Ex. 25:1-9)
Israel mipin thilto thalhingset a ahinchoiyu

chapters.text: Israel chate ama ama insung mi hin kipuiya Jacob toh hung kilhona Egypt gama hung lut ho chu aminu hicheng hi ahiye:
Reuben, Simeon, Levi chule Judah ahiuvin,
Issachar, Zebulun chule Benjamin ahiuvin,
Dan le Naphtali ahilhonin, Gad le Asher ahilhone.
Jacob chilhah chengse chu mihing som sagi alhinguvin, Joseph vang chu Egypt gama anaumsa ahitai.
Chujouvin Joseph le agoIpi chengse, chule chuche khanga mite chu athisoh tauve.
Amavang Israel chilhah mite chu acha anao atha lhinguvin, nasa tah-in apung tauve; apunbe cheh jenguvin, ha hat’in ahung hatdohuvin ahileh agamsung jeng jong chu amaho adimhel jeng tauve.
Hiche lai chun Joseph hepha louhel leng thah khat Egypt gamsunga ahung lendoh tai.
Ama chun amite, jah a aseiyin, “Vetan, eiho dingin Israel chate hi atam behseh jenguvin ahatval tauve.

Hunguvin, amaho hi ching thei tah-in sutup masaute, achutiloule punbe cheh cheh jenguvin tin, ijem tin galin eihin del khum jeng tauleh amaho hin imelmateu ajop uva eiho eisat jeng diu chutengle gamsunga kona jamdoh ding ahiuve,” ati.

Hijeh chun amahon pohgih hahsa sa pohsah a bolgenthei dingin Israel chate chunga tohvaipo tamtah akoipeh tauve; Israel chaten jong hiti chun Pharaoh dingin thil kholna khopi ni Pithom le Raamses chu asauvin ahi.
Ahinla mihon abolgenthei cheh-uva ahileh amaho a pun be cheh jiuvin, chujongle akiha thejal cheh jiuvin ahi. Hijeh chun Egypt mite chu Israel chate kichan aum gamtauve.
Chutah chun amahon Israel chate chu gim genthei thoh-in na atohsah-uvin,
bon ngan achilsah-un, cheh adensah-uvin, loujaova natoh tintang atohsah-uvin, na hahsa atohsah-un hin gentheiyin ahinsah tauvin ahi; anatohna chanuva gim genthei thoh-in na atohsahuve.
Hiche lai chun Egypt lengpan Hebrew mi naodom teni, khatnu amin Shiphrah kitinu le achom khatnu Puah kitinu jah a chun aseiyin,
“Nangni Hebrew numeiho naodoma napan teng lhonle, naosoh ho chu ve lhonin lang, pasal ahileh natha thu thu lhona, numei ahivang leh nahinghoi lhon ding ahi,” ati.
Ahinla naodom teni chun Pathen aging lhonin, Egypt lengpan athupeh lhon banga boljo louvin, naosen pengthah pasal ho chu ahinghoi lhon tai.
Hijeh chun Egypt lengpan naodom teni chu akouvin ajah lhona, “Ipi dinga hita hi nabol lhona; naosen pengthah pasal ho chu nahinghoi lhon ham?” atileh;

naodom tenin jong Pharaoh jah a chun, “Ajeh pentah chu Hebrew numeiho hi Egypt numeiho tobang ahipouve; ijehinem itileh amaho hi athoh a thoh hat ahiuvin, naodom nu ahenguva ahung lhun masangin anakidop lhah jitauve,” ati lhone.
Hiti chun Pathenin naodom teni chu aphalam tah-in anamangin, Israel mite apunbe be jenguvin, ahat cheh ahat cheh jeng tauve.
Chujongle naodom te nin Pathen agin lhon jeh chun Pathenin jong amani ainchendoh sah lhonin ahi.
Chutah chun Pharaoh vin ama mite abonchauvin thu apen aseiye, “Hebrew mite hinsa achapa jouseu chu abonchan luipi dunga sep lut’uvin lang, achanu jouseu vang chu hinghoi peh-tivin,” ati.
Hiche lai chun Levi insunga mi pasal khat achen Levi insung mi chanu khatma aji dingin aga kipuitai.
Ajinu chun nao ahinvop paiyin chapa khat ahingtai; amanun achapa chu aven ahileh naosen mel hoitah ahin, hijeh chun lha thum sungin achapa chu asel gunset’in ahi.

Chuin asel joulou hel phat’in amanun jong sithei nanga kisa sinkhup khat achapa khumna ding chun alan, sinkhup chu avang lai lai sinao eh le song thaovom’in aloi bingin, chujouvin naosen chu asunga akhumin, vadung panga peng phung lah a twi chunga chun alhatai.
Naosen unu chu gamla thim khat’a hin naosen chu min i-alom, ti hechen dingin ading denta.

Hichun Pharaoh chanu vadunga kisil dingin ahung kumlhan, chule asoh numeiho jong chu vapang dunga avah le leuvin ahi; chuin Pharaoh chanun peng phung lah a sinkhup chu amudoh in, agatol phei dingin asohnu asoltai.
Pharaoh chanun sinkhup ahongdoh in ahileh naocha chu amun, vetan naosen chu ahung kap’e. Hichun amanun naocha chu avoujang natpin. “Hiche Hebrew mite chate khat hitei ding ahitai,” ati.
Hichepet chun naosen sopinun Pharaoh chanu jah a chun, “Hiche naosen hi nadonpeh dinga keima kachea Hebrew numeiho lah a naodon ding khat kaga koupeh ding ham?” atileh;
Pharaoh chanun jong amanu jah a, “Chen,” ati. Hijeh chun nungah nu chu achen naosen hingnu ma ma chu agakoupeh tai.

Chuin Pharaoh chanun agakoupeh nu jah a chun, “Hiche naosen hi kidop mangin lang kei din neiga donpeh tan, keiman nanaodon man nape nange,” ati. Hijeh chun anumei nu chun naosen chu akidop mangin agadontai.

Naosen chu ahung khandoh phat’in anaodon nun amapa cha chu Pharaoh chanu henga ahinpui lut peh in, hiti chun amapa chu Pharaoh chanu chapan a pang tan ahi; chule Pharaoh chanun jong amapa chu amin Mose asah tai; ajeh chu, “Keiman hichepa hi twi lah a kona kaloidoh ahiye,” tin aseitai.
Mose akikhan lhit phat’in nikhat chu apotdoh in asopite henga agachen chule apohgih chengseu chu agave len ahileh, hichea chun Egypt mikhat’in asopite Hebrew miho khat anaden pet amutai.
Hichun aman hilam khulam aveloiyin, koimacha amulou phat’in Egypt mipa chu athat in neldilah a avui mangtai.
Ani ni lhin nia agapotdoh kit’a ahileh, vetan, Hebrew mi ni anakisot toa akinah lhon amun, athemmopa jah a chun, “I pi dinga nangman nagolpa naden ham?” tia apho leh;

athemmopan jong, “Koiham nangma keiho chunga leng chapa napansah a chule thutan dinga natungdoh a chu? Egypt mipa natha banga chu keijong tha ding neigot hinte ong?” ati phat in, Mose jong akichatan, “Kathilbol hi min ahetdoh hitei tei ding ahitai,” tin angaitoi.
Chujongle athilbol chu Pharaoh vin ajahdoh tah bah phat’in Mose chu tha din aholtai. Ahivangin Pharaoh koma konin Mose ajam mangin, Midian gamsunga agathamin, twikul pang khat’a hin agatouvin ahi.
Hiche lai chun Midian thempupan chanu nungah sagi jen ananeiyin, amaho chu ahunguvin apau kelngoi hon chipsah dingin twi chu thingkongin ahung thaluve.
Hichepet chun kelngoi ching ho ahunguvin nungah ho chu ahung nodoh tauve; ahivangin Mose chu akipatdoh in amaho chu akithopin, chule akelngoi honu jong twi achipsah tai.
Nu ngah ho chu apau Reuel henga ahung phat’uvin amapan jong, “lti dan a tunia matah a nahung lhun jengu hiya ong?” tin anadonge.
Hichun amahon jong,“Egypt mi pasal khat’in kelngoi ching ho khut akonin eihuhdoh uvin, twi jeng jong eithal peh uvin, chule kelngoi honjong chu twi achipsah a ahileh kahung mahungu ahi” atiuve.
Chuphat’in amapan achanute jah a chun, “Hichepa chu hoiya ba umah hita ong? Ipi dinga hiche mipa nahin dalhah jengu ham? Gakouvun, an kineh sah hen” atitai.
Hiti chun Mose jong hiche mipa chutoh chenkhom ding alung lhaiyin, amapan jong achanu Zipporah chu Mose apetai.
Zipporah chun chapa khat ahingin ahileh Mose’n amin Gershom asah e; ijeh-inem itileh hiche min chu, “Keima gamchoma khopem kahi.” tina ahisah ahiye.
Nikho hijatpi sung chun Egypt lengpa jong athitai. Chule Israel chate chu akihen nauva konin apeng jen junuvin, panpi ding asam samjenguvin ahileh, akihen nauva apen ginu chu Pathen kom alhungtai.
Pathenin jong Israel chate pen gin ajan, Abraham, lsaac chule Jacob toh akitepna chu Pathenin ageldoh tai.
Pathenin Israel chate chu aven, hiti chun Pathenin aumchan jouseu ahedoh tai.
Hiche lai chun Mose’n anupa pa, Midian thempupa Jethro kelngoi hon anachingin, chule kelngoi hon chu nilhum lam gamthip sung lam jonin ahinpuiyin, Pathen molsang Horeb achun ahungtai.
Hikoma chun Pakai Vantil chu hamboh lah a meikongin ahung kongdoh tan, Mose henga ahung kilah tai; Mose’n jong aven ahileh, vetan, hamboh chu meiyin akong jeng nan, ahivangin akavam deh poi,
Mose’n jong, “Kiheiying ting hiche datmo umtah thil kamu hi gave tem inge, iti dan a hamboh khu kavam louhel thei ham” ati.
Ahin hiche vedia Mose akihei chu Pathenin amudoh phat’in, hamboh lah a kon chun Pathenin amapa ahinkouvin, “Mose, Mose!” ahitin ahileh, aman jong, “Hoiyo!” ati.
Chutah chun Pathenin, “Hin nailut hih beh in; nakeng phang tenia konin nakengchot teni kisut lhah inlang hin, ijeh-inem itileh hiche nadinna laitah mun jeng jong chu muntheng ahiye,” ati.

Chujongle Pathen chun aseiyin, “Keima hi napa dinga a-Pathen chu kahin, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen chule Jacob Pathen chu kahi,” ati. Hitah chun Mose’n Pathen chu ave ngam tapon, amai akisip jengin ahi.
Chuphat’in Pakai chun aseitai, “Keiman Egypt gama um kamite, kibol gentheina kichentah in kamutan, chule achunguva tohvaipo ten abolgenthei jeh uva akagin u kajatai athoh gimna jouseu jong kahetai;

hijeh a chu Egypt mite khut’a kona amaho huhdoh dingle Egypt gamsunga kona amaho hi puidoh a gampha tah le gam lentah, khoiju le bongnoi lonna gam, Canaan mite Hit mite, Amor mite, Periz mite, Hivi mite chule Jebus mite chenna gamsunga puilut dinga keima hung kumlha kahi.
Chule tun vetan, Israel chate kagin chu keima heng ahung lhungtan, chujongle Egypt miten abolgenthei nau agentheinau chu kamudoh tai.
Hijeh chun tun hungtemin, kamite Israel chate khu nahin puidoh theina dingin keiman Pharaoh henga nasol inge,” ati.
Ahivangin Mose’n Pathen henga kiphat lamtah in, “Keima hi koi kahiya, Pharaoh henga kachea chutengle Israel chate chu Egypt’a kona kahin puidoh jou ding ham?” atileh;

Pathenin jong, “Keiman kalhonpi jing ding nahinai; chule keima sol mong nahi chu, nang dinga amelchihna hiche hi hi ding ahiye: Nangman Israel mite chu Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh tengle hiche molsang chunga hi nanghon Pathen kin nabol diu ahiye” ati.

Chuphat’in Mose’n jong Pathen jah a aseitai, “Vetan, keima Israel chate koma gacheng ting, amaho jah a chun,‘Napu napateu Pathen chun nangho henga eihinsol ahiye,’ gati leng, amahon,‘Ama chu amin ipi ham?’ tin eina donguvin tin, keiman amaho chu ipipen kaseipeh ding hitam?” ati.

Hichun Pathenin Mose jah a, “Keima kahi ding chu kahi jing ding,” kiti hi kahi, atin; chujongle Pathen chun aseitai, “Israel chate jah a chun,‘Keima hi jing dingpan nangho henga eihinsol ahi, tin” ati.

Pathen chun Mose jah a hitin jong aseitai, “Israel chate jah a chun seipeh in,‘Pakai kitipa, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen, chule Jacob Pathen chun nangho henga eihonsol ahiye,’ tin; hiche hi keima min hi jing jeng ding, hita hi akhang khanga eikigeldoh jing jeng ding ahi.

Chen lang Israel upate galchomin lang chutengle ajah uva seipeh in, Pakai kitipa, napu napateu Pathen, Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob Pathen chu kahenga ahung kilah in aseiye, “Egypt gamsunga chu nachunguva ipi kibol hitam, ti keiman pha tah in kamelchih jing jenge;

hijeh a chu Egypt mite bolgentheina kona kapuidoh uva, Canaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Periz mite, Hivi mite chule Jebus mite gamsung, khoiju le bongnoi lonna gamsunga kapuilut ding nahiuve,’ tia kakitep ahi.” ati, tin.

Chutengle amahon nathusei ngaiyuvin tin, nangle Israel upate chutoh Egypt lengpa henga nacheuva,‘Pakai kitipa, Hebrew mite Pathen chun keiho ekimupiuvin, hijeh a chu tua keiho nahenga kataouvu ahiye, Pakai ka-Pathenu henga kilhaina kabol theina dinguvin, gamthip sung lama khun nithum kholjin phahna lampia neisol tauvin;’ nagati diu ahi.
Pathen banjang thahat sana achamlouva akithu nunsah tilouva, Egypt lengpan nangho nachedoh sah louhel diu ahi, ti keiman kahenai.
Hijeh a chu keiman kabanjang kahin lhandoh a Egypt gam chu kaden a chule agamsunga chu thil kidang datmo tampi kahinbol ding, chutah le aman nachedoh sah bep diu ahiye.
Chujongle Israel mite hi keiman Egypt mite mitmu mong monga kalungset ding ahin; hijeh a chu nachedoh tengu jongleh khutgoh keova napotdoh louhel diu ahi;

numeihon aheng akomle aina hung kholjin miho henga kijepna dangka le sana, ponsil akithum diu, hichengpia chu nachateu apasal anumeiya najep nauva, ponsil ho jong chu nasilpeh diu, hita chu Egypt mite chu nachomgam hel dingu ahi,” ati.

Chuphat nin Mosen adonbut nin, “Hijeng jongle vetan, Israel miten tah jong eitahsan pouvin tin, kathusei jong angai louhel diu ahi, ijeh-inem itileh,‘Pakai bon nahenga ahung kilah po,’ eiti diu ahiye,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a, “Nakhut’a nachoi chu ipi ham?” atileh; amanjong, “Tenggol ahi,” ati.
Pathenin, “Tenggol chu tola sep lhan” atileh; aman jong tol a aselhah a ahileh gul khat ahung sohdoh tan, Mose’n jong ajamsan jengtai.
Ahivangin Pakai chun Mose jah a, “Nakhut lhangin lang gul chu ameiyin kimat’in,” a tin; hijeh chun aman jong akhut alhangin gul chu akimat jenga ahileh akhut laiya tenggol ma ma ahung sohdoh kit tai.
Hita chu Pakai kitipa, apu apaten Pathen, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen chule Jacob Pathen chu nangma henga ahung kilah nai, tia atahsan dingu ahi,” ati.
Pakai chun Mose jah a ahinsei kit’in, “Nakhut chu naop konga koiyin,” atileh; a man jong akhut aop konga akoitai; ahin akhut chu alahdoh phat’in, vetan, anaphah in, buhbang tobangin anabangtai.

Chuphat in Pathenin jong, “Nakhut chu naop konga nung koi kit’in,” a tin; hijeh chun aman jong akhut chu aop konga anung koi kit tai; chujouvin akhut anung lahdoh kit’in ahileh, vetan, akhut chu atidang dang bangin anakithah semjol kit tan ahi.
Pathenin aseiyin, “Israel miten nangma natahsan dauva, ahilou jongle mechihna masa jong chu atahsan deh louvuva ahitah jongleh, melchihna nukhah beh chu atahsan thei tei diu ahi.

Hiche melchihna teni chu atahsan deh hih laiyuva, nathusei jong angai dauva ahinah laileh, nangman luipi dunga twi phabep nathaldoh a twi chu tolgo lah a nasunlhah ding ahi; hiche le chun luipi dunga kona nathaldohsa twi chu tolgo lah a chu thisan hungsoh ding ahiye,” ati.

Ahivangin Mose chun Pakai henga aseitai, “O ka-Pakai, keima kam kipeh mi kahipon, tu masang hihen lang, nalhacha kajah a thu nahinsei joukal hijongle, keima hi lei kipeh lou, thuseiya ngongkai mi kahibouve.” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin ajah aseipeh tai, “Mihem kam sempa chu koi ham? Mihem paomo le na-ngong a lha a, mitcho le khomulouva koi thei chu koi ham? Pakai kitipa keima hi kahilou ham?
Hijeh chun tun che jengin, keima nangma kamin pang jing ing ting, nasei ding jouse ipi hijongle kahil jing ding nahi” ati.
Hiche jeng jong chun Mose’n, “Vo ka-Pakai, nahenga katao ahiye, midang khattou soltan,” tin asei nalaiye.

Chuphat’in Pakaiyin Mose alunghan khumtan, hijeh chun aseitai, “Nasopipa, Levi mi Aaron uma hilou ham? Ama chun thu kipeh pelin aseiye, ti keiman kahei; chujong le vetangem, nangma lamto dinga Aaron hung potdoh ta khu, nangma nahin mupou poule alungsunga kipah thanom lheh jeng ding ahi.

Chutengle nangman ama khu nahoulimpia, thu hicheng hi ama kamsunga nakhumpeh a nathu mop ding ahi; hita chu keima nang le ama kamsunga kapan jing ding, ipi pi hijongle nabol lhon ding chu kahil jing ding nahi lhon nai.
Ama khun nangma thalhengin mipi jah a thu seiyin tin, hita chu ama chu nangma kamsunga pang jeng ding, ama dinga nangma hi Pathen tobang nahi ding ahi.
Chule hiche tenggol hi naknut’a nakichoiya, hiche tenggola hi melchihna tampi nabol ding ahi,” ati.

Chujouvin Mose jong anupa pa Jethro henga ahung kite kit’in ajah a aseitai, “Nahenga katao ahiye, Egypt gama nei nungsol kit tan, ka inkote hing hing nauvam, gave tange,” atileh; Jethron jong Mose jah a chun, “Lung mongtah in chetan,” atipeh pai jenge.
Midian gamsunga chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseipeh tai, “Egypt gama nung chekit tan, ijeh-inem itileh tha dinga nahol hol miho chu abonchan athisoh tauve,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong ajinu le achapate akoukhomin, abonchauvin sangan chunga atousah in, Egypt gamsung lama akinung le kittai; Mose’n akhut’a Pathen tenggol chu akichoiye.

Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseipeh tai, “Egypt gama nakile kit tengleh, vetan nakhut’a kapeh thil kidang chengse aboncha Pharaoh angsunga nabol soh kei ding ahi; ahinla keiman Pharoah lungthim kasuh tah ding ahin, hijeh a chu aman Israel mite asoldoh louhel ding ahi.
Hijongle nangman Pharaoh jah a nasei ding,‘Pakaiyin, Israel hi kachapa apeng masapen ahi,
hijeh a chu keiman nahenga kasei ahiye, “Kachapa hin keima kin abol theina dingin soldoh tan,” kati ahiye; nangman nasoldoh nom louva ahileh, nachapa tahpen katha peh ding nahi,’ ati, tin” ati.
Lampi dunga ge mun khat’a Pakaiyin Mose chu akimupin, tha dingin aholtai.

Hiche phat’in Zipporah chun meituh song khat alan, achapa chep agoitan peh in, chuin Mose kengphang te-nia chun aloinat peh kit’in, chujouvin, “Nangma hi kei dinga thisan jala kajipa nahiye!” tin aseitai:
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Mose ahinghoitai. Hiche kalsea chu cheptan vanga Zipporah chun, “Nangma hi thisan jala kajipa nahiye,” ati ahi;
Pakai chun Aaron jah a aseiyin, “Chen lang gamthip noiya khun Mose gakimupin,” atileh; amapa jong achen Pathen molsanga chun Mose agakimupin, agabeng chop’in ahi.
Hichun Mose’n jong Pakaiyin availhahna thu jouse leh melchihna abol dinga athupeh chengse chu abonchan Aaron henga aseisoh keiyin ahi.
Chuin Mose le Aaron chu ache lhonin Israel mite upa jouse agakhomsoh hel lhonin ahi.
Chutah chun Aaronin jong Mose koma Pakai thusei jouse chu abonchan aseisoh keiyin, chule mipi mitmun melchihna chengse jong chu abonchan abolsoh keiyin ahi.
Hitah chun mipin jong atahsan tauve; chujonle Pakaiyin Israel mite ahung vilkit’in, bolgentheiya aumnau amutai, ti thu ajahdoh phat’uvin aboh khup’uvin Pakai chibai aboh tauve.

Hiche nung chun Mose le Aaron Pharaoh henga ache lhonin agasei lhontai, “Pakai, Israelte Pathenin hitin aseiye,‘Gamthip noiya keima henga kut khat abol theina dinguvin kamite hi soldoh tan,’ ati” agati lhone.
Ahinla Pharaoh chun, “Pakai kitipa chu koi hiya, keiman athusei ka ngaiya Israelte kasoldoh ding hijah ong? Keiman Pakai kitipa chu kahe khapoi, Israelte jong kasoldoh louhel ding ahiye,” atitai.

Hichun amanin jong, “Hebrew mite Pathenin keini eikimupi lhon ahitai; hijeh a chu katao lhon ahiye, cheuving ting nithum lampi lhung keiya kakholjin uva Pakai ka-Pathen henguva kilhaina kagabol louvu leh Pathen chun gamna hise eihin lan khumsah uva, chemjama eisat gamsoh theiyu ahi,” ati lhone.
Ahijeng vangin Egypt lengpan amani jah a aseiyin, “Mose le Aaron, ipi dinga nang nin mipi chu anatoh nasuh tang lhon ham? Natoh ding lom nakitoh lhonle itam?” ati.
Chujongle Pharaoh chun aseiyin, “Vetan, gamsunga Israel mite hi tamtah ahiuvin, nang nin amaho hi natong louvin nalha lhontai!” ati.
Hiche nikho ma ma chun Pharaoh vin mipi tohvaipo loi le toh lamkai loi chu thu apen,
“Nanghon tukal mipi chu cheh denna dingin, masanga bang chun changpol pehda tauvin; amaho chu soluvin lang ama ama ding changpol gakipoh sah jenguvin.

Ahitin, masanga nadensah jiu cheh jat nadensah jing diu itinama jong le nalhomsah chomlou hel dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh amaho hi moh thaset gam ahitauvin; hijeh a chu,‘Cheu hi tin i-Pathenu henga kilhaina gabolu hite,’ tia asap sap jengu ahitai.
Hiche mite chunga hin natoh hahsa cheh-cheh lhut khumuvin, chutile na hatoh a atoh uva thujou jeng aseilou diu ahi.” ati.
Hijeh chun tohvaipo loi leh mipi toh lamkai loi chu apotdoh uvin mipi jah a agaseitauve, “Pharaoh chun hitin aseiye,‘Keiman changpol kapeh lou ding nahitauve.
Cheuvin lang namu nathei theiyuva nangma nangma ding gakihol tauvin; ahivanga natoh jat’u chu themcha jong kilhomsah chomlou hel ding ahi.’ tin aseiye,” agatiuve.
Hijeh chun mipi abonchauvin changpola heidoh dingin changkung chomkhom din Egypt gamsung pumpia akithechan soh heluvin ahi.
Tohvaipo loi chun anoloi loi jenguvin aseiyuve, “Masanga changpol nakipeh laiyuva niseh a natohjat jat’u chu natoh bulhing tei diu ahi,” atiuve.

Hiti chun Israel chate toh lamkai dinga Pharaoh tohvaipo loiyin apansah natoh lamkaiho chun voh a tin avouvin, “Ipi dinga masanga nacheh den banguva tunia jong nacheh den diu alhinga naden louvu ham?” tin adong tauve.
Chuphat’in Israel mite natoh lamkaiho chu Pharaoh henga ahunguvin akap pum pum uvin aseiyuve. “Ipi dinga nasohte hitobang loma hi nabol hi tam?

Nasohte hi changpol eipe tapouvin, achule la keiho jah a,‘Cheh tampi denguvin,’ tin eino no jenguve! Chujongle vetan, nasohte hi voh a tin eivo tauve, athemmo mong mong hi la nangma mite ma ma ahibouve” atiuve.
Ahinah vang chun Pharaoh vin jong, “Nangho nathase behseh jenguvin, hijeh chun ‘Cheu hitin Pakai henga kilhaina gabolu hite,’ tin naseiyuve.
Chuti chun tun jong cheuvin lang na gatong tau; ijeh-inem itileh min changpol nape hih jonguleh nanghon nacheh denjat jat-u chu nadendoh jing diu ahi,” ati’.
“Nanghon niseh a nacheh denjat’u nalhahsam sah louhel diu ahi,” tia aseipeh a kon chun Israel mite natoh lamkaihon, abon chauva amaho chu henasa sa kibol genthei mong mong ahitauve, ti ahedoh tauve.
Pharaoh koma kona ahung potdoh-uva ahileh, amaho ngah jing a anaum Mose le Aaron chu akimutopiuvin,

hijeh chun amahon jong ajah lhona aseitauve, “Pakaiyin nachung chang thu khol hen lang, nathu natanpeh lhon ta hen; ipijeh-inem itileh nangnin keiho hi Pharaoh le asohte mitmua doumah thilbol neisou ahitan, chuta chu keiho jeng jong eitha nadiuva amaho khut’a chemjam lapsa nakojpeh lhon ahitai,” atiuvin ahi.
Chutah chun Mose jong Pakai henga akiheiyin aseitai, “O Pakai, ipi dinga hiche mite chunga hi thilse nabol hi tam? Ipi ding pentah a neisol ba ham?
Nangma min pat’a Pharaoh henga thusei dinga kahung lhuna pat aman hiche mite hi abolse se jengin, nangman la namite hi nahuh doh deh hih hel’e,” ati.

Ahinla Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin; “Tua hi Pharaoh chunga keiman ipi kahinbol ding, nangman namu ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh banjang thahat’a akibol teng naman amaho chu ahinsol doh ding, banjang thahat a akibol tengleh abonchauva agamsunga kona ahindel doh tho jeng ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose henga thu aseiyin, “Keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi.

Keima Abraham henga jong, Isaac henga jong, chule Jacob henga jong Pathen Hatchung nung kiti hin kana kilahjin, amaho henga chun keima mong mong hin kamin Pakai kitipa hi kahi, tin kana kihetsah hih laiye.
Chujongle amaho kholjin tobanga achennau gam, Canaan gam kapehna dinga amaho toh kakitepna chu kanaphut doh tai.
Hiche kalval jong chun Egypt miten sohchanga ahenu, Israel chate kagin chu kajan, chule kakitepna chu kageldoh tai.

Hijeh chun Israel chate jah a seipeh-in, Keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahin; nangho Egypt mite bolgentheina chengsea kona kapuidoh-uva, chule amahon nahen nauva kona kapuidoh ding, chuteng kabanjang kahin lhan a, thu nasa tah a katan a kahuhdoh ding nahiuve;

nangho hi kamite hi dinga kakisanuva, keima jong na-Pathenu kahi ding ahiye; chutengle chun Pakai na Pathenu kahiya, Egypt mite bolgentheina tin chenga kona nangho puidoh pa chu kahi, nahetdoh dingu ahi.
Chule keiman Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob henga peh dinga kahahselsa gamsunga chu nangho kahin puilut diu, agam chu nalo dinguva kapeh ding nahiuve. Keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi,” ati.
Mose’n hiti chun Israel chate jah a thu aseipeh tai; ahivangin amahon Mose thusei chu angaipeh tapouve; ijeh-inem itileh gim genthei tah a akihen jeh-uva alungthimu lhadah gam ahitai.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseitai.
“Che lut’in lang, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh chun ama gamsunga kona Israel chate asoldohna dingin gaseipeh tan,” ati.

Ahinla Mose’n Pakai henga aseiyin hitin ati, “Ven, Israel chate khun keima thusei jong ngai nahsah-in eineipeh deh pouve; achutile mipaomo keima thusei chu Pharaoh bih beh chun iti angai thei ding ham?” ati.

Ahivangin la Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron henga thu asei tei teiyin, chujongle amanin Egypt gama kona Israel chate ahinpuidoh tei teina dingin Israel chate le Pharaoh henga thu asei tei tei lhon na dingin thulhahna khat aneitai.
Hicheng hi apu apateu insung dola insung upa chengse ahiuve: Israela kona apeng masapen Reuben chapate chu: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron chule Carmi ahiuvin, abonchauva hi Reuben insung mi jeng ahiuve.
Simeon chapate chu: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jachin, Zohar chule Canaan numei khat chapa Shaul toh ahiuve; amaho cheng hi Simeon insung mi jeng ahiuve.
Akhangu kisim dungjuiya Levi chapate chu aminu hicheng hi ahiuve: Gershon, Kohath, chule Merari ahiuve; Levi hinkho chu kum jakhat le kum somthum le kum sagi analhinge.
Gershon chapa teni chu; ainsung dol lhona akisim leh Libni le Shimei bou ahilhone.
Kohath chapate chu: Amram, lzhar, Hebron, chule Uzziel ahiuvin; Kohath chu ahinkho kum jakhat le kum somthum le kum thum analhingin ahi.
Merari chapa teni chu: Mahli le Mushi ahilhone. Hichengse hi akhangu kisim dungjuiya Levi insung mi jeng jeng ahisoh keiyuve.
Amramin aninu Jochebed chu jin akipuiyin, amanun jong Aaron le Mose anahinpeh tai; Amram hinkho jong kum jakhat le kum som thum le kum sagi analhinge.
Izhar chapate chu: Korah, Nepheg chule Zichri ahiuve.
Chule Uzziel chapate chu: Mishael, Elzaphan, chule Sithri ahiuve.
Aaronin Amminadab chanu, Nahshon sopinu, Elisheba kitinu chu jin akipuiyin, amanunjong Nadab le Abihu toh, Eleazar toh chule Ithamar ahinpeh tai.
Korah chapate chu: Assir, Elkanah, chule Abiasaph ahiuvin, abonchauva hi Korah insung kon cheh ahitauve.

Eleazar kitipa Aaron chapa chun Putiel chanute numei khat jin akipuiyin, chule amanu chun Phinehas kitipa chu anahinpeh e: Hichengse hi ainsung dungjuiyu leh apu apateu insung dola Levite phung upa ho chu ahitauve.
Hiche teni hi Pakaiyin ajah lhona, “Israel chate chu Egypt gama konin ahon honin hinpuidoh lhonin,” tia anaseipeh teni Aaron le Mose chu ahilhone.
Hiche Mose le Aaron hi ahilhone, Egypt lengpa Pharaoh koma, Egypt’a kona Israel chate puidohna ding thuseiya pang teni chu,
Egypt gamsunga Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu anaseipet chun,
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu anaseiyin hitin anati, “Keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi, keiman najah a thu kasei jouse hi abonchan Egypt lengpa Pharaoh henga seipehin,” ati.
Ahivangin Mose’n Pakai angsung tah a asei jengin, “Ven, mipaomo keima thusei tobang chu Pharaoh vin iti angai mong mong ding ham?” atitai.
Chutah chun Pakaiyin jong Mose jah a aseitai, “Ven, keiman nang hi Pharaoh koma Pathen tobanga kasem nahin, chule nasopipa Aaron chu nangma dinga themgaova pang ding ahiye.
Nangma thu kapehjouse chu aboncha naseisoh keiya, chutengle nasopipa Aaron chun Pharaoh jah a, agamsunga kona Israel chate asoldoh mi dinga aseipeh ding ahi.
Hitin keiman Pharaoh lungthim katahsah ding jeh chun, Egypt gamsunga melchihna leh thil dang tamtah kabolbe be jeng ding ahinan,

hijongle Pharaoh vin nangma thusei ngaisah a naneipeh louhel ding ahi; chutengleh keiman Egypt chunga kakhut kahin lhah ding, thu nasa tah a katan a, kasepaite kamite “Israel chate chu Egypt gamsunga kona kahin puidoh ding ahi.
Chutah le Egypt miten keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahin, kakhut kalhandoh phat nin Israel chate Egypt mite lailung tah a konin kahin puidoh jenge, ti ahetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Chuphat nin Mose le Aaron chun Pakaiyin amani athupeh bang bang chun abol lhontai.
Mose le Aaronin Pharaoh henga thu agasei lai lhon chun Mose ahinkho kum som get alhingtan, Aaron jong chu kum som get le kum thum alhingtai.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati;

“Pharaoh chun nangni jah a,‘Natah lhon najou lhon phot chetnan nang nin thil kidang khat bollhonin,’ tia asei tengleh, nangman Aaron jah a,‘Natenggol chu kilah in lang Pharaoh angsung laitah a sep lhan, chuta chu tenggol chu gul ahung sodoh theina dingin,’ nati ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun Mose le Aaron Pharaoh henga ache lhonin, chule Pakaiyin athupeh lhon to bang chun agabollhontai; Aaronin Pharaoh le asohte angsunga atenggol asep lhan ahileh, gul ahung sohdoh, tai.
Chuphat nin Pharaoh vin jong miching jouse le doithem jouse abonchan akoukhomin ahile, Egypt gam mi mitphel doithem, amaho jong chun athemguh nauva konin hitobang bang thil chu abol thei cheh uve.
Ajeh chu amitakip chun atenggol cheh ase lhah uva ahileh, gul asoh gamtan ahi. Ahivangin Aaron tenggol gul chun midang ho tenggol gul sohdoh jouse aval lhumsoh tai.
Hichan gei jong chun Pharaoh lungthim suhtah-in aum nalaiyin, Pakaiyin anasei masah tobang chun, amani thusei chu ngaisah-in anei hih laiye.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseitai, “Pharaoh lungthim hi kisutah ahitan, hijeh a chu aman mipi hi asoldoh nom lou ahiye.
Jingkah a Pharaoh twi phung lam a ahung tengleh akoma chen lang, lui panga khun ama ana ngah masan, chule gul kisosah ji tenggol chu nakhut’in kichoiyin.

Chutengle nangman Pharaoh jah a chu, “Pakai, Hebrew mite Pathen chun nang henga eihinsolin chule hitin ati,‘Kamite hin gamthip noiya keima kin abol theina diuvin soldoh tan, ati ahin; ahinla vetan, nangman athusei na ngaipoi,’ gatin.

Pakaiyin hitin aseiye,‘Hichea kona hi nangman kei hi Pakai, kitipa chu kahi neihetdoh ding ahi,’ ati: Ven, keiman kakhut’a kachoi tenggol hin lui dunga twi hi hinjep ing katin, twi hi thisan hung sohdoh ding ahi;
chutengle lui dunga nga jouse hung thi gama, vadung twi hung nehsoh ding, chutah le Egypt miten vadunga twi chu adonuva aloh lhah lhah jeng diu ahi, nati ding ahi,” ati.

Chujongle Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Aaron jah a seipeh in lang, ‘Nangman natenggol kimat nin lang Egypt gama twipi chung hihen lang, vadung chung hihen, atwilam jouseu chung hihen lang, aluikhuh jouseu le atwikul jouseuva twi jouse chung hileh nakhutjah khumjengin, chutileh twi jouse chu thisan hung soh doh soh keiya, Egypt gamsung khokhong soh hela twikong jouse le songkong jouse sunga thisan hung veidimsoh hel ding ahi,’ tin,” ati.

Mose le Aaron chun Pakai thupeh to bang bangin abol lhontai: Pharaoh le asohte mitmu changtah chun Aaronin atenggol alam sangin, lui dunga vei twi lah chu ajepma ahileh, lui dung twi jouse abonchan thisan ahung soh doh tan ahi.

Hichun lui dunga nga jouse jong athisoh tan; hijeh chun lui dung twi anehsoh helin ahileh, Egypt miten lui dunga twi chu adon thei tapouve; hiti chun Egypt gamsung khokhong soh helin thisan anavei dimsoh heltan ahi.

Egypt ma mitphel doithem ho jong vang chun athemguh nauva konin hitobang bang chun anabol jiuvin ahileh, Pharaoh lungthim atahsah den jing nalaiyin, Mose le Aaron thusei chu, Pakaiyin anasei tobang chun, ngaisah in aneideh poi.
Chuin Pharaoh akiheiyin ainsunga alut tai, chule hiche thilsoh chu alungthim jeng chan jong melchih in anei hih hel’e.
Ahin Egypt mite vang chun luipang vel dung chu, twi don ding holnan, tol alai laitauve; ijeh-inem itileh lui dung twi chu adonthei tapouvin ahi.
Pakaiyin lui dung ajep jou kal ni sagi alhingtai.
Chujouvin Pakaiyin Mose jah a a thu aseiyin, “Pharaoh henga galut’in lang, chule ajah a thu gaseiyin.‘Pakaiyin hitin thu aseiye, “Keima kin abol theina dinguvin kamite hi soldoh tan.
Ijem tia nangman kamite soldoh ding hi nada leh ven, keiman nagamsung pumpia hi ukengte kahin lha a kasuh gamsah ding ahi;

lui dung jong ukengte hung dimset diu, hiche ukengte chu nainsunga hung kaldoh-uva, nalupna indan sunga hung lut diu, nalupna hung kaldohuva, nasohte leh namite insung jousea hung lut’uva, chujongle nathuh sung dungule nachanglhah mehnangna theisung dunga hung lut ding ahiuve;
ukengte chu nangma chung le namite chung, chule nasohte jouse chunga hung kaldoh ding ahiuve,’ ati tin gaseipeh tan” ati.

Chujongle Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Aaron jah a seipeh-in lang,‘Egypt gamsunga ukengte ahung dimsetna dinguvin, tenggol chu nakhut’in kimat’in, lui dung jouse, twilam jouse chule twikul jouse chu jep jeng temin!’ tin, seipeh-in” ati.
Hita chu Aaronin Egypt gamsunga twi jouse chunga akhut agah jah khum jenga ahileh, ukengte tamtah ahung kitol lut jengin, Egypt gamsung chu akhu nal jenguve.
Mitphel doithem ho jong vang chun athemguh nauva konin hitobang bang chun aboluvin, Egypt gamsung dimset’in ukengte ahinlha lut jenguvin ahi.

Hichun Pharaoh vin Mose le Aaron akouvin aseitai, “Keima le kamite koma kona Pakaiyin ukeng ho hi alah mangna dingin tao lhonin, chutile keiman Pakai henga kilhaina kin bol dinga Israel mite hi kasolpeh ding ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Mose’n jong Pharaoh jah a aseitai, “Keiman nang le nasohte ding chule namite dinga ukeng jouse hi nanga kon le na-in dung jousea akisuh gamna dinga kataova lui dung seh seh a umden dinga kataopeh tengle chun nangman jong kathum chu phalpeh jeng din lung lhaitan.” atileh;
Pharaoh chun, “Jing tengleh.” ati. Hichun Mose’n “Nasei bang chu hita hen: chutileh Pakai, keiho Pathen tobang hi khat cha jong aumpoi, ti nahetdoh ding ahi.
Ukengte chu nang kom le na-in dunga kon, nasohte le namitea konin kitolmang uvin tin, lui dung seh seh a bou umden ding ahiuve.” ati.
Hiti chun Mose le Aaron chu Pharaoh koma konin apotdoh lhonin, Pharaoh to akinopto tobang chun Mose jong ukengte chung chang thudola chun Pakai henga ataotai.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose thusei dungjuiyin ahinboltan, ukengte chu in dunga kon leh kho kimvei dunga kon, chule loujao dunga konin athigam tauve.
Mihon ukengte thisa ho chu alhuh lhuh in asekhomuvin ahileh, gamsung jeng jong anamsen auilet lut jengtai.
Ahin Pharaoh chun chom khat kicholdoa lung olna aumtai, ti amudoh phat’in alungthim atahsah kit tan, amani thusei chu, masanga Pakaiyin anaseisa bang bangin, ngai nahsah-in aneideh tapoi.
Chutah chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Aaron jah a seipeh-in lang,‘Natenggol lamin lang, Egypt gamtin chansoh a thouvaisi ahung lanna dingin leiset leivui ho hi jep temin,’ tin,” ati.

Hichun amanin hitobang chun abol lhonin, Aaron chun akhut’in atenggol chu alamin leiset’a leivui ho chu ajep’a ahileh, mihem le ganchate chunga thouvaisi ahung dimset jengtai; Egypt gamsung khokhongsoh helin leivui jouse chu thouvaisi ahung soh doh gamtauve.
Mitphel doithem hon jong athemguh nauva kona thouvaisi soh doh sah ding agouvin, aboldoh joupouve. Hitobang hin mihem gancha chunga thouvaisi analangin ahi.

Hichun mitphel doithem hon Pharaoh jah a, “Hiche pi hi Pathen khutjung ahibouve!” atiuvin ahi. Ahivangin Pharaoh lungthim chu akisutah cheh jengin, Pakaiyin anaseisa bang bang chun, athuseiyu chu ngaisah-in aneideh tapoi.

Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Jing jingkah teng jingpi matah-in thouvin lang, Pharaoh chu twiphung lama ahung tengleh ana ngah masan, chule ajah a,‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Keima kin aboltheina dinguvin kamite hi soldoh tan.

Achutilouva kamite nasoldoh nomlouva ahileh, vetan, keiman nang chung le nasohte chung, namite chung chule nainsung dung jouse dimset’a thousi kahin lhalut ding ahin; Egypt mite insung dung jouse leh adinnau leiset chungjouse thousi hung dimset ding ahiuve.

Hitin hiche nikho chuleh keiman kamite chenna Goshen gamsung atumbeh a kakhendoh a, hijeh a chu thousi khat cha jong leng lut lou ding ahi; chutengle leiset lailung jenga jong keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi, ti nanghon nahetdoh dingu ahi.
Hita chu keiman kamite leh namite kah a kikhenna khat kahin koi ding ahin; jing tengleh hiche hi amelchihna hiding ahiye,” tin aseiye,’ gatin.” ati.

Chuin Pakaiyin hiti chun aboltai: Pharaoh insung ahin asohte insung dung jouse ahin, chule Egypt gamsung pumpi ahin, thousi alup lup in ahung kitol jengin, Egypt gamsung pumpi chu thousi lan jeh chun amanghel jengin ahi.
Chutah chun Pharaoh vin Mose le Aaron akouvin chule aseitai, “Cheuvin lang hiche gamsung ma ma hin na-Pathen henguva kilhaina gabol tauvin” atitai.

Ahin Mose’n jong aseiyin, “Hitobanga hiche gamsunga bol ding chu kitoh ponte, ajeh chu keihon Pakai ka-Pathen henguva kilhaina kaboluva thil katodoh ding jouseu chu Egypt mite dinga thil thet umtah tah ahibouve. Hitobang chun keihon Egypt mite mitmun amaho vetdia thil thet umtah tah ho chu kilhaina thilin bol tau leng, amahon songa eiselih jeng lou diu ham?
Keiho nithum sunga jot khopset khol lampia kacheuva gamthip noilama khu aman eithupeh dungjui juiyuva Pakai ka-Pathen henguva kilhaina kagabol tei tei diu ahibouve.” ati.

Chuphat’in Pharaoh vinjong, “Keiman gamthip noiya Pakai na-Pathenu henga kilhaina bol dingin nasol nauvinge; gamla tah a vang nache mang louhel diu ahiye; keima dingin jong neihin taokop tauvin.” ati.

Hichun Mose’n jong, “Vetan, keima nakoma konin potdoh ing katin, jing tengle Pharaoh le asohte koma kon, chule amite koma kona thousi jouse akitolmangna dinga Pakai henga katao ding ahi; Pharaoh vin jong mi joulhep da pou pouvin lang, Israel mipi hi Pakai koma kilhaina bola che din soldoh da hih helin.” ati.
Hiti chun Pharaoh koma konin Mose jong apotdoh pai paiyin, Pakai henga agatao tan ahi.

Chujongle Pakai jengin jong Mose taona bang bangin abolpeh tan, thousi honte chu abonchan Pharaoh koma konle asohte koma kon chuh; amite koma konin akitolmang soh helin, khat’a khat cha jong aumtapoi.
Ahinah vangin hiche chan gei jeng jong chun Pharaoh vin alungthim atahsah kitna laiyin, hijeh chun Israel mipi chu asoldoh kit deh tapoi.
Chujouvin Pakai chun Mose jah a thu aseiyin, “Pharaoh henga lut jengin lang chule ajah a gaseiyin. “Hebrew mite Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye. “Keima kin abol theina dinguvin kamite chu soldoh tan.
Ijeh-inem itileh tuchan geiya hi amaho hi nasoldoh nom hih laiya nahen hen jeng ding leh,
vetan, Pakai banjang thahat chu naloujaova um gancha chung, sakolte chung, sangante chung, sangong sangte chung, gancha honte le kelngoi honte chunga huhat tah a hung langa athagam jeng ding ahi.

Hiche jenga jong chu Pakaiyin Israelte gancha le Egypt mite gancha kah a kikhenhela ahinbol ding, Israel chate gancha ahi kitipou pou chu khat’a khat cha jong thilou hel ding ahi,” tin aseiye’ gatin” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin phat khat atep’in, aseiye, “Jingle Pakaiyin hiche gamsunga hi thil hiche hi ahinbol ding ahi,” ati.
Chuti chun ajing nikhon Pakaiyin hiche thil chu ahinboltai; Egypt mite gancha abonchan athigamin, Israel chate ganchate vang chu khat’a khat cha jeng jong athipoi.

Hichun Pharaoh vin jong mi asolin agavetsah a ahileh, vetan Israel chate gancha ho chu khat cha jong anathipoi. Hijongle la Pharaoh lungthim chu akisutah kit’in, Israel mipi chu asoldoh deh tapon ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose le Aaronjah-a aseiyin, “Nangnin thuh sunga konin vutdi nakhut dimset’in kihamdoh lhonin lang, chu tengleh Pharaoh mitmu changtah-in Mose’n vutdi chu vanlama thetou hen.
Chutengle Egypt gamsung pumpi hi vutdi nelsil sel chun athechansoh keiya, chutah le Egypt gamsunga mihem chung hihen, gancha chung hitaleh, uilut nat nasa tah a hung lang ding ahi, ati.

Hiti chun amanin thuh sunga konin vutdi akihamdoh lhonin, Pharaoh angsunga ading lhontai; Mose’n vutdi chengse chu van lama athetouvin ahileh, vutdi chu mihem le gancha chunga uilut nat nasa tah-in ahung langtai.
Uilut natna chu mitphel doithem ho le Egypt mite jouse chunga alhun phat’in mitphel dolthem hojeng jong Mose chutoh kidinte dingin amasanga ading jou tapouve.
Chujongle Pakaiyin Pharaoh lungthim asutah tan, masanga Pakaiyin Mose jah a anaseisa tobang chun, Pharaoh vin amani thusei chu ngaisah-in aneideh hih laiye.

Chujouvin Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Jingpi tah leh thouvin lang Pharaoh angsunga gadingin, chutengle ajah a gaseiyin,‘Hebrew mite Pakai Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Keima kin abol theina diuvin kamite hi soldoh tan.

Ijeh-inem itileh tua hi keiman nangma lungthim sung le nasohte chung le namite chunga mi thigamna gamna hise kanei jouse aboncha kahin lansah ding ahin, chutah le nangin jong leiset chunga keima tobang hi khat cha jong aum hih hele; ti nahetdoh ding ahiye.
Ajeh chu tujenga jong hi kakhut kalap’a nangle namite hi gamna hise kalankhum sah jenga, leiset’a kona hi nakisumang hel thei ahitan;
hijongle leiset chung khokhong soh hela keima min akiphonjala, keiman jong kathahat kavetsah theina dinga nangma hi tuchan geiya kahing hoi nah lai nahi.
Hichan geiyin jong nangma kamite dounan nakichoi sang jing nalaiyin, amaho soldoh louvin nakoi nalaiye.

Neihin vetan, jing tengleh tuphat dontah a hi keiman gel len nasa tah a kahin lhah sah ding ahi; hitobang gel len nasa hi Egypt gam akisemdoh apat tuni geiya hi Egypt gamsunga analha kha loulai hel ahiye.

Chuti ahijeh chun tun mi solin lang loujaova lha nanei nagancha abonchan gahoi lutsah-in, ahoidoh theina ding mun khat’a gakolsah tan; ajeh chu gel len ahung lhah teng leh loujaova umden inlama hung kihoilut lou chengse chu, mihem hihen lang gancha hileh, gel chun asekhah soh kei ding, aboncha thisoh hel ding ahiuve,” ati,’ gatin;” ati.
Chuphat’in Pharaoh sohte lahjenga jong Pakai thusei ging jousen asohteu le agancha jouseu insung lim dunga ajamlut sah soh tauve;
ahin Pakai thusei ija sah lou chengse vang chun asohteu le aganchau loujao dunga alha thang nalaiyuve.

Chuin Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Egypt gamsung pumpia hi gel ahung lhah a, mihem hihen lang gancha hileh, loujaova thingphung keh jouse hijongleh, Egypt gamsung pumpia aumtapou chu, asekhah na dingin van lam ngan nakhut lhangdoh temin,” atileh;

Mose’n jong van lam ngan atenggol chu agah lhangdoh tai; chutah chun Pakaiyin van akithinsah in gel alhah sah tan, leiset chung geiyin meikong ahung leng lha jengin ahi. Hiti chun Pakaiyin Egypt gamsunga gel chu gojuh bang bangin ahingjuh lhah sah jenge;

gel alha alha jengin, gel lah a chun meikong kitat louhelin apah lah lah jenge; gel len nasa tah ahin, Egypt mite nam khat’a ahung kivaipohuva pat agamsunguva hitobang gel chu lha khalou lai hel ahiye.

Gel len chun Egypt gamsung khokhong soh helin, loujaova umden tapou chu mihem hihen lang gancha hileh thil aum jouse chu asep lhusoh heltai; chujongle gamlah a thing phung jouse jong asep lhusoh helin, gamlah thing phung jouse chu athe thangsoh hele.
Israelte chenna Goshen gamsung mai maiya chun gel alhapoi.
Hiche phat chun Pharaoh vin mi asolin Mose le Aaron agakousah-in, ajah lhona aseitai, “Tuchung hin keima kachonsetai, Pakai chu adih tan, kei le kamite kathemmo tauve;
Pakai henga tao lhontan, van aging demdum nalaiyin, gel nasatah-in alha nalaiye; keiman jong nangho henchol louhela kasoldoh pai paijeng ding nahitauve,” ati.

Hichun Mose’n jong ajah a aseiyin, “Khopi sunga kona kapotdoh tengleh, keiman Pakai heng lam sang ing ting, chutah le van gin hung thip’a gel jong hung tang ding ahi; chutengle leiset jonghi Pakai leiset ahi, ti nahetdoh ding ahiye.
Ahin nang nahin nasohte ahiuvin, keiman kahenai, nangho hin Pakai Pathen chu naging hih laiyuve,” ati.
Pumpeng le sakol chang vang chu amangthah soh heltai; ajeh chu sakol chang avui ahung doh lai ahin, pumpeng chu ahung dotdoh til lai cha anahi khai.
Suhlou chang le butun vang amang hih nai, ajeh chu suhlou chang le butun chu ahung dondoh vahlou ahilhone:

Hiti chun Mose jong Pharaoh koma konin apotdoh pai paiyin, khopi adalhan, chule Pakai heng lam akhut te nia asan jenga ahileh van kithin gin le gellhah a tang paiyin, leiset chunga go aju lha tahih hel e.
Ahinla Pharaoh chun gojuh le gel lhah chule van kithin gin chu atangtai, ti amudoh phat’in, alungthim atahsah kit’in, ama ahin asohte ahiuvin achonse kit tauve.
Pakaiyin masanga Mose koma anaseisa tobang bangin, Pharaoh lungthim chu akisutah kit tan, hijeh chun Pharaoh vin Israel chate chu asoldoh’ kit tapon ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Pharaoh henga galut tan, ajeh chu keiman ama lungthim le asohte lungthim aboncha kasuh tah a, melchihna hicheng kaboldoh hi vetsah ding kati ahi;

chujongle nangman nachapa le natupa nabenga keiman itobang tah a Egypt mite hi kichepna kaneiya, alah uva ipi melchihna kabol hitam, ti nasei theina ding kati ahi; hita chu nangho jengin jong keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi nahetdoh thei diu ahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun Mose le Aaron Pharaoh henga agalut lhonin, chule ajah a agasei lhontai, “Hebrew mite Pakai Pathenin hitin asei e,‘Ichan geiya nangma hi ka angsunga kun ding nada nah lai ding ham? Keima kin aboltheina diuvin kamite hi soldoh tan.
Ajeh chu nangman kamite hi nasoldoh nomlou leh, neihin vetan, keiman jing tengleh nagamsunga hi khaokhote kahin lhalut peh ding,

khaokhote chun gam leiset pumpi atomjol jeng diu ahin, koimachan aleiset chu amudoh thei louhel diu ahi; chutengle khaokhoten gel voh lih moh adalhah chengse chu aneh gamuva, loujao dunga keh nathingphung jouse aneh gamsoh hel diu ahi;

chujongle khaokhote chu nangma insung dung hihen lang, nasohte insung dung hileh, Egypt mite insung dung jouse hung dimset diu ahi; hitobang thilsoh hi napate naputeuvin jong leiseta ahung penlhah-uva pat tuni gei hin amukha hih laiyuve,’ ati,” agati lhontai. Chujouvin Mose a kihei yin Pharaoh koma konin apotdoh tai.

Hichun Pharaoh sohten jong Pharaoh jah a aseitauve, “Hichepa hi eiho dinga itih chan geiya, kipal lhuhna pang ding ham? Israel mite chun Pakai aPathenu kin aboltheina diuvin soldoh ngap tan; Egypt gam hi amangthah pai tah bah ahitai, ti nangman nahet khen louhel lai ham?” atitauve.

Hijeh chun Mose le Aaron chu Pharaoh henga dingin ahin nung puilut kit’uvin. Pharaoh vin amani jah a chun, “Cheuvin lang Pakai na-Pathenu chu akin gabol tauvin; ahin koipen tah hi ham ache ding miho chu?” tin adongtai.

Chuphatin Mose’n jong aseitai, “Keiho ateh akhang kaboncha kache diu; kachateu jong pasal numei aboncha kapuiyuva, kakelngoi jouseu le kagancha-u ahon hona aboncha kapui diu ahiye; ajeh chu keihon Pakai henga kut kagabol tei tei dingu ahiye,” ati.
Hichun Pharaoh vin amani jah a aseiyin, “Keiman nangho hita chu nachasen jouseu toh kasoldoh tha pou pouva ahileh Pakaiyin naum piu hen! Ve lhonin, nangnin nalung gil lhona thilse nagel lhonin ahi.

Hiti chu hithei louhel ding ahi! Cheuvin lang nangho lah a pasal chengse chun, Pakai na-Pathenu kin gaboltau, hiche chu nadeiyu hiya chu,” atin; hitah chun amani chu Pharaoh masanga konin anodoh tho jenguvin ahi.

Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin,‘Egypt gamsung pumpia hi khaokhote ahung kitol lutna din nakhut jah khum jeng temin, chutileh khaokhote chu Egypt gamsung pumpia hung kitol lut’uva, gamsunga hamphung gel voh lih moh chengse chu aboncha anehgam hel diu ahi,” ati.

Hiti chun Mose’n jong Egypt gam chung vuma atenggol ajap’in ahileh Pakaiyin chuche nikhon nilhum hel le jan khovah helin gamsung pumpia niso lama konin khohui ahin nunsah tan, ajing jingkah ahung hiphatin niso lam khohui nung chun khaokhote tamtah ahinlhoh lut jengin ahi.

Khaokhote chu Egypt gam leiset chung chansoh-in ahung vah thangsoh heluvin Egypt gamsung pumpia chun atoudet soh hel tauve; hitobang loma tam khaokhote chu masangin anaum kha hih laiyin, hungjong hung um kit louhel ding ahiye.

Ijeh-inem itileh khaokhote chun agam leiset chung pumpi atom lhah deh jenguvin, agam leiset akivet le avom lhah deh duh jenge; chujongle khaokhote chun gel suhmang moh chengse gamsunga hamphung jouse leh thingga jouse anegam heltauvin, Egypt gamsung pumpia chun loujaova hamphung ahin, thingna ahiuvin, anadum khata khat cha jong aumtapoi.’
Chuphat’in Pharaoh vin man gangtah-in Mose le Aaron chu akouvin aseitai, “Keima Pakai na-Pathenu leh nangni dounan kachonsetai.

Hichejeh a chu naheng lhona katao ahiye, tuchung pou pou hin kachonsetna hi nei ngaidam lhonin lang, chutengleh Pakai na-Pathenu henga neitaopeh lhonin, hiche thina hi keima koma konin tolmangsah lhonin,” atitai.
Hijeh chun Mose jong Pharaoh koma konin apotdohin Pakai koma agataotai.

Hichun Pakaiyin nilhum lama konin khohui hat tah-in ahin nunsah jengin ahileh, khohui chun khaokhote abonchan asemdoh soh keiyin, twikhanglen san dunga alhoh lut soh keitai; khaokho khat a khat cha jong Egypt gamsung, agamgi sungse sea chun agam pumpi sunga aumden tapon ahi.
Hichan gei jeng jong chun Pakaiyin Pharaoh lungthim asuh tah peh kit’in, hijeh chun Pharaohvin Israel chate chu asoldoh hih laiye.
Chujouvin Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Egypt gam leiset chunga mujin ahung lhuna muthim chu akitham khah theina hel khop’a kho ajinna dingin, nakhut’in vap lam sangtemin,” atileh;
Mose’n jong van lam agahsan jenga ahileh, Egypt gamsung pumpia mujin ahung lhungin, nithum sungin mu athimtai.

Hijeh chun miho chu khat le khat jong amit’in akimuto tapouvin, nithum sung chun mi khat cha jong aumna muna konin akipatdoh a apotdoh aumtapoi; ahinla Israel chaten achennau muna chun khovah anei nauve.
Hichun Pharaoh vin Mose akouvin aseitai, “Cheuvin lang Pakai kin chu gabol jenguvin, nachateu jong kipui jenguvin, nakelngoi honteu vang chu nadalhah tei tei diu ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Mose’n jong aseitai, “Pakai ka-Pathenu henga kilhaina kanei diu, kilhaina gantha ding le pumgo thilto ding jouse jong aboncha neisol tha mong mong diu angaibouve.

Hijeh a chu kaganchau aboncha kakitol tha mong mong diu ngaijah ahiye; atin hal khat jeng cha jong dalha louva, Pakai ka Pathenu kin bolna dinga kakaisoh keidiu ahi, ajeh chu kajotnau kalhun masang seuva, hoiche pen tah a hi Pakai kin kabol diu ham, ti kahet loulaiyu ahiye,” ati.
Ahivangin Pakaiyin Pharaoh lungthim asutah tan, hijeh chun Pharaoh vin amaho asoldoh tapoi.
Chuin Pharaoh chun Mose jah a aseitai, “Kakoma kon hin chedoh jengin, nathu thu kihin; kamaiya hung kilah kit hih helin; ijeh inem itileh kamai namu ni ni leh nathi tei tei ding ahi!” atitai.
Chutah chun Mose’n jong, “Henge, nasei bang chun kei jong namaiya kahung kilah kit louhel ding ahitai!” tin aseipeh tan ahi.

Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Keiman Egypt gamsung le Pharaoh chunga kahin lansah kit ding gamna hise khat aum nalaiye; hiche kichai nung le chun Pharaoh vin nangho nasoldoh jenguva, pumdela nadel mang hel jeng diu ahiye.
Israel mite nabenga seipeh-in lang, amitakip, pasalin jong numeiyin jong aheng akom henga dangka le sana kijepna kithum cheh uhen,” ati.

Pakaiyin Israel mite chu Egypt mite mitmun lunglhai lhainan aumsah tai. Hiche kalval jong chun Mose kiti mipa jong chu Egypt gamsunga aminthang lheh jeng tan, Pharaoh sohte mitmu leh mipi mitmun aminthang lheh jengin ahi.
Hichun Mose’n aseiyin, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye,‘Jan khangkim dontah le keiman Egypt mite jalah kahinkhol ding,

chutah le Egypt gamsunga chapang peng masa jouse aboncha, Pharaoh chapa peng masapen, alatouna toupa a kipat sumheiya chang goiya pang asohnu chapa apeng masapen geiya hung thigamsoh hel ding ahiuve; chujongle gancna apeng masa chengse jong hung thigam diu ahi.
Chutah leh Egypt gamsung pumpi thongsoh hela ka ogin nasa tah a kithongsoh hel ding, hitobang thilsoh hi anaum khalou lai ahin, hung jong hung umkit louhel ding ahi.

Amavang Israel chate douna mihem hihen lang gancha hijongleh, uicha jeng cha jong hamging lou ding ahin; hiteng chuleh Pakaiyin Egypt mite leh Israel mite kah a datkhenna asem ahitai, ti nanghon nahetjeng diu ahi.

Chutengle nasohte hicheng pihi keima henga hung kunuvin tin, kakoma bohkhupuva aseidiu, “Nangle nanungjui mipi nabon chauvin potdoh jenguvin,” tia asei dingu ahi,’ ati tin aseiye,” ati. Hichun Mose jong vang lung phamo tah-in Pharaoh koma konin apotdoh tai.
Chuin Pakaiyin Mosejah a aseiyin, “Pharaoh vin nangma thusei agailou ding ahi; ijeh inem itileh hita chu Egypt gamsunga keiman thil kidang kabol ho hi kibolbe be jeng thei ding ahi,” ati.
Mose le Aaronin thil kidang hicheng pi hi Pharaoh angsunga anabol lhonin; chua chun Pakaiyin Pharaoh lungthim asutah jin Israel chate chu agamsunga konin anasoldoh deh pon ahiye.
Egypt gamsunga chun Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron jah a thu anaseiyin, hitin ati;
“Hiche lha hi nangho dinga lha jouse kipatna hiya, kum khat sunga nangho dinga lha masa pen a hiche lha hi kisim ding ahi.

Israelte khoppi jouse jah a seipeh lhonin lang hitin sei lhonin, ‘Hiche lha nisom lhin ni hileh amitakip’in apu apateu insung kailhah dungjui cheh a, insung khat cheh chun kelngoi nou khat akimat cheh diu;

koitobang insung chu achangseh a kelngoi nou khat kitha dinga mi alhom behseh a ahileh, hiche inneipa chuleh ainhengpa kihoutoh lhona amijat to kithuh bep’a kelngoi nou khatma akimat lhon ding ahi; mi khat cheh chun ava va anehsoh keiya, abonchauva kelngoi nou khat nekhop bep ding chu nangnin nasimtoh lhon ding ahi.
Kelngoi nou nakimat diu chu nolna bei hiya, kum khat lhingsa hi ding; chujongle akelngoi nou chu kelngoi hon lah a kon hihen lang kelcha hon lah a kon hijongleh athah beh a nakimat diu,
chule akelngoi nou chu hiche lha nisom le ni li lhin ni geiya nakihenuva, nilhah lam tengleh Israel Houbung pumpi khoppin ama ama kelngoi nou cheh chu thakhat tha akitha diu ahi.
Chule amahon athisan themkhat asodoh-uva, kelngoi nou sa anehna dingu in jousea chu akotpi khom teni leh ainkam chunga aloinat dingu ahi.
Hiche jan chuleh kelngoi nou tahsa chu meiya akihul minuva aneh diu, cholsolou changlhah le changkha do toh ame dingu ahi.
Nanghon sa chu ahalsi khat jeng cha jong asel a ahim, twiya kihon minsa ahim a naneh thei louhel diu, aluchang le akeng jouse pum, asungsa jouse puma meiya kihul min thoa bou naneh thei dingu ahiye.
Chutengle nanghon sahalsi themkhat jeng cha jong jingkah geiya nakoiden louhel diu, jingkah geiya anaumden tapou chu meiya nagovam jeng dingu ahi.

Naneh tengu jongleh hitobanga hi naneh dingu ahiye: Nakong nakigah soh keiyuva, nakeng phanguva kengchot nakichot soh kei diu, chule nakhut’uva jong tenggol nakichoi soh keiyuva, chutah le kelngoi nou sa chu kin le bonga naneh dingu ahiye. Hiche saneh chu Pakai kalchuh kut ahi.

Ajeh chu hiche jan chule keiman Egypt gamsung kahin jot pa ding, mihen hihen lang gancha hileh, Egypt gamsunga apeng masa jouse chu kasuhgam soh hel ding; Egypt gamsunga pathen lim kisemthuho chunga jong thu katan ding ahi; keima Pakai chu kahi.

Nangho dinga hiche thisan chu melchihna khat’a pang ding, nachenna in chung dung jouseuva thisan natsoh hela, keiman Egypt gamsung kasuhgam tengleh, hiche thisan chu kamudoh tih tih leh nangho chu kakalchuh ji jia, nangho sugam dinga nachunguva gamna hise hung lang lou ding ahiye.

“Hijeh a chu hiche nikho hi nangho dinga het jing ding nikho khat’a panga, nanghon jong Pakaiya kut bolna naman jing jeng diu ahi; hiche hi nakhang khanguva, atonsot tonsot geiya chonna dan khat’a um jing dinga nanit jing jeng dingu ahiye.

Ni sagi sunga nanghon cholsolou changlhah naneh diu ahin, ni masa nia chu na-insung dung jouseuva kona chol jouse napaidoh soh hel diu, koi tobang khat’in ni masa nia pat’a ni sagi lhin kah a chu cholsosa changlhah aneh khah tah a ahileh, hitobang mihem chu Israelte lah a kona suhmang jeng ding ahi.

Kut kipatna ni masa ni leh khoppi len atheng khat naboluva, ni sagi lhin ni jong leh khoppi len atheng khatma nabol dingu ahi; hiche nikho teni sunga chu natoh khat cha jong kitong thei louhel ding ahi; hi tin amitakip’in thonmoa aneh ding vang chu nabolpeh tei tei diu ahi.

Hita chu nanghon cholsolou changlhah kut hi naman jing dingu ahi, ijeh-inem itileh hiche nikho le lea hi keiman nangho nahon jamah-uva Egypt gama kona kahin puidoh nahiuve. Hijeh a chu nakhang khanguva, aitih chan gei hijeng jongleh nanghon hiche nikho hi chonna dan khat’a nanit jing diu ahi.
Lha masapen, chuche lha nisom le ni li lhin ni nilhah lam leh nanghon cholsolou changlhah chu naneh pat’uva, chuta chu nisom ni le nikhat lhin ni nilhah lam chan geiya naneh neh jeng diu ahi.

Ni sagi sungsea chu na-insung dunguva cholsosa changlhah kiholmo hel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh koi hileh cholsosa nekha tapou chu kholjin mi hihen lang agamsung cheng mi hijongleh, hi tobang mi chu Israel khoppi sunga kona suhmanga um jeng ding ahi.
Nanghon ipi pi hijongle cholsosa imacha naneh louhel diu, nachenna mun jouseuva cholsolou changlhah jengbou naneh cheh dingu ahiye,” a tin ahi.

Hiche phat chun Mose’n Israel upate chu abonchauvin akouvin chule ajah-uva aseitai,’ “Nangma nangma ding cheh le na-insung dungui cheh-uvin kelngoi nou ho chu kilhendoh uvin lang, chuteng kalchuh kut’a tha ding kelngoi nou chu kithauvin.

Hyssop lom khat lauvin lang, twibel sunga um thisan chu dekot’uvin, chutengle twibel sunga thisan chu kotpi khom teni leh kot chunga inkama chun loinat’uvin, chule jingkah masanga nangho koimacha jong ama kotpia kona napotdoh louhel dingu ahi.

Ajeh chu Egypt mite thana dinga Pakaiyin ahin jot pa ding ahi; chule aman kot chunga inkam le kotpi khom te nia thisan chu amuteng leh Pakaiyin kotpi chu kalchuh in tin, misumanga chu nangho that dinga na-insunguva alutsah lou ding ahi.
Hiche dan hi nanghon aitih chan geiya dia, nangho ding hihen nachateu ding hijongle chonna dan khat’a naman jing dingu ahi.
Chujongle Pakaiyin nangho peh dinga akitepna gamsung nahung lhun tengu jongleh nanghon hiche kin kibol hi nabol jing dingu ahi.
Chule nachateuvin nangho jah a,‘Hiche kin kibol hi ipi ding pen a kibol ham?’ tia nadoh tenguleh;

nanghon naseipehuva,‘Hiche hi Pakai kalchuh kut’a kilhaina gantha kibol ho chu ahiuve; ajeh chu Pakaiyin Egypt mite anatha gam pet chun Israel chate insung jouse anakalchuh-in, hiti chun eiho insung jouse abonchan anahoidoh tai,’ tia naseipeh dingu ahi,” ati. Chuphat’in mipi chu akuncheh-uvin Pakai chibai aboh cheh tauve.
Chutah chun Israel chate jong acheuvin thil agaboluvin, Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron athupeh tobang bang chun aboltauvin ahi.

Chuin jan khangkim laiyin Pakai chun Egypt gamsunga naosen peng masa jouse abonchan, Pharaoh chapa tah pen alaltouna toupa a kipat, sel-hong sung cheng sohchangpa cha apeng masapen gei ahin, chujongle gancha peng masa jouse geiyin asugam tan ahi.

Chutah in jan laipin Pharaoh ahin, asohte aboncha ahiuvin, chule Egypt mite abonchauvin athoudoh soh keiyuvin, Egypt gamsunga kagin o nasa tah-in akithongsoh heltai; ajeh chu mithi umlouna in khat’a khat cha jong aumtapoi.

Chuphat chun Pharaoh vin jan laipin Mose le Aaron chu akouvin aseitai, “Kipatdoh lhonin lang nangni jong Israel chate jong kamite lah a konin chedoh tauvin; hiti chun cheuvin lang nasei lhon bang bang chun Pakai kinbol ding chu gabol tauvin.
Nasei lhon bang bangin nakelngoi hon jouseu, nagancha hon jouseu kipuiyun lang, kitolmang jenguvin; achujongleh keima jeng jong hi phatthei neiboh lhon ding ahitai!” ati.

Chutah chun Egypt mite chu Israel mite dingin akisalel lheh jenguvin, agamsunga kona amaho soldoh loina ding angaito tauve; ijeh-inem itileh amahon aseiyuvin, “Keiho kabonchauva mithisa kahiu ahitai,” atiuvin ahiye.
Hijeh chun Israel miten achangbong neldi jouseu chu chol kiso masangin akihamdoh cheh-uvin, chujongle achangbong mehnau lhengkong ho chutoh ponvaiyin akijeluvin, alengkouva akiput cheh tauve.
Israel chaten, Mose’n amaho anaseipeh bang bang chun, aboluvin, hiti chun amahon Egypt mite kijepna thil dangka le sana chule ponsil aboncha anathumdoh sau ahitai;
chujongleh Pakaiyin Israel mite chu Egypt mite mitmun alung lhaipeh tan ahileh, amahon athum chanu chu Egypt miten jong anape pe jenguve. Hitobang hin Israel miten Egypt mite chu anachom gamtauve.
Chuin Israel chate chu Rameses khopia konin Succoth lama akitoluvin, numei chapang simlou helin, kenga lam jot cheh pasal jeng sang jagup alhinguve,
Chujongle amaho chu mitin mitang kihal choplop pi leh gancha tamtah toh, kelngoi hon tampi le gancha hon tampi toh akitou tol thauvin ahi.

Israel chaten Egypt gama kona ahinpoh doh-u changbong nelsil set cholsolou changlhah lhona kisemho chu akikan jiuvin ahi; ajeh chu Egypt gama kona kinodoh tho jeng ahijeh-uvin, kho ngai man louhela hungdoh ahiuvin, changlhah jong chu chol anaso man louvu ahi; chujongleh ama ama neh ding thil imacha jong anakigon man louvu ahiye.
Egypt gamsunga Israel chate anachen nau chu kum ja li le kum somthum analhinge.
Kum ja li le kum somthum kichai ni, hiche nikhole le chun Pakai sepai, Israel chate, chu Egypt gamsunga konin abonchauvin ahung potdoh tauve.

Israel chate Egypt gama kona ahinpuidoh ding jeh chun, hiche jan chu Pakai dinga janha khovah jan anahin; hijeh chun Israel chate jousen akhang khanguvin hiche jan hi Pakai dinga janha khovah jan ahi, tin anit jing jenguvin ahi.
Chuin Pakai chun Mose le Aaron jah a thu aseiyin, “Kalchuh kut kibolna chonna dan chu hiti ding ahi: Kalchuh kut an chu kholgam kon mi koimachan aneh thei louhel ding,
suma kichodohsa soh vang chun chep akitanpeh jou tengleh aneh thei ding ahinai.
Kholjin mi leh thalah soh-in jong kalchuh kut an chu aneh thei lou ding ahi.

Insung khat’a chu kalchuh kut an kine den ding ahin, hiche insunga kona chu asa hal them khat cha jong inpo lama kipodoh thei louhel ding ahi: chujongle nanghon agu hal khat jeng cha jong naheboh thei lou diu ahiye.
Israel khoppin abonchauva hiche anitsoh kei diu ahi.

Chule gamdang mi khattou nang to akholjin khom khah a Pakaiya kalchuh kut aman dinga ahileh, amapa chu ainsung mi pasal jouse achep kitansoh keiya, chujou teng leh kalchuh an chu anailut theiya aneh thei ding; hichepa chu agamsung mi tobang banga hi ding ahi. Cheptan loulai mihemin vang kalchuh kut an aneh thei louhel ding ahiye.
Agamsung mite dinga dankhat um ding, chule gamdang mi nangho to kholjin khompa dinga dan chom khatma um ding ahi,” ati.
Israel chaten abonchauvin hiti chun aboltauve; Pakaiyin Mose le Aaron athupeh tobang bang chun amahon aboluvin ahi.
Hiti hin Pakaiyin hiche  nikhole le chun Egypt gamsunga konin Israel chate chu ahon ahonuvin ahinpuidoh tan ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati,
“Naosen peng masa jouse chu aboncha keima henga thenso soh keiyin; Israel sunga um ipi hijeng jongleh naobu hintumkeh masapen pen chu mihem hihen lang gancha hijongle keiya ahiye.” ati.

Hichun Mose’n jong mipi jah a thu aseiyin, “Egypt gam kihenna ina kona nahung potdoh nau hiche nikho hi geldoh jingjeng uvin, ajeh chu Pakaiyin banjang thahat tah a hiche muna hi nahin puilut’u ahin, hijeh a chu cholsosa changlhah kine thei louhel ding ahi.
Hiche nikho, Abib kiti lha sunga hi nangho napotdoh diu ahi.

Chule Pakaiyin nangma peh dinga napu napate koma akihahselnasa Canaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Hivi mite chule Jebus mite gamsung, khoiju le bongnoi lonna gamsunga nangma nahin puilut tengleh, nangman hiche lha sungma ma hiche kin kibol hi nabol jing ding ahi.
Ni sagi sunga chu nangman cholsolou changlhah jeng naneh ding, ni sagi lhin ni leh Pakai henga kut khat kibol ding ahiye.
Ni sagi sunga chu min cholsolou changlhah jeng aneh ding, nangma jong cholsosa changlhah to naum khom thei louhel ding, nagamsung kimvel soh hela chu cholsosa changlhah to naumkhom thei lou ding ahi.

Chujongle hiche nikho chuleh nangman nachapa mong mong jah jenga jong naseipeh a hita nati ding,‘Egypt gamsunga kona kahungdoh pet’a Pakaiyin keima thil einabolpeh jeh a melchihna hiche hi kibol ahiye, nati ding ahi.

Chule hiche hi nakhut’a jong melchihna khat’a panga, namit teni kikah jenga jong hi hiche hi hetjing ding khat’a pang ding, hita chu Pakai danthu chu nakamsunga cheng jing jeng ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin bangol thahat tah a Egypt gama kona nahin puidohsa ahitai.
Hijeh a chu nangman kumseh kumsima hiche chonna dan hi aphat kitep peh phat phat’a nanit jing jeng ding ahi.
“Pakaiyin nangma le napu napateu henga akihahsela, nangma chu kapeh ding ahi, tia asei banga chu Canaan mite gamsunga nahin puilut tengleh.
nangman naobu hintumkeh masa chengse chu aboncha Pakai chan dinga atumbeh a nakhendoh ding ahi. Nagancha apeng masa achal jouse jong chu aboncha Pakaiya ahi.

Sangan nou apeng masa jouse chu kelngoi nouva nalhatdoh ding, ahilouva nalhatdoh lou leh sangan nou chu angong chang nahebohpeh cheh ding ahi. Nachapate jah a mihem peng masa jouse jong aboncha nalhatdoh soh kei ding ahiye.

Khonung phat hung lhun tenga nachapan nangma dohna aneiya,‘Hiche hi ipi ti na kibol ham,’ tia aseiya ahileh, nangin nachapa jah a chu,‘Pakai bangol thahat chun keiho Egypt gamsung, kihenna ina kona eihin puidoh nau thudol a kibol ahiye.

Ajeh iham itileh Pharaoh vin louchal tah a keiho chedoh sah ding aphal lou phat’in Pakaiyin Egypt gamsunga apeng masa jouse, mihem peng masa ahin, gancha peng masa ahin abonchan anathat gamtai. Hichejeh a chu keiman jong naobu hintumkeh masa achal jouse aboncha Pakai henga kilhaina kaneiji ahin, kachapate lah a cha peng masa jouse vang chu kalhatdoh ji ahi,’ tia nasei ding ahi.

Hiche hi nakhut’a jong, namit teni kikah nanah-lhong vuma jong melchihna khat’a pang jing ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin bangol thahat san a eiho Egypt gama kona eihin puidoh-u ahiye, tia naseipeh ding ahi,” ati.

Pharaoh chun Israel mipi asoldoh phat’in, Pathenin mipi chu anailamjo Philistine mite gam lang lampi langa chun apuipoi; ijeh-inem itileh Pathenin aseiyin, “Ahiti kibol louva ahileh Israel miten gal atokhah tenguleh alung akheluva Egypt gam lama hung kile kit jeng thei ahiuve,” ati.
Hijeh chun Pathenin Israel mipi chu twikhanglen san lam jotna gammang lang lampia chun apui velkoljo tai. Hiti chun Israel mite chu galmuna pang ding sademin Egypt gama konin akitol toutauve.

Mose’n Joseph gu le chang jouse chu akipoh tai; ajeh chu Joseph’in Israel chate chu anathi thulhah a hita anasei ahi, “Pathenin nangho nahung viltei tei diu ahin, nakitol tou tenguleh nanghon hikom muna kona keima gu le chang jouse napohdoh tei tei diu ahi,” tia anaseisa ahi.
Chuin Israel chate chu Succoth a konin akitoluvin, gammang chin laitah, Etham kiti laiya chun ngahmun asemtauve.

Chule sun tengle lampia Israel mipi puina dingin Pakai amatah mipi masanga meibang lom khat’in akitol jin, hita chu asun ajana lam ajot theina diuvin, jan teng jongleh mipi salvah dingin meikong lom khat’in akitol jin ahi;
hiti chun sun teng meibang lom khat kitola chuleh jan teng meikong lom khat kitol chu Israel mite masanga konin akichondoh tapon ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati;

“Israel chate chu akinung heiyuva Pihahiroth masanga Migdol leh twikhanglen san dung kikah, Baalzephon gala chu ngahmun asemna dinguvin seipeh temin; Baalzephon to kigalsai lai, twikhanglena chu nanghon ngahmun nasem diu ahi.
Ajeh chu Pharaoh vin Israel chate chung chang thudola hitia asei ding ahi,‘Amaho hi hiche gamsunga kinongden ahitave, gammang thimlai hin atintan den ahitai,’ tia asei ding ahi.

Chujongleh keiman Pharaoh lungthim kasuh tah ding ahin, hijeh a chu aman Israel mite hi anung ahindel ding, chutah le keimah Pharaoh leh asepaite jouse chunga loupina kamu lo ding ahiye; hita chu Egypt miten keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh diu ahi,” ati. Amahon jong hiti chun aboltauve.

Israel mipi abonchan ajamdoh tauve, ti thu Egypt lengpa aseipeh phat’uvin, Pharaoh leh asohte lunggel jouse Israel mite lam jengah alutjo tan, hijeh chun amahon aseitauve, “Eihon ipi bep ibolu hiya eiho kinbola pang napet Israelte chu imoh sol doh jengu hi tam?” akitiuvin ahi.
Chuti ahijeh chun Pharaoh vin asakol kangtalai akigon toh-in, asepaite akipuiyin,
hiti chun sakol kangtalai deilhen cheh jagup leh Egypt gamsunga kangtalai dang jouse toh achunguva vaibolte lhingset set’in atouvun akitol tauve.
Hitobang hin Pakaiyin Egypt lengpa Pharaoh lungthim asutah tan, hijeh chun aman jong thu ngai louhela chedoh Israel chate nung chu adeltai.

Egypt mite sakol touthem jouse leh Pharaoh sepaiten Pharaoh sakol jouse le akangtalai jouse amanguvin Israel chate chu ahin nungdel uvin, twikhanglen pang Baalzephon masanga Pihahiroth muna ngahmun anasem nauvah aphapa tauve.

Pharaoh chu ahung naitul tul phat’in Israel chate akhodah-uvin a vet’uva ahileh, vetan, anunguva chun Egypt mite ahung kitol tol jenguvin ahi; hichun Israel mite hatah-in akicha tauvin, hijeh chun Israel chate chu Pakai henga atao tauve;

chujongle amahon Mose jah a aseiyuvin, “Egypt gamsunga kivuina ding lhankhuh tampi umlou jeh a nangman keiho hi hikom gamthip noiya hi thigam sah dinga neipui mangu hinte ong? I-neilo monguva keiho hi Egypt gama kona neihin puidoh mong mongu ham?

‘Neidon dauvin lang, keihon Egypt mite kin bol nauvinge,’ tia hiche hi Egypt gama chu najah a kaseijiu hi lou ham? Ajeh chu keiho dinga hikoma gamthip noiya thigam sangin Egypt mite kin bolpeh ding chu gamchenga pha cheh jo ding anahi,” atiuve.

Hichun Mose’n mipi jah a aseiyin, “Kicha hihuvin, pang det’uvin, chule vetauvin tunia hi Pakaiyin nangho dinga nahinbolpeh diu huhhingna khu; ijeh-inem itileh tunia namuu Egypt mite khu nanung mukit louhel diu ahitai.
Nangho ding det pou pouvun, Pakaiyin nangho dinga gal asat ding ahinai,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Ipi dinga nangma kei henga hung tao tao nahim, Israel chate chu amachal theijoh na dinguvin seipeh jo tan.

Nangman jong natenggol chu lamsangin lang, chule twikhanglen chu achungvum jep jengin, twikhanglen chu jep khen tan, chutileh Israel chate chu twikhanglen lailunga jong chu tolgo lah a kijotdoh jeng thei ding ahiuve.

Keiman Egypt mite lungthim kasuhtah ding jeh chun, amahon Israel mite nunghinjui yuvin tin, chutah leh keiman Pharaoh chung le asepai jouse chung, akangtalai jouse chung leh asakol touthemte chunga loupina kakimudoh ding ahiye.
Chuta chu keiman Pharaoh leh akangtalai jouse chule asakol touthemte chunga loupina kachan tengleh Egypt miten keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi ahetdoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Hichun Pathen Vantil Israel mihonpi masanga chepa chu akikhindoh-in mipi nunga ahungjo tan ahi; chujongle mipi masanga kitolji meibang lom jong chu akikhindoh-in mipi nung lama adingjo tan,

Egypt sepaite leh Israel mihonpi kikah a chun ahung kitol lut tai. Chutah chun meibang lom chu ahung bolin ahileh mu athim pai jengtai; hiti chun khat’in jong khatjo nailut chomlouvin jan khovah helin aumuvin, kho avah pai paitan ahi.

Mose’n twikhanglen chungvum lam ngan akhut ajah-in ahileh, jan khovah helin Pakaiyin niso lam khohui hattah anunsah tan, twikhanglen twipi chu ale sem hoh-in, twikhanglen jeng jong chu tolgo asosah tan, twipi chu akihom khen hel jeng tai.
Chuphat’in Israel chate jong chu twikhanglen lailunga chun tolgo lah a akijot lut’uvin, twipi chu amaho dingin ajet aveiyuva pal bangin akisong jenge.

Chutah chun Egypt miten jong Pharaoh sakol jouse le akangtalai jouse, chule asakol touthem mijouse ahin manguvin, Israelte chu anung ahindelun, twikhanglen lailunga chun ahung kitol lut pai pai jenguve.
Chuin jingkah khovah phat chun Pakaiyin meikong lom lah a kon leh meibang lom lah a kon chun Egypt mite sepaiho chu ahinvesuh in, Egypt mite sepaiho abonchan asunoh phah tan,

akangtalai vel jouse aboncha atuh tang peh jenga ahileh, akangtalaiyu chu atolin atol but tahih heluve; chuti ahijeh chun Egypt miten aseiyin, “Israel masanga kon hin jam tau hite, ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin amaho hi apanpia Egypt mite douna gal asat ahitai,” akitiuve.

Chuphat chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Egypt mite chung le akangtalai jouseu chung chule asakol touthem teu chunga hi twi ahung nunglon khom kitna dingin twikhanglen chungvuma nakhutjah jeng tan,” ati.

Hijeh chun Mose’n jong twikhanglen chungvuma chun akhut agah jah doh-in ahileh, jingkah khovah vah chun twikhanglen alonna ngai ngaiya chun ahung lelon kit tai; hichun twilai lunga chun Egypt mite ajamlut’uvin, twikhanglen lailunga chun Pakaiyin Egypt mite athecheh soh keiyin ahi.

Hiti chun twipi chu ahung kiletol lut kit’in, Israel mite nungdela hung kitol Pharaoh sepai Jouse leh sakol touthem jouse chule kangtalaijouse abonchan achupsoh heltan, chujatpi lah a chun khat’a khat jengjong aumden aumtapoi.
Ahin Israel chate vang chu twikhanglen lailunga tolgo lah a akijot galkaiyuvin, twipi chu ajet le aveiyuva palin akisung den jengin ahiye.
Hiti chun Pakaiyin chuche nikhon Egypt mite khut’a konin Israelte ana huhhing tai; chule Israel ten jong twikhanglen panga Egypt mite thilong tamtah kijam chu amutauve.
Hitobang hin Israelten Egypt mite douna Pakai thilbol nasa tah chu amudoh tauvin, hijeh chun mipin Pakai chu agingtauve; chujongle mipin Pakai le alhachapa Mose jong atahsan tauve.

@@Chujouvin Mose le Israel chaten Pakai henga hiche la hi asauvin, athucheng hitin aseiyuvin, hitin atiuve: “Keiman Pakai henga la sange, Ijeh-inem itileh Aman loupi tah-in gal ajoutai; Sakol le achunga toupa chu, Pakaiyin twikhanglen lailunga asep lut tai.
Kei din Pakai chu kahatna le kala ahin, Chujongle Pakai chu kei din huhhingna asohdoh tai; Hiche hi ka-Pathen chu ahin, Keiman Ama kavahchoi ding; Kapa dia a-Pathen chu Keiman kachoiat ding ahi.
Pakai chu gal-hat mi ahin, Ama chu amin Pakai kiti hi ahiye.
“Pharaoh kangtalai jouse le asepaite, Pakaiyin twikhanglen lailunga aleh lut tai; Pharaoh deilhen avaibol jouse jong Twikhanglen san sunga alhalut tauve.
@Egypt mite chu twi kinongin achupsoh tan, Abonchauvin song tobangin twito lama alhalut tauve.
Vo Pakai, nakhut jetlam chu Nasa tah a thahat ahin, Vo Pakai, nakhut jetlam chun Melmate chu athechen son hel tai.
Nalal loupina nasa tah chun Nangma douva pangte chu naleh khup tai; Nalungsatna kongje jun nahinsol doh jin, Abonchauvin meiyin changpol akah bangin akavamtai.
Nangma nahhaiyin Twipi akidildoh chet chut jin, Twisohpi jong chu Alhuh lhuh-in akisong den tan ahi; Twikhanglen lailunga twithuh lai jong Abonchan adimchah densoh tan ahi.

Melmapa chun aseiyin, ‘Keiman anung kadela kaphah tet tei ding; Thil kichomdoh chu kakihop ding, Kathil deichat lhingset’a kakilah ding ahi; Keiman kachemjam satdoh ing ting, Abonchauva kasatgam ding ahiuve,’ ati.
Nangman nakhopihuiya nahin sem leh, Melmate twikhanglenin achupsoh tai; Amaho hahngeh tobangin Twipi hattan lah a chun alhalut gamtauve.
“Vo Pakai, pathen dang dang ho lah a hi Koiham Nangma to bang chu? Nangma tobang chu koiham, Thenna lalchanga; Loupi tah a tijat umtah tah thil bola, Thil kidang dang tamtah boldoh a chu?
Nangman nakhut jetlam na jahdoh a ahileh, Leiset’in melmate aval lhumgam tai.
“Nangman nalhatdohsa Israel mipi chu Lungset long louhelin nahin puiyin, Nangma chenna muntheng geiyin Israelte chu nathahat’in nahin lamkaiye.
Mitinin ajahdoh phat’uvin Akitihot lhul gamsoh tauve; Philistian gama chengten Anatlo soh heltauvin ahi.
Hichun Edom gamsunga haosa jouse alung thoiyuvin, Moab gama lamkai jouse akitihot hot tauve; Canaan gama cheng jouse Alung nguisoh tauvin ahi.

Achunguva kichatna le tijatna ahung lhungtai; Nangma ban-gol thahat natsat jeh chun, Abonchauvin song tobangin Thip beh chan aumsoh tauve; Vo Pakai, namiten ahinjotpa masangsen, Nangman nachohsa namiten ajotdoh kahsen!

Nangman namite chu hinpui lut’in natin, Nangma molsang chunga chu nachensah ding ahi; Vo Pakai, nangman hiche mun chu Nachen mun dinga nakisemsa ahitai’; Vo Pakai, muntheng jeng jong chu Nangman nakhut teni momg monga natundoh ahitai.
Pakai chu ton sot ton sot geiya Leng chang ding ahitai.” atiuve.

Ipijeh-inem itileh, Pharaoh sakol jouse chu akangtalai jouse pum, asakol touthem jouse puma twikhanglen lailunga akitol lutsoh phat’in, Pakaiyin achunguva twipi anung lonlut sah tai: Israel chate vang chu twikhanglen lailung jenga jong tolgo lah a anakijot galkai tauve.
Hichun Aaron sopinu, themgaonu Miriamin akhut’in khutbeh khat akilah tai; chuin numei jousen a manu nung ajuiyuvin, khutbeh kichoi pumin apotdoh uvin alamtauve.

@@Chutah chun Miriamin jong numeiho jah dingin la asan: “Pakai henga la sauvin, Ijeh-inem itileh Aman loupi tah-in gal asat joutai; Sakol le achunga toupa jong chu Pakaiyin twikhanglen lailunga aleh lut tai.” ati.

“Chujouvin Mose’n Israelte chu twikhanglen san a konin apui paipeh-in, hiti chun amaho jong akitoluvin Shur gammang noiya akitollut tauve; gammang noiya chun nithum sungin akitoluvin, ahin twi amudoh tapouvin ahi.
Marah mun ahung lhun phat’uvin Marah twi chu akhan ahileh Israelten adonthei tapouve: hichejeh chun hiche lai mun chu amin Marah akititai.
Chuphat’in mipi chu Mose chunga aphun uvin hi tin atiuve, “Ipiba kadon dingu hitam?” tin aseiyun ahi.

Hijeh chun Mose jong Pakai henga ataovin ahileh, Pakaiyin ama chu thingkang khat ahinvetsah tan ahi; chuin Mose’n jong thingkang chu alan twi lah a chu akholut’a ahileh, twi chu ahung tuiyin donthei ahitai. Hikoma chun Pakaiyin Israelte dingin chonna dan khat le chondan khat asemdoh peh-in, hiche laima ma chun amaho kholchilna aneiyin,

aseiye, “Nangman limgeh cha Pakai na-Pathen thusei nangai jing jenga, ama mitmua adih jeng nabola, chule athupeh jouse lung nuna naneiya, achondan jouse toh nanitsoh keiya ahileh, keiman Egypt mite chunga kalansah natna chengse chu khat’a khat cha jong nachunga kalansah louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh keima hi nangma damsahpa Pakai kitipa chu kahiye,” ati.
Chujouvin Israelte chu Elim kiti mun, twinah som le ni putdohna mun, tumthing phung som sagi ke-na muna chun ahung lhunguvin, hiti chun hikom muna chun twipang khat’a ngahmun asemtauve.

Elima konin akipatdoh-uvin, Israel chate chu khoppi pumpi abonchauvin Elim le Sinai kikah a um Sin kiti gammang noiya chun Egypt gamsunga kona ahung potdoh kal u lha ni lhinna, chuche lha ma ma nisom le ni nga lhin nin, ahung lhungtauve.
Gammang noiya chun Israel chate khoppi pumpi chu Mose le Aaron dounan aphunuvin,

hijeh chun Israel chaten amani jah a aseitauve, “O kadeh, Egypt gamsunga sabel phung dunga kanom tou uva, changlhah ka-oiva vauva kaneh laiyuva chu Pakai khut’a anakithidoh ngap hitau leng ong; ijeh-inem itileh nangnin hiche khoppilen pumpi hi aboncha gammang noiya gilkel thohsah a thagam dinga neihin puidoh bep’u ahitai,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin. “Neihin vetan, keiman nangho dinga vana kona changlhah gojuh a kahinjuh lhahsah ding ahi; chutengle mipi potdoh-uva anisim aniseh a chu nikhat neh kham bep bep akiloji ji diu hita hi keiman Israel mite hi keima danthu dungjuiya chon jing hiuvam chonlou hiuvam, kavet chil ding ahiuve.
Nigup lhin ni leh achanglhah lokhomsau ahinpoh lut’uva akigontoh tenguleh, niseh a analokhomjiu changlhah jat chu, ajat nia tamjo hi ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose le Aaronin jong Israel chate jouse jah a aseipeh lhonin, “Egypt gamsunga kona nangho nahin puidoh-uva chu Pakai ahiye, ti nanghon nilhah tengleh, nahetdoh dingu ahitai;
chule jingkah teng Pakai loupina namu dingu ahi; aman Pakai douna naphun nau chu ajadoh tan ahi. Ajeh chu keini hi ipi hiya neiboluva keini douna phun nahiuvam?” ati lhontai.

Chujongle Mose’n aseiyin, “Nilhah teng Paikaiyin nangho sa, neh ding nahin peh uva, chule jingkah teng changlhah oiva khamset napeh diu ahi; ajeh chu nangho ama douna naphunjiu, hiche naphun nau hi Phaiyin ajatai; keini chu ipi hiya neibolu ham? Naphunna jouseu chu keini douna hijo louvin Pakai douna ahijotan ahi,” ati.
Chuin Mose’n Aaron jah a aseiyin, “Israel chate khoppi pumpi jah a chun, “Pakai angsunga hung nailut’uvin, ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin nangho phunna jouse abonchan ajasoh keitai, tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Hita chu Aaronin jong Israel chate khoppi pumpi jah a thu aseipeh phat’in amahon gammang lam chu aveuvin ahileh, vetan, Pakai loupina chu meibang lom lah a ahung kilah tai.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati,

“Keiman Israel chate phunna jouse kajatai; ajah-uva seipeh-in lang hitin tipeh tan,‘Nilhah khomut chip chep le sa naneh uva, jingkah tengleh changlhah na oivaset’a naneh dingu ahi; chutah le keima hi Pakai na-Pathenu kahi nahetdoh dingu ahi,’ ati tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Nilhah lamin vamimte ahung kitol touvun ngahmun chu atomjol soh tauvin ahi; chule jingkah chun ngahmun kimvela twimei anabolin ahi.
Chuin twimei chu akihodoh soh phat’in vetan, gammang lah a chun thil ahoiya hoi khat aphal phalin, leichung dimset chun buhbang aphal phala hoitah a kigol bangin anaumin ahi.

Israel chaten hiche thil chu amudoh phat’uvin khat le khat akidong touvin, “Hiche khu ipiham?” akitiuve. Ijeh-inem itileh athil chu ipi ahi anahet louvu ahiye. Hijeh chun Mose’n ajah uva aseipeh-in, “Hiche hi Pakaiyin nangho neh dinga nahinpeh u changlhah chu ahi.

Pakai thupeh chu hiche hi ahiye:‘Hiche changlhah hi nangho amitakip’in aneh khop khop cheh din kilouvin, nangho amichang cheh a na-insung mijat dungjui uva, mikhat chan dinga changlhah, omer dim khat cheh nakilo diu ahi,’ tin aseiye,” atipeh-e.
Chuin Israel chaten hitin chun aboltauve; amaho a bang bangin avalin akilouvin, abang bangman akilo lhomuve.

Ahinla changlhah chu omer dim khat cheh a ategolsoh phat’uvin, atam lopan jong avalin akilah deh pon, lhomcha kilopan jong lhasam chomin akilah deh poi; amitakip chun aneh khop bep cheh din akilah uvin ahi.
Chujongle Mose’n amaho chu aseipeh in, “Mihem koimachan hiche changlhah hi ahalsi khat cha jong jingkah geiya nakhovah densah louhel diu ahi,” ati.

Ahivangin Israel miten Mose’n aseipeh chu angai pouvin, mi abang bangin changlhah akeh keh chu jingkah geiyin akhovah sah-uvin ahileh, changlhah hal chu than ahung chun, ahung uigamtan ahi; hijeh chun hiche miho chunga chun Mose alung hang tai.
Jingkah sim jingkah seh leh amitakip’in ama ama neh khop bep cheh din changlhah chu akilojiuvin ahi; nisa ahung sat-ham teng vangleh changlhah ajolmang jitan ahi.
Nigup lhin nile Israel chaten changlhah chu ajat chan jat nin omer dim ni akilojiuvin ahi; hiche abolu chu khoppi lamkaiho ahunguva Mose jah a ahung seipeh tenguleh,
