Mose’n jong amaho jah a anaseipeh jin, “Pakai thupeh chu hiche hi ahiye: ‘Jing nikho khu theng tah a kicholdona, Pakaiya cholngah nitheng ni ahiye; changlhah nakan ding chengseu kikan masah-uvin lang an nahon ding jouseu kihon masah uvin, ipi hileh avaldoh chengse vang chu ajing kit jingkah geiya dia khen ding ahitai,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Hijeh chun amahon Mose’n athulhah banguvin ajing jingkah geiyin akoiyuva ahijongleh changlhah chu uijong auipon, than jong ahung chupoi.
Chujongle Mose’n aseiyin, “Hiche changlhah hi tunin netauvin, ajeh chu tuni nikho hi Pakaiya cholngah nikho ahiye, tuni nikhoa changlhah hi tollhanga nakimudoh lou diu ahi.
Nigup sungsea chu changlhah nakilo diu ahin, ni sagi lhin ni vang chu cholngah nikho ahijeh a clhanglhah um lou ding ahiye,” ati.
Ahinla ni sagi lhin ni jeng jong chun mi phabep changlhah kilokhom dingin agapotdoh-uvin ahileh, khat a khat cha jong aga mupouve.
Chutah chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Nangho hi itih chan gei mong monga keima thupeh chengse le kadanthu ho nit ding nada da jing nah lai diu ham?

Veuvin, Pakaiyin nangho din cholngah nikho nasempeh-uvin, hijeh chun nigup lhin ni chun ni ni sunga neh ding changlhah jong nehkhop set napeuve; nangho amitakip ama ama chenna mun cheh a kium thimuvin lang, ni sagi lhin ni chuleh mihem koimacha achenna muna konin potdoh da jeng hen,” ati.
Hiti chun ni sagi lhin nin Israel mipi chu akicholdo tauve.
Israel insung miten changlhah chu amin Manna anasah tauve; manna chu pathikhom muchang tobang ahin, akang in chule atuidan chu changbong neldisel khoiju toh kimeh hal tuiyin atuiye.

Hichun Mose’n aseiyin, “Pakai thupeh chu hiche hi ahiye: ‘Nakhang khanguva um jing dingin Manna chu omer dim khat koidoh-uvin, chuti chu hileh nakhang khanguva miten, Egypt gamsunga kona nangho kahin puidoh pet’a, gammang noiya nangho kanavah nau changlhah chu amucheh thei diu ahi,’ ati, tin aseiye,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong Aaron jah a aseiyin, “Belcha khat kilah-in lang asunga chun Manna Omer dim khat khumin, Hiche chu nakhang khanguva umden jing jeng din Pakai angsunga gakoitan;” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang chun Aaron in jong mi jouse nit jing din belcha chu Hettohsah masanga chun agatungtai.

Hiti chun Israel chaten chenna thei gamsung ahinphah masang seuvin, kum somli sung chun Manna jeng ananeuvin ahi; hita chu Canaan gamgi ahinphah tokah seuva Israel chaten Manna jengbou ananeh neh jengu ahiye.
Omer dim khat chu Ephah khat hopsoma hop khat alhinge.

Israel chate khoppi pumpi chu abonchauvin Sin gammang noiya konin akitoluvin, Pakai thupeh dung juiyin aban ban in achaluvin, chuin Repnidim muna chun ngahmun anasemtauve; ahinla hikom achun mipi don ding twi anaumpoi.

Hichejeh Chun mipin Mose chu amosouvin aseiyui, “Kadon diu twi neipeuvin,” atiuve. Chuphat’in Mose’n jong amaho jah a aseiyin, “Ipi dinga nanghon keima neimosou ham? Ibola jong Pakai chu patep ding nagot jengu ham?” atileh;

mipi chula twi duchatnan adang chah behseh jenguvin, hijeh chun mipi chu Mose dounan aphun phun jenguvin aseita uve, Ipi dinga nangman keiho le kachateu chule kaganchau dangchah a thigam sah dinga Egypt gama kona neina puidoh mong mongu ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Hiche phat chun Mose jong Pakai henga ataovin, “Hiche mite hi ikalo ding hitam, Keima hi songa sep lih jeng dinga akigosa demsa tobang bang ahitauve,” atileh;
Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseipeh-in, “Israel mi upa phabep kipuiyin lang nangma mipi masanga chun chen; chuteng leh Egypt vadung najepna tenggol chu nakhut a kichoiyin lang chen.

Neihin vetan; Horeb molsanga songpi chunga chu keima nangma masanga kadin ding a hiye; hiche chuleh nangman songpi chu najep ding, chule songpia kona chu twi hung longdoh ding, hita chu mipin twi chu adon thei diu ahi,” ati. Hijeh chun Mose’n jong Israel mi upa ho mitmu chang tah chun hiti chun aboltai.

Mose’n hiche lai mun chu amin Massah jong Meribah jong asah tai; Ijeh-inem itileh Israel chaten Mose chu amosouva chule Pakai jeng jong apatep uva hita hi, “Eiho lah a hi Pakai um mong hinam umlou ham?” tia anasei jeh-u ahiye.
Chujouvin Amalek kitipa chu ahung konin Rephidim muna chun Israelte galin ahungsat tai.

Hichun Mose’n jong Joshua jah a aseiyin, “Nangin jong eiho galsat ding mi lhengdoh-in lang, chule chen lang Amalek kitipa khutoh gakisat tan; jing tenglet keiman kakhut tah-in Pathen tenggol hinchoi ying ting lhangvuma khun hung pang nange,” ati.
Mose’n ahil tobang bang chun Joshua’n jong abolin, hiti chun Amalek to akisat tai; chuphat’in Mose le Aaron chule Hur jong chu lhanguvum lama akaltou tauve.
Hikoma chun Mose’n a’khut adopsang laisen Israel ahatjo jin, Mose’n akhut alhahsuh sah phat phat leh Amalek ahatjo jitai.

Hichun Mose jong abantha angoi tan ahileh, amiten song-khat atol lut uvin, Mose touna din adopeh-uvin, achunga chun Mose atoutai; chuin Aaron le Hur chu aban lang khat cheh a apang lhonin akhut teni adopsang peh lhona ahileh, hiche phat chun akhut teni chu nisa lhum geiyin jong det tah-in apang det jing theitai.
Hichetah chun Joshua’n Amalek le amite chu chemjam hemin asuh bantan tan jengin ahi.

Chuin Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Hiche gal kisat thu hi hetjing jeng din lekhabu sung khat a sunin lang, chule hiche lekha chu Joshua nabeng te nia avelin velsim peh kit’in, hitobanga hi keiman vannoiya kona Amalek kihet jingna chu pum noiya kanoi mang hel ding ahiye,” ati.
Hichun Mose’n maicham khat asemin, hiche maicham chu amin “Pakai chu kaponlap ahi,” tin asah-in ahi;
Ijeh-inem itileh aman aseiyin, “Pakai laltouna chunga pang khut chun gal asat ahibouve, Amalek douna Pakaiyin akhang khanga gal abol ding ahi,” tin aseitai.

Hiche lai chun midian thempupa, Mose nupa pa Jethron jong Pathenin Mose le amite Israel chate dinga thil abolpeh umchan thudol leh itobang tah a Pakaiyin Egypt gama kona Israel ahinpuidoh hitam, ti thusim abonchan ajasoh tan ahi.
Hichun Mose nupa pa Jethron jong Mose’n asolmangsa ajinu Zipporah chu apuiyin,
amanu chapa teni khatpa Mose’n “Migam sunga khopem kahi,” tina a amin Gershom asahpa leh,
khatpa joh, “Kapa dia a Pathen chu keima eikithopia Pharaoh chemjama kona eihuhdoh pa ahi,” tia amin Eliezer asahpa ahinpuiyin ahi.
Chuin Mose nupa pa Jethro chu Mose chapa teni leh ajinu chutoh kilhonin Pathen molsang gammang noiya Mose’n ngahmun anasemna a chun Mose henga ahungtai.
Hichun Jethron Mose jah a aseiyin, “Nanupa pa Jethro keiman najinu le achapa teni kahin puiyin nahenga kahunge,” atileh;

chuphat’in Mose jong anupa pa kimuto pi din apotdoh paiyin, jatah-in agabolin anupa pa chu abeng choptan ahi; chujouvin amani aumchan lhon, adam adamlou thu akidongto gel lhonin, ponbuh sunga akijot lut tauve.

Hichun Mose’n jong anupa pa chu, Israel khohsah jala Pakaiyin Pharaoh le Egypt mite abolna jouse aseipeh-in, chule lampi dunga amaho chunga hung lhung hahsatna jouse a bonchan aseipeh-in, itobang tah a Pakaiyin hichenga kona chu amaho ahin huhdoh hitam, ti thu aseipeh soh keitai.
Chuphat’in Pakaiyin Israel dinga thilpha chujatpi aboldoh peh a, chujongle Israelte abonchauva Egypt mite khut’a kona ahinhuhdoh jeh chun Jethro akipah lheh jengin ahi.
Hichun Jethron jong aseitai, “Egypt mite khut’a kon leh Pharaoh khut’a kona nangho nahin huhdoh-uva Pakai chu nunnom hen.

Tuvangin keiman kahetai, Pakai hi pathen dang jouse sanga lenjo ahiye: ijeh-inem itileh a man Israelte chu Egypt miten noise tah a abol lai tah-uvin, Egypt mite bangol thahat noiya konin anahuhdoh tai,’ ati.

Hijeh chun Mose nupa pa Jethron Pathen henga pumgo thilto leh kilhaina gantha tampi atohdoh tai; hichea chun Aaron le Israel mi upa ho tamtah jong Pathen angsunga Mose nupa pa Jethro toh changlhah nekhom dingin ahunguvin ahi.
Ajing nikhon mipi thutan dingin Mose atouvin ahileh, Mose kim vela chun mipi jingkah a kipat nilhah geiyin ading nilhum keiyuve.

Mose nupa pan mipi dinga Mose thilbol chu aboncha amusoh phat’in aseitai, “Ipi dinga mipi dinga hita hi thil nabol ham? Idinga nangma nachangseh a natouva nakimvela chu jingkah a pat nilhah geiya mipi nadinsah sah jeng ham?” atileh;
Mose’n jong anupa pa jah a aseiyin, “Hiche vang hi itileh mipi hi Pathen lamdol kholtoh dinga hung hiuva hi;

amaho hin kinahna anei tenguleh keima henga hung jiuva, chutengle keiman mikhat le aheng ukom kah a thu katanpeh jia, hita chu Pathen chonna danthu ho leh Pathen phatsah ho chu mipi hi kahetsah ji ji ahibove,” ati.
Hichun Mose nupa pan ajah a aseiyin, “Nathilbol hi aphapoi.
Nang jong mipi jong nabonuva nachol lih gam diu ahi, ijeh-inem itileh nathilbol hi nang dingin ahahsa behseh jenge; nangman nachangseh a natoh molso jou ding dol ahinai saipon ahi.

Hijeh chun tun keima kamcheng ngaiyin; keiman nangma lungthim giltah nahil ing ting, chule Pathenin jong nangma naumpi jing hen! Nangma mipi thalhenga Pathen angsunga nadin ding, chule akithunoh nau chu aboncha Pathen henga nahinpoh lut peh ding ahi;
chujongle nangman mipi chu Pathen chonna danho leh aphatsah ho chu nahilji jia, chule ajuitei tei diu lampi chu nahetsah a, aboltei tei diu thil chu naseipeh ding ahiye.

Hiche kalvala jong chu nangman mipi lah a kona thilbol thei cheh mi, Pathen ging mi, nehguh kilah louhela tahsan theidol mihem nalhendoh ding, hitobang mihem ho chu mipi sang khat cheng, jakhat cheng, som nga cheng chule som khat cheng chunga vaihoma napansah ding ahi.

Hiti chun amaho chu phat jousen mipi thu tansah sah jengin lang, thu len behseh ho chu amahon nang henga ahinpoh lut’uva, thuneo neo chu amahon jong achama achai chai jeng theiyu ahi; chutileh nangma dinga hung baidom ding, chuta chu amahon nangma pohgih chu napoh hu thei diu ahi.
Nangman hiti hin bol le chun Pathenin nangma thu napeh teng jongleh nadou jou ding, mipi hicheng jong hin lung mong tah a a in lam akijot jeng jeng thei diu ahiye,” ati.
Mose’n jong anupa pa kamcheng thu chu angaiyin, aman aseipeh chu abonchan abolsoh keitai.

Hiti chun Mose’n Israel pumpi lah a konin mihem thilbol thei cheh alhengdoh-in, amaho chu mipi chunga lamkaiya pang ding leh mihem sang khat cheng, jakhat cheng, som nga cheng chule som khat cheng chunga vaihom dingin apansah tan ahi.
Hiche miho chun phatseh leh mipi thu a tan a tan jiuvin ahi; thu hahsa behseh ho chu Mose henga ahinlhut jiuvin, thuneo dom jouse vang chu amahon achamin achai thu thujeng tauve.
Hiche nung chun Mose’n anupa pa asoltan, amapan jong alampi ma ma ahopeh-in agamsung lama achetai.
Egypt gamsunga kona Israel chate ahung potdoh nungu lha thumvei athah ni, hiche nikho tah chun Israel chate Sinai gamthip noi ahung lhung tauve.
Hita amaho Rephidim muna kona ahung kipatdoh-uva Sinai gamthip ahung lhun lhuguvin, gamthip noiya chun ngahmun asempai paitauve; hikoma chun Israelten molsang mai laitah a ngahmun anasemuve.
Chuin Mose jong Pathen henga achetouvin ahileh, mol sanga kon chun Pakaiyin ama ahinkouvin aseiye, “Nangman Jacob insung mite jah a hita hi naseiya chule Israel chate jah a hita hi naseipeh ding ahi;
keimam Egypt mite ikaloa chule itobang tah a muvanlaite lhavinga nangho kahinpoh uva keima henga kahinpoh lut nahiuvam, ti nanghon namusau ahitai.
Hijeh a chu tua nanghon kathu na-ngaiyuva chule kakitepna nanit jinguleh, mitin namtin lah a kona nangho hi keima mite mong mong nahi diu ahi; ijeh inem itileh leiset pumpi hi keima a ahin,
nangho keima dinga thempute lenggam khat, nam theng khat nahung hidoh diu ahi. Israel chate henga nagasei ding thu chu hicheng hi ahiye,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose jong ahungin Israel mite upa ho chu akoukhomin, chuin amaho angsunga chun Pakaiyin athupeh thucheng jouse chu abonchan ahiltai.

Hichun mipin abonchauvin thakhat tahin adonbut’uvin aseitauve, “Pakaiyin aseidoh chan chu keihon kaboltei tei diu ahi,” atiuve. Hiche phat chun Mose’n jong mipi thusei chengse chu abonchan Pakai henga agalhut tan ahi.

Chuin Pakai chun Mose jah a ahinseitai, “Vetan, keima nangma henga meibang lhang satah khat in kahung kitole, hita chu nangto ikihoulim tengleh mipin jong ajah diu, chutengleh nangma jeng jong aitih chan geiya dinga natahsan thei jeng diu ahiye,” ati. Hichun Mose’n jong mipi thusei chu abonchan Pakai koma aseitai.
Chuin Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Mipi henga chun gachen lang amaho chu tunin jong jing teng jongleh anasutheng tan, chule amaho chu avon jouse anakisop theng sah soh keiyin,
nithum lhin nia din kigonsan anaum sah tan; ijeh inem itileh nithum lhin nileh Pakai chu Sinai molsang chunga mipi jouse mitmua hung kumsuh ding ahi.

Hintin nangman mipi chu akimvel’uva pal nakaipeh a chule hita naseipeh ding, ‘Molsang chunga nakaltou louna diu leh amolchin dung jeng jong natham khah louna dinguvin kichih theiyuvin; koi hijongleh molsang tongkha chan chu thi tei tei ding ahi;

hichepa chu koiman khut’a athamtho louhel ding, song ham khat’a selih ding, ahiloule thal a kaplih jeng ding ahi; gancha hihen lang mihem hijongleh, hitobang ganhing chu kihinghoi louhel ding ahi,’ tin seipeh in. Sumkon ging lhung jen juna ahung kimut tengleh mipi chun molsanglam ahinjot tou diu ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose’n jong molsanga kon chun mipi heng lam ahinjon suh pai paiyin, mipi chu athenson, chule amahon jong avon jouseu akisop theng tauve.
Chuin Mose’n mipi jah a chun aseiyin, “Nithum lhin ni leh kigosademin umuvin lang, numei angsunga jong lut hih heluvin,” ati.

Nithum lhin nijingkah-in van agingin, kol aphen, molsang chung chu meibang lhang satah-in ahintom tan, hichun sumkon gin thongje jun ahung kimut’in ahileh, ngahmun sunga um mipi chu abonchauvin akihot lhul gamtauve.
Hitah chun Mose’n jong Pathento kimuto dingin mipi chu ngahmuna konin ahinpuidoh pai paitai; apuidoh mipi chu molsang bula chun ading tauve.

Sinai molsang chunga chu Pakai meikong lah a ahung kumlhah jeh-in, amolsang chu meikhun atomjolsel tan ahi; hiti chun ameikhu chu thuh sunga hung khudoh meikhu bangin akitungdoh jen jun jengin, chujongleh, amolsang pumpi chu nasa tah-in lingin ahot tai.
Sumkon gin chu ahagin cheh cheh phat’in Mose’n jong thu agahseiya ahileh, van gin kithong lah a kon chun Pathenin ahindonbut tai.
Chutah chun Sinai molsang chung, molsang chungvum laitah a chun Pakai ahung kumlha tai; hiche molsang chungvuma kona chu Pakaiyin Mose ahinkouva ahileh, Mose jong akaltou pai paitan ahi.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Kumsuh loiyin lang mipi khu gagihsal loiyin, achutiloule Pakai avetnom jeh-uva pal khu ahintumkeh jeng diu, hijeh a chu mi tamtah-in amanthah lo diu ahi.
Chule Pakai lam hin nailut’a thempuho jong khu atahsa tah-uvin kithenso sah-in, achutilouleh Pakaiyin amaho lam jona pal atumkeh jeng ding ahi,” ati.

Hichun Mose’n jong Pakai jah a aseiyin, “Hiche mipi khu Sinai molsanga hung kaltou thei louhel ding ahiuve; ijeh-inem itileh nangma mong mongin neithu lhah-uva hita naseisa ahi, ‘Molsang kimvela khun pal kaiyuvin lang chutengle apal chu thensouvin,’ tia nasei ahi,” ati.

Chuphat in Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseitai, “Kumsuh-in lang chule Aaron khu hin kipuiyin hung kaltou tan; hintin thempuho leh mipi vang khu Pakai henga hung kaltou dinga pal nahin tumkeh sah louhel ding ahi, achutiloule Pakaiyin amaho lam ajot’a adou dinga pal atumkeh jeng thei ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose jong mipi henga chun akumsuh-in hiti chun amaho jah a agaseipeh tai.
Pathenin thucheng hijat hi abonchan aseisoh keiyin hitin ati,
“Egypt gamsung kihenna ina kona nangma hinpuidoh pa Pakai na-Pathen chu keima hi kahi.
“Keima tailou nangman pathen dang nanei lou ding ahi.
“Chung vana um hihen lang, hinoi leiset chunga um hijongleh, leiset noilam twi lah a um hijongleh, thilsem kitipoupou thil limto kilo, milimdoi kilhajol nangma dinga nakisem louhel ding ahi;

hitobang milimdoi koma chu nakun louhel ding, akinbola jong napan lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai na-Pathen keima hi Pathen thangtom tah kahin, keima eihot boljia mipate themmona chu akhang thum akhang li chan geiya jong achateu chunga kaphul jing jeng ahiye;
keima eingailua, keima thupeh chengse nitsoh mite asang sang chunga hi lungsetna longlouva kaneijoh ding ahi.
“Nangman Pakai na-Pathen min chu moh mai maiya napat lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin ama min moh mai maiya panpa chu them achansah louhel ding ahi.
“Cholngah nikho chu athenga nanit dingin geldoh jing jengin.
Nigup sunga nangman na natoh a, natoh ding aboncha nakitoh ding ahi;

ni sagi lhin ni vang chu Pakai na-Pathen dinga cholngah nikho ahin, hiche nikhoa chu nangman, natoh kiti khat cha jong natoh louhel ding ahi; nangma nahin, nachapa ahin, nachanu ahin, nasohpa ahin, nasohnu ahin, nagancha ahin, nakelkot chengse kallhah asunga lutsa kholjin mi ahin, na natoh thei lou diu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh nigup sungin Pakaiyin van le leiset, twikhanglen le asunga cheng jouse anasemin, ni sagi lhin nin akichol do tai; hichejeh a chu Pakaiyin cholngah nikho hi phatthei anaboh a chule anathensosa ahitai.
“Pakai na-Pathenin nangma napehna leichunga hi nahinkho asot theina dingin nanu le napa jabolin.
“Tol natha lou ding ahi.
“Mitoh najon lou ding ahi.
“Naguh chat lou ding ahi.
“Naheng nakom douna jouthua hettohsah a napan lou ding ahi.

“Naheng nakompa in nadei chat lou ding; naheng nakompa jinu hihen, asohpa hihen, asohnu hihen, abongchal hihen, asangan hihen, ipi pi hijengjongleh naheng nakompa thil kitipou pou chu nadei chat louhel ding ahi,” ati.

Israel mipin van gin thongje ju chu ajah-uva, kol phelap lap amu uva, sumkon gin kithong ajah-uva, molsanga meikhu chu amu phat’uvin akichasoh heluvin, akitihot lhul gamtauve; chujongle amaho chu gamla thimtah a ading den tauvin ahi;

chuin mipi chun Mose jah a aseiyuvin, “Thu sei ding chan chu nangman keiho jah a sei jengin, keihon nasei ngai nau vinge; keiho henga Pathen chu thu seisah hih helin, aseile kamoh thigam lo jeng diu ahi,” atiuve.
Chuphat’in Mose’n jong mipi jah a chun aseiyin, “Kicha hihuvin, namaiyuva Pathen ginna naneiyuva nachonset theilou na dinguva, nangho phutdet dinga Pathen hung ahibouve,” ati.
Hiti chun Pathen umna muthim lhangkhal kiheh chei choi lah a Mose achelut pet chun mipi chu gamla tah a ading den tauvin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Nangman Israel chate jah a hita nasei ding ahi, ‘Keiman vana konin nangho toh kihoulimna kaneitai, ti nangho mong mongin namu tauve.
Kei koma nanghon dangka a kisem pathen chom chom nasem lou diu, nangho ding mong monga jong sana a kisem pathen chom chom nasem lou dingu ahi.

Keima dinga nangman leiset’a kisem maicham khat nasema, hiche maicham chunga chu napumgo thilto jouse jong, nachamna thilto jouse jong, kelngoi thilto nato ding chengse jong chule bongchal thilto nato ding chengse jong nahin todoh ding, hoilai mun hijongleh keiman kamin kigeldohna dinga kalhenna mun jousea chu keima nahenga kahunga phatthei kaboh ding nahi.

Nangman songa kisem maicham neisempeh dinga ahileh, hiche song maicham chu song kijempol ho namana neisempeh lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh asong chung chu nakhut themna manchah a najih teng nasuh thanglo ding ahi.
Chujongle keima maicham chunga kalbi kikhaptou chit chet’a jong nakaltouva najamo agoh keova nakitah lang sah lou ding ahi,’ ati tin.
“Nangman Israel mipi maiya chonna dan hicheng hi naphudoh ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Hebrew mi soh a vul dia nachoh a ahileh, aman kumgup sunga sohna atoh ding, kum sagi alhin teng vangleh imacha bat neilouva sohpa chu achamlhat dinga chedoh jeng ding ahi.
Sohpa chu achangseh a soh a hung lut ahileh, achangseh a potdoh ding; ji neisa hung lut ahileh, ajinu jong amatoh kilhondoh jeng ding ahi.
Sohpa chu apupan ji apuipeh ahiya, chule ajinu chun chapa phabep chanu phabep anahinpeh sa ahivang leh, sohpa jinu le achate chu apupa chang ding, chuteng sohpa chu achangseh a chedoh ding ahiye.
Amavang sohpa chun kichen tah a aseiya, ‘Keiman kapu le kajinu chule kachate kalungset bouve, chamlhat dingin chedoh ponge,’ atileh,

hitobang sohpa chu apun Pathen henga ahinpuiya, asohpa chu kotphung gei hihen kotkhom phung gei hijongleh ahinpui lut ding ahi; chutengle apupan asohpa chu thihtul khat’a abilkol avuvangpeh ding, chuphat leh asohpan ahinkho lhum keiya apupa kin chu abolpeh ding ahitai.
“Pasal khat touvin achanu soh a akijoh doh tengleh, amanu chu soh pasal ho chedoh tobanga chedoh lou ding ahi.

Sohnu chun apupa, ama soh ding mong monga kisempa chu, alung lhaisah jou louva ahileh, apupan midang akilhatdoh sah ding ahin, apupan asohnu chu kitah loutah a anabol jeh a chu, asohnu chu gamchom mite henga joh dohna ding tha anei louhel ding ahiye.
Ijem tia sohnu chu achapa sohnua pang dinga anasem ahijongleh, sohnu chu achanu khat tobang banga abol ding ahi.
Achapa chun ama ding mong monga jichom khat akipui tah a ahijongleh, sohnu chu aan neh, aponsil, ajinei theina thaneina jouse asuhmang peh louhel ding ahi.
Asohnu dinga thil hicheng thum abolpeh louva ahivang leh, asohnun sum pelou hela jong imacha bat neilouva chedoh jeng ding ahi.
“Koi hijongleh mihem khat adena amidenpa chun thina anei tah leh, ama jong tha tei tei ding ahi.

Amavang midengpa chun adenpa chu anachan lhih louhel ahiya, Pathenin ama khut luma alousah ahivang leh, keiman nangma dinga mun lhendohsa kakoi ding ahin, hiche lai muna chu mideng lihpa chu jamlut thei ding ahi.

Ahintin mihem khat chun agolpa khat chu lung tupna nei mong monga adelkhum jenga, chule jouthua amapa chu atha tah a ahileh, nangman mithatpa chu tha dinga keima maicham phunga kona nakaidoh ding ahi.
“Koi hijongleh apa ham anu ham denga chu tha tei tei ding ahiye.
“Koi hijongleh mihem kiguh chan chu, amiguhpa chu ajoh dohsa hihen lang, ama koma ana umpet’a amatoh kimudoh tha hijongleh, mihem gudoh pachu tha tei tei ding ahi.
“Koi hijongleh apa ham anu ham gaosap chan chu tha tei tei ding ahi.
“Chule pasal le pasal akinah a, khatpa chun agolpa chu songtum ham khat’a asuh ham, akhut tuma achup ham, amisuh khah pa chu thi vang thipai louva, alhuh jenga akital hel jenga,

ahivanga alhupa chu ahung thodoh theiya tenggol kiphua avale le thei nah leh, ama anasukha pa chu achung kisutheng jeng thei ding ahi; amavang anat sunga aphat mansah man chubou apeh a, chule anatna chu aboldam thengsel ding ahiye.
“Mihem khattouvin asohpa ham asohnu ham mola adena, asoh chu ama khut luma athiden tah leh, midengpa chu talen kimatsah ding ahi.
Amavang soh kideng chu nikhat ni nisunga ahindoh nah a ahileh, soh dengpa chu talen kimatsah ponte; ijeh-inem itileh soh chu ama sum man ahibouve.

“Pasal le pasal kinokhum tonaa numei gaipet asukhah lhona, hijeh a chu anaovop chu athol lhah jenga, anung natna ima aum hih a ahivangleh, numeinu sukhapa chu achunga amanu jipan adel jat jat’a leosah jeng ding ahi; ahivanga thutanho phatsah dungjuiya bou apeh ding ahiye.
Ijem tia anung anatset’a ahivang leh, nangman hinkho khela hinkho napeh a,
mit khela mit, ha khela ha, khut khela khut, kengphang khela kengphang napeh a,
meikah jeh a meiya nahal ding, kimavo jeh a namavoa, kijep khah jeh a najep jeng ding ahi.
“Mihem khattouvin asohpa ham asohnu ham mit avoh khah peh a, asuhmang jeng tah leh, amit jeh a soh chu aman chamlhat dinga asoldoh jeng ding ahi.
Soh vulpan asohpa ham asohnu ham aha asuh lhoh peh a ahijongleh, aha lhoh jeh a soh chu amapan chamlhat dinga asoldoh jeng ding ahiye.

“Bongchal khattouvin pasal ham numei ham khat akia apih lih teng, bongchal chu songa selih jeng ding ahin, bongsa vang chu koiman aneh thei lou ding ahi; hichea chu bong neipa chu achung thengdoh ding ahiye.

Amavang abongchal chu masanga jong mihem anapih jingsa ahiya, hijeh a chu aneipa kihil chahsa ahitah a, aneipan ngaisah a anei da a, hijeh a chu bongchal chun pasal ham numei ham khat atha ahileh, bongchal jong songa selih ding chule aneipa jong tha tei tei ding ahiye.
Amapa chu long lhatna ding akisempeh a ahileh, akipohsah jat jat chu aman jong ahinkho lhatdohna dinga apeh tei ding ahiye.
Bongchal chun mi cha pasal khat ham numei khat ham ahinpih khat tah a ahijongleh, aneipa chu hiche dan kisem dungjuiya hi kibol ding ahi.
Bongchal chun soh pasal ham soh numei ham khat apih khah tah a ahileh, bong neipan soh neipa chu dangka shekel somthum apeh a, chule abongchal chu songa kisep lih ding ahi.
“Mihem khattouvin khuh sin louva adalhah ham, ahiloule mihem khattou man khuh alaiya sin louva akoijeh ham khat’a bongchal hihen sangan hijongleh khuh sunga chu alhah lut tah a ahileh,
khuh neipa chun aphat phat’a asem phat ding, gancha neipa chu sum apeh a, agancha pohlihsa chu ama chang ding ahiye.

“Mikhattou bongchal chun michom khat bongchal khatma asuh khah a, asuh khah bongchal chu athi jeng tah leh, bong nei te nin bongchal ahing nalai chu ajoh lhona aman kihom lhon ding, chule bongchal thisa jong chu asa kihom lhon ding ahiye.

Ijem tia bongchal chu masanga jong gancha pih jingsa ahi, ti akihetdoh a chule aneipa jong chu kihil chahsa ahiya, aman ngaisah a aneilou ahileh, aneipan bongchal thisa chu bongchal ma ma asah ding, chule bongchal thisa chu ama chang ding ahiye.

Mihem khattouvin bongchal khat ham, ahiloule kelngoi khat ham aguh a, chule athilguh chu akitha ham ahiloule akijohdoh ham ahileh, bongchal khat man dinga bongchal nga apeh ding, chule kelngoi khat man dinga kelngoi li apeh ding ahi.
“Khuh kilai sung khattouva gucha alhah lut khah a ama chu athisa akimudoh a ahileh, ama chung changa thisan jala themmona umlou ding ahi;

Ijem tia ama thilong chu nisan ahinso den tah a ahivang leh achung changa thisan jala themmona um ding ahitai; suh chama semphat tei tei ding ahi. Ama chu imacha neilou mi ahivang leh aguh chatnaa joh manga umah ahitai.
Guchapa khut’a chu gancha kigumang pen pen chu bongchal hihen lang sangan hijongleh, kelngoi hijongleh, ahinga akimudoh a ahileh, guchapan aman ajatja jat nia adit ding ahiye.

“Mihem khattouvin loulai ham, lengpi leilai ham khat gancha anehsah a, ahilou jongleh agancha alha thanga michom dang loulai aneh khah tah a ahileh, aman alousoh phapen leh alengpi leilai mong monga kona aphapen tah a asah ding ahi.

“Ijem tia mei ahung kah a ling le khao lah ahinkah jenga, chuta chu changkong lom lah le changkong atlhuh loulai, chule loulai akahvam hel jeng tah a ahileh, meihal pen pen chun akahvam chengse chu alhing keiya asah ding ahi.

“Mihem khattouvin aheng akom koisah dinga sum ham thilkeo ham apeh a, chule athil chu athil koipa insunga kona chu min aguh mang tah a, guchapa chu akimatdoh a ahileh athilguh chu ajatja jat nia asah ding ahi.
Guchapa chu akimatdoh louva ahivang leh ain neipa chu, aheng akompa thil chu alah ham alah lou ham, ti phot chetna dinga Pathen koma kipui lut jeng ding ahi.

“Ijeh-inem itileh kitahsan lelna chung chang thupou pouva chu, bongchal thu hihen, sangan thu hihen, kelngoi thu hihen, ponsil thu hihen, ahilou jongleh thil kimansah thu pou pouva chu mi khattouvin, ‘Hiche hi kathil ahi,’ atina chung changa chu athu nei teni anigel lhona athu lhon chu Pathen angsunga hung lut tei ding ahi; koijoh hijongleh Pathenin athemmo sah pa chun aheng akompa thil chu ajatja jat nia sah ding ahiye.

“Mihem khattouvin aheng akom koisah dinga sangan ham, bongchal ham, kelngoi ham, ahiloule gancha kiti pou pou khat apeh a, koimacha muphah louva agancha chu athi ham, akisukha ham, ahiloule akidelmang peh ham ahileh,

agancha koipan aheng akompa gancha chunga chu akhut alhah ham alhah lou ham, ti phot chetna dinga amani kah a Pakai koma kihahselna khat um ding ahi; chuphat leh gancha neipa chun kihahselna chu anganse jeng ding gancha chu asah lou ding ahitai.
Amavang akoipa koma kona kigudoh ahileh, gancha koipan aneipa chu asah ding ahiye.
Sahang tha ahijongleh akoipan athana chu akichetna avetsah ding; chutengleh sahang thasa chu aman asah lou ding ahi.
“Mihem khattouvin aheng akompa gancha khattou bat dinga alah a, aneipa umlou kah a akisukha ham, athi ham ahileh, bat’a lapa chun aman lhingset’a asah ding ahi.
Amavang aneipa umpet anahi khah vang leh ala pan asah lou ding ahiye; man peh dia kithalah ahijongleh akithalah man chutoh kito ding ahiye.
“Pasal toh kitepna neilou lai nungah theng khattou pasal khat’in ajol lhah a chule analup khompi tah leh, pasal pan nu-ngah nu chu aman apeh pai paiya jia anei pai ding ahiye.
Amavang nu-ngah nu pa chun apasal pa chu achanu apeh nom hih hel jeng tah a ahileh, analup khompipa chun nu-ngah theng ho man kipejat jat chu aman dinga sum apeh ding ahi.
“Nangman numei doithem chu nahing hoi louhel ding ahi.
“Koi hijongleh gancha toh lumkhom tapou chu tha tei tei ding ahiye.
“Koi hijongleh Pakai heng tailouva pathen dang khat koma kilhaina bol pen pen chu suhmang hel jeng ding ahi.
“Nangman maljin chu adih louva nabol louhel ding, boljong nabol genthei louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nangho jong Egypt gamsunga maljin hisa nahiuve.
Nangman meithai le chaga nabol genthei louhel ding ahi.
Amaho chu bolgenthei tan lang chule amaho kahenga hung tao leu keiman ataonau ka ngaipeh tei tei ding ahiye;
chujongle kalungsat hung deojah jeng ding, chemjama nangho katha gamuva najiteu meithai sohgama nachateu chaga sohgam diu ahi.
“Nangman nakoma um kamite mivaicha khattou sum nabatsah a ahileh, vaichapa dinga chu nangma suma kivei tobanga naum lou ding, asumkan jeng jong vaichapa chunga chu nadel louhel ding ahi.
Ijem tia nangman naheng nakom ponsil chu tun dinga nalah a ahileh, nisa lhum masanga aponsil chu aneipa nanungpeh kit ding ahi;

ijeh inem itileh hiche seh seh chu akihuina ahin, atahsa ponsil ahibove; ipi dang akisila ihmu ding ham? Ijem tin keima henga hung tao leh keiman ka ngaipeh tei ding ahi, ajeh chu keima milainatpi jing kahi.
“Nangman Pathen nahouset louhel ding, namite chunga vaihompa jong nagaosap louhel ding ahi.
“Nangman nalhosoh lhung masa le nalengpi twi letdoh chu ngongkai louhela natodoh ding ahi.” “Nachapate lah a apeng masa atahpen jong chu keima neipeh ding ahi.
Nabongchal ho leh nakelngoi ho jong chuta chu nabol ding ahi; ni sagi sunga gancha nou chu ahong sunga um den ding, niget lhin ni vang leh keima neipeh doh ding ahi.
“Nangho hi keima dinga thensosa mitheng nahi diu ahin, hijeh a chu nanghon gamlah a sahang thasa sa naneh louhel diu, hitobang chu uichate napeh diu ahibouve.
“Nangman jouthu kithang naseipoh louhel ding ahi. Vetda mana hettohsah a pang dingin migilou toh kikhutjop hih helin.
Nangman thilse bol dinga kijot mipi nung namoh jui louhel ding; japi nung najuidaa thutan dihna chu leheipeh dinga jong mi le mi kihehna chung changa hettohsah a napan lou ding ahi;
ahilou jongleh mivaicha min ahehna chung changa jong nalangnei louhel ding ahi.
“Nangman namelma pa bongchal ham asangan ham avamang natokhah a ahileh, agancha chu amapa henga nanung kailut peh ding ahi.
Nangma nahot bolpa asangan apohgih-in adel opden namudoh a ahileh, amapa chu asangan to nadalhah tha louhel ding, asangan phohdoh na dinga nakithopi tei tei ding ahi.
“Nangman mivaicha mito akihehna chung changa ama chan ding dol thutan dihna chu naheimang peh louhel ding ahi.
Jouthua kihehna chu gamla tah a jamsanin, themmona bei mi leh midih chu that hih helin; ijeh-inem itileh keiman migilou chu them kachansah louhel ding ahi.
Nangman nehguh nakilah louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nehguh hin vai-bolte mit aseljin, hijeh chun adih a pangte dihna jong chu alekhup peh jin ahi.

“Nangman kholjin mi chu nabol hesoh louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu kholjin mi lungthim itobang ahi nanghon nahetsau ahitai; ijeh-inem itileh Egypt gamsunga chu nangho jong kholjin mijeng nahisau ahitan ahi.
“Kumgup sunga nangman nagamsunga muchi natu ding, chule muchi ga naki atkhom ding ahi;

kum sagi lhin kum vang leh gamsung chu nakicholdo sah a, loubol louva nalup sah jeng ding, hita chu namite lah a mivaichaten aneh thei diu ahi; amaho neh moh chengse chu gamsaten aneh diu ahijenge. Hitobang banga chu lengpilei leh na-olive hon jong nabol ding a hiye.

“Nangman nigup sunga na natoh ding chan natoh a, ni sagi lhin ni leh nakicholdo ding ahi; chutile nabongchal le nasangan jong kicholdo theiyin tin, chule nasohnu chapa leh nakholjin mi jong kicholdo thei ding ahi.
Keiman nangho jah a kasei chengse hi nit jing jenguvin lang, chule pathen dang dang ho minphah hih heluvin, hitobang ho chu nakamsunguva konin jong kijahdoh sah hih heluvin.
“Kum khat sunga hi keima koma kut thumvei nabol ding ahi.

Cholsolou changlhah kut nabol ding; keiman kathupeh banga chu aphat kitep peh phat Abib lha sunga cholsolou changlhah ni sagi sunga naneh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche lhasunga chu Egypt gama kona nahung potdoh ahiye. Koimacha keima angsunga akhut keova hung lut thei louhel ding ahi.

Ipi hijongleh loulaiya muchi natu, nalhosoh alhung masapen dinga chu nangman lholhun kut nabol ding ahi. Kum kichai phat, loulaiya kona nalhoga nakhop tup soh phat jongleh lhosoh khoptup kut nabol ding ahi.
Kum khat sunga namite pasal jouse chu Pakai Pathen angsunga thumvei cheh hung kilulah tei diu ahi.

Nangman keima henga kilhaina kithat gancha thisan chu cholsosa changlhah toh nahinto khom tha thei louhel ding, keima dinga kibol kut’a kithat sathao jong chu jingkah geiya nakoi khovah den lou ding ahi.
Naleiset ga masa lah a aga masapen chu Pakai na-Pathen insunga nahinpoh lut tei ding ahiye. Kelnou sa jong chu api noitwiya nahon lou ding ahi.
Vetan, lampi dunga nangma vengtup ding leh keiman kagonpehna mun geiya nangma napui lhungpeh dingin, keiman namasang sanga Vantil khat kasolpeh-e.
Vantil khu khoh sah-in lang, athusei ngai phan, ama dounan imacha boldan, ajeh chu aman nangho suh khel angaidam ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh ama sunga khu keima min cheng jing jeng ahiye.
Nangman ama thusei khu lunglut tah a na-ngaiya, keiman kasei jouse aboncha nabolsoh keiya ahileh, namelmate dinga amelma kahi ding, nadoute dinga adouva kapan ding ahi.
Keima Vantil chu nangma masanga lamkaiyin tin, Amor mite, Hit mite, Periz mite, Canaan mite, Hivi mite, chule Jebus mite henga nahin puilut tengleh, keiman amaho chu kasuh mang ding ahi;

chuche mite pathen semthu ho koma chu nangma nabohkhup louhel ding, hicheho kin bola jong napan lou ding, amaho thilbol ho bang banga jong thil nabol lou ding, aboncha chu nangman nalekhup hel jenga, asongkhom jouseu jong chu navoh boh gamsih seh ding ahi.
Nanghon Pakai na-Pathenu kinbou naboluva, aman nachanglhah neh ding le natwi don ding phatthei aboh ding ahi; chutengle keiman najalah a kona natna chu kalah mang hel ding ahi.
Nagamsunga chu koimacha agai kisuhjul leh aching um thei lou ding, keiman nahin nikho kasuh bulhit peh tei ding nahi.
Keiman nangma masang sanga mihem kichat ding kasolpeh-a, kidoupi dinga najot lut chu abonchauva alungu kasuhnoh phah peh ding, chutengleh nagalten najamsanuva anunglam jeng nangat diu ahi.
Chujongle namasanga keiman khoi-ngalte kalhapeh ding, hicheho chun Hivi mite, Canaan mite chule Hit mite aboncha nadelmang peh ding ahi.
Nangma masanga amaho chu kum khat sunga kadelmang soh jeng lou ding ahi, achutiloule agamsung ahomkeova ahung kijam tengleh gamsa hung pungin tin nangma nahin doulo diu ahi.
Nangma nahung pun puna agamsung chu nalosoh kahsea, amaho khu athem thema nangma masang sanga kadelmang mang ding ahibouve.

Chule nangma gamgi ding chu twikhanglensan dunga pat Philistine te twikhanglen chan geiya kajih tan peh, gammang lah a pat’a Euphrates vadung geiya kajih tan peh ding nahi; ijeh-inem itileh agamsunga chengte chu keiman nangho khut’a kapeh doh ding, nangman namasanga amaho chu nadelmangpeh ding ahiye.
Nangman hiche mite khu hihen apathen semthu hou khu hijongleh kitepna naneipi thei louhel ding ahi.

Amaho khu nangma gamsunga cheng theilou ding ahitauve, achutiloule amahon nang jeng jong keima douna chonset nabolsah diu ahi; ajeh chu nangman amaho pathen semthuho kin khu bolta le chun, nangma dinga kipalna hung hitei tei ding ahitai,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Pakai henga hung kaltouvin, nangma jong, Aaron jong, Nadab jong, Abihu jong chule Israel upate mi som sagi jong chu, chule gamla thim tah a konin chibai hinboh-uvin.
Mose vang chu achangseh a Pakai henga hung nailut thei ding ahinai; midang vang hung nailut thei louhel diu ahi, Mose le mipi chu hung kilhon tou thei louhel ding ahiuve,” ati.

Hichun Mose jong ahungin Pakai thusei jouse leh chonna danthu jouse chu abonchan mipi ahung seipeh tan ahi; hitah chun mipin abonchauvin o-khatsehin adonbut’uvin, aseitauve, “Pakaiyin asei jouse chu keihon aboncha kabol diu ahi,” atiuve.

Chuphat’in Mose’n jong Pakai thuseise se chu abonchan ajihdoh soh keiyin ahi. Chujongle Mose chu jingpi tah-in athoudoh-in, molsang bula chun Israel phung som le phung ni dungjuiyin, maicham akeng som le ni nei khat asemtai.
Chuin Mose’n Israel mite lah a gollhang ho chu asolin, amahon jong Pakai henga pumgo thilto ding leh chamna thilto dingin bongchal tampi agatoh doh tauve.
Chule Mose’n thisan akeh khat tobang chu athaldoh-in twibel sung dunga chun akhumin, chujongle athisan akeh lang khat chu maicham maiya chun athethangin ahi.

Chujouvin aman kitepna lekhabu chu apodoh-in mipi nabenga chun asimpeh tai; hichun mipin jong aseiyin, “Keihon Pakai thusei jouse chu aboncha kaboluva, chujongle keiho hi sei ngaitah a kaum diu ahi,” atiuve.
Hichun Mose’n thisan chu ahamin mipi chunga chun athe khumin, chule aseitai, “Vetan, thu kisei hijat dungjuiya Pakaiyin nangho toh kitepna asemdohna thisan hi,” ati.
Chujouvin Mose le Aaron toh, Nadab le Abihu toh, chule Israel mi, upa som sagi chu agakal touvun ahileh,
amaho chun Israel Pathen chu agamutauve; chule Pathen kengphang teni noiya chun sapphire songa kidonal jeng, keng lampi tobang khat anaumin, athendan chu van thengsel tobangin athenge.
Chule aman Israel chate lamkaiho chunga chun akhut alhah poi; hiti chun amahon Pathen loupi amu uvin, chujongle an aneuvin twi adontauve.

Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Molsang chunga khun keima henga hung kaltouvin lang, chule hikoma khun neina ngah jingin, keiman mipi hilchahna dinga kasutdohsa danthu le thupeh chu asong ho puma kapeh tha ding nahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose jong akipatdoh paiyin, alhacha Joshua chu akipuiyin, hiti chun Mose chu Pathen molsang chunga chun akaltoutai.

Chujongle Mose’n upate jah a aseiyin, “Keini nahenguva kahung kile kit lhon kahsen hikoma hin neina ngah jinguvin; chule vetan, Aaron le Hur hi nang ho toh umkhom jing ding ahilhon nai, koi hijongleh seinom nei jouse chu amani henga che hen lang sei hen,” ati.
Chujouvin Mose chu molsang chunga akaltouvin ahileh meibang lhang chun ahintomjol tan ahi.

Chule Pakai loupina chu Sinai molsang chunga ahung ki-ngan, nigup sungin molsang chu meibang lhang chun atom tan ahi; chuin ni sagi lhin nin Pakaiyin meibang lhang lah a kon chun Mose ahinkou tan ahi.
Molsang chunga Pakai loupina hung kilah dan chu Israel chate mitmu chang tah-in jong thil kavam hel jeng thei meikong tobangin ahung kilahin ahiye.
Chuin Mose jong meibang lhang lah a chun ache lut’in chule molsangvuma chun akaltoutai; hiti chun molsang chunga chun Mose ni som li le jan som li agathamin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati,
“Israel chate jah a seipehin lang, keima dingin thilto ding dongu hen; koi hile alungthim sunga keima ding thilto nom jousea kona chu nanghon keima ding thilto nadon diu ahi.
Nanghon Israel chatea kona nadon dingu thilto ding chu hicheng hi hi ding ahi; sana, dangka chule sum-eng,
aengdum ho, asandup ho, asan-ao leh hoitah a lhuhsa tupat ponnem, kelcha mul,
julnemsa kelngoichal vun ho, kelcha vun ho, thinggi thing,
thaomei chengsea man ding thaotwi toh, kinu ding thao namtui leh halnam ding thil namtui tah toh,
thempu opkonga khaipeh ding leh alengkouva bapeh ding sardius song le song mantam toh hitha ding ahi.
Chutengleh Israel mite lailunga kachen theina dingin keima din muntheng khat semsah-in.
Houbuh lim dol leh athilkeo ding dol keiman aboncha nangma kavetsah dungjuiya chu nanghon nasah dingu ahi.
“Israel miten thinggi thinga thingkong khat adung tong ni leh tongkeh khat’a sao, avai tong khat le tongkeh khat’ a len, chule a tun tong khat le tongkeh khat’a sanga asem diu ahi.
Chule thingkong chu nangman sana thengsela natom ding, asung apo hita chu natoma, chule achung ageigol chu sanaa najep pol ding ahi.

Nangman thingkonga ding chu sana chaojang kol li nalhah ding, chule chaojang kol li chu thingkong keng li chunga, chaojang kol ni chu thingkong pang lang khat’a akeng teni chunga nakhaiya, chule chaojang kol ni ma chu apang lang khat keng teni chungma nakhai ding ahi.
Hita chu nangman thinggi thing mol lhon ni nasuiya, hiche mol lhon teni jong chu sanaa natomjol ding,

chule mol lhon teni chu thingkong putna dinga thingkong pang lang khat’a chaojang kol ni sunga mol lhon khat nathillut’a, alang khat panga chaojang kol ni sunga chu mol lhon khatma nathil lut ding ahi.
Mollhon teni chu thingkong chunga kikhai chaojang kol li sunga chu um den jing ding, koiman thingkonga kona chu mollhon teni chu agalah doh louhel ding ahi.
Chule thingkong sunga chu keiman nangma kapeh ding hettohsahna chu nakhum ding ahi.
Chutengle nangman sana thengsel nalah a hichea chu hepi touna khat nasem ding; a dung tong ni le tongkeh khat hiding, avai tong khat le tongkeh khat hiding ahi.
Chule nangman sanaa cherub ni nasem ding, hiche teni chu hepi touna among lang tenia chu sehcha a nakhet lut ding ahi.
Among khat’a chu cherub khat nasema, alang khat monga jong chu cherub khatma nasem ding ahi; hepi touna khat cheh dinga chu among tenia nanghon cherub nasempeh cheh diu ahi.
Chule cherub teni chun chung lam nga alha ajah lhona, alha teni lhona chu hepi touna chu alekhu lhon ding, amai teni lhon kingat toa, cherub teni maiyin hepi touna lam chu angat ding ahi.
Chule nangman thingkong chungvuma chu hepi touna nadoa, chutengleh keiman nangma kapeh ding hettohsahna chu thingkong sunga chu nakhum ding,

hita chu hikom laiya hi keiman nang kakimutopi ding nahin, hepi touna chunga kon leh hettohsahna thingkong chunga um cherub teni kikah a chu keiman Israel chate dinga khoh tah a kasei ding aboncha nangma koma kaseiya, thupeh a kapeh tho ding nahi.
“Chule nangman thinggi thinga dokhang khat nasema, dokhang chu adung tong ni lhinga nabola, avai tong khat lhinga nasem ding, atun tong khat le tongkeh khat lhing hi ding ahi.
Chule dokhang chu sana thengsela natoma, chujongle akimvela chu sana ma ma a najep pol ding ahi.
Hiche dokhang velkola chu akol banjang tebep khat nabeh peh a, chule hiche akol jeng jong chu sana a najep pol ding ahi.
Dokhanga pang dinga jong chu sana chaokol kol li nasema, chule hiche chaokol li ho chu dokhang ning lia akeng li ho chunga chu nabapeh ding ahi.
Dokhang kol le chaokol ho chu kimat ding, achaokol ho chu dokhang akiputna tengleh moljol thil lutna kimang ding ahi.
Chutengleh nangman thinggi thing moljol phabep nasuiya, hicheho chu sana a natomsoh kei ding, hita chu hiche moljol ho hi dokhang put le na kimang ding ahi.

Chujongle gimnamtui kholna ding kong phabep le lheng phabep jong nagona, chule lengpitwi lhei lhahna dinga jong haineo le khon phabep jong nasem ding ahi; hicheng jong chu aboncha sana thengsela natomjolsoh kei ding ahiye.
Chuta chu nangman keima umjing kihetna changlhah chu hiche dokhang chunga hi keima angsunga nalui jing jeng ding ahi.

“Nangman sana thengsela kisem thaomei khom khat nasem ding ahi. Thaomei khom tunna le adopna chu sehcha a kikheng tohsa hiya, akhon chengse, aluchang chengse, chule apah cha chengse jong chu aboncha tikhat’a athaomei chutoh kijop mat cheh diu;

thaomei pang jet le veiya kona chu abah bahgup hung peng doh ding, thaomei khom pang lang khat’a kona chu abah thum hung peng doh a, thaomei khom pang lang khatmaa chu abah thum ma hung peng doh ding ahi;

abah khat cheh chunga chun jonmot ga tobanga kisem khon thum cheh le aluchang toh, chule apah cha chengse chutoh ahitha cheh-in, a bah lang khat chunga jong chun chutobangma chun jonmot ga tobanga kisem khon thum le aluchang toh chule apah cha chengse chutoh ahithai; hitobang chun thaomei khoma kon chun a bah gup a hung kilhungdoh-in ahiye;
chujongle athaomei khompi jeng jong chu jonmot ga tobanga kisem khon li le aluchang toh chule apah cha chengse chutoh ahiye;
hita chu thaomei khoma kona hung kilhungdoh abah gup chu ajon jona chu aluchang chutoh tikhat hidoh peh ding ahiuve.
Aluchang chengse le abah chengse chu athaomei chutoh tikhat hicheh diu, athaomei pumpi chu sehcha a kikheng tohsa, sana thengsel hi ding ahi.
Hita chu nangman hichea det dinga chu thaomei sagi nasem ding, chule amasang aonglai salvah dinga thaomeiho chu tundoh cheh ding ahi.
Ameijang chetanna chaiche ho leh adopna kong jouse jong chu aboncha sana thengsel cheh hi ding ahiuve.
Athilkeo manchah chengse le hiche hi agoma sana thengsel talent khat lhingset’a sem ding ahi.
Vetan, hicheng hi aboncha, molsang chunga alimdol kigongsa nakivetsah bang banga chu nasem ding ahiye.

“Nangman nasah ding houbuh chu pat lhuhsaa kikhong tupat ponnema kikhong, pondal som khat’a nasah a, pondum le ponsan chule ponsan-ao thim naman ding; apondal ho chu achunguva khut themtah a cherub te lim hoitah tah a kisemna pondal hicheh diu, hiche hoa chu houbuh nasah ding ahi.
Pondal khat khat chu adung tong som ni le tong get lhing cheh ding, chule pondal khat cheh chu avai tong li li lhing cheh ding ahi; hita chu pondal jouse aboncha alet aneo kibang cheh ding ahiuve.
Pondal nga chu khat le khat kijopmat soh keiya, chule pondal nga ma chu khat le khat kijopmat soh kei diu ahi.

Chule nangman pondal gol masa loi lah a a pam nungpen pondal mong geigola chu abilding akol kola tampi patduma nasempeh ding, chutobang banga chu pondal golni loi lah a apam nungpen pondal mong geigola jong chu abil-hom ding akol kola tampi nasempeh ding ahi.

Pondal loikhat dinga chu abil-hom ding-uva akol kolsom nga nasempeh a, chule pondal golni lhinna mong geigola jong chu abil-hom dinguva akol kolsom nga ma nasempeh ding ahi; abil-hom ho chu khat le khat kimai ngat to cheh ding ahiuve.
Chule nangman sana sumkol kolsom nga nasema, hiche sumkol hoa chu pondal chengse chu khat le khat nathilmat to cheh ding, hita chu houbuh chu apumpia buh khatseh seh a kitungdoh thei ding ahiye.
“Houbuh chung khuna dinga chu nangman kelcha mula kikhong pondal phabep pi nasem ding ahin; a bon bona pondal som le khat nasem ding ahi.
Pondal khat cheh chu adung tong somthum cheh hi ding, chule pondal khat cheh chu avai tong li li hi ding ahi; chutengleh pondal som le khat chu alet aneo kibang cheh ding ahiuve.

Chule pondal nga chu ama le ama nathilmat to cheh a, pondal gup jong chu ama le ama nathilmat to cheh ding ahin; ahin pondal gup lhinna pondal pa vang chu ponbuh mai, achunga chu nathop khumjeng ding ahi.

Chutengleh pondal gol masa a pondal apam nungpen among geigola chu abil-hom ding akol som nga nasempeh ding, chule pondal golni lhinna pondal apam nungpen mong geigola jong chu abil-hom ding akol som nga ma nasempeh ding ahiye.

“Chujoule nangman sum-eng sumkol som nga nasema, chule sumkol chengse chu pondal bil-hom ho sunga chu nathil lut ding, chutengleh ponbuh chu buh khatseh a akitundoh theina dinga nathilmat soh kei ding ahi.
Chujouleh ponbuh a pondal kidah avaldoh chengse, pondal keh khat avaldoh lai chu houbuh tomlama chu kikhai lhasuh ding ahiye.

Chule ponbuh kisahna pondal chengse adung sao dungjuiya hung valdoh ho chu alang khat hihen alang khat langma hi jongleh, houbuh jet le veiya, hilama jong khulama jong akhu dinga tong khat khat kikhai lhasuh cheh ding ahi.
Nangman ponbuh khuna dinga chu kelngoichalte vun julnemsa leh kelcha vun jeng naman ding ahi.
“Chujongle nangman houbuh a manchah ding chu thinggi thing akol dinga jangkei keiya nasui ding ahi.
Akol khat ding chu adung tong som lhing ding, chule akol khat ding avai tong khat le tongkeh khat hicheh ding ahi.
Akijopmat na dinga thingkol khat cheh a chu among tenia abil kihoipeh cheh ding; hita chu nangman houbuh thingkol jouse chu abil nahoipeh cheh ding ahiye.
Nangman houbuh dinga chu thingkol nasempeh ding ahin: lhanglama pang dinga chu thingkol som ni hi ding,

chutengle thingkol khat khat dinga chu among ajopna tenia pang dia chu, thingkol som ni dinga dangka a kisem abiltom som li nasempeh ding, hitobangma chu thingkol khat dingma chu among jopna tenia pang dinga abiltom nima nasempeh ding ahi.
Chule agolni lhinna, sahlam houbuh bang sahgola pang ding jong chu thingkol som ni hi ding ahin,
dangka a kisem abiltom somli ma hi ding, thingkol khat noiya pang ding chu abiltom ni hiya, thingkol khat noima pang kit ding jong chu abiltom nima hi ding;
chule houbuh nilhum lam, anung lama pang dinga chu nangman thingkol gup nasuipeh ding ahi.
Chutengleh houbuh tom lang aning te nia pang dinga chu nangman thingkol ni nasempeh ding;

hiche thingkol teni chu anoilam achang lhona pang cheh lhona, alulam lhon vang chu chaokol masa pena chu adangto kijopmat ding ahilhone. Hita chu anigel lhona kijopmat cheh ding ahi; chule hiche teni chu ainning tenia pang lhon ding ahiye.

Dangka a kisem abiltom chengse puma chu thingkol get lhing ding, abiltom aboncha som le gup lhing ding ahi; thingkol khat noiya pang ding chu abiltom ni hiya, thingkol khat noima pang ding jong chu abiltom nima hi ding ahiye.
“Houbuh lang khat’a thingkol chengsea pang dinga chu nangman thinggi thinga kisui kotgol nga nasui ding ahi,
hitobanga chu houbuh lang khat’a thingkol chengse dinga golvai nga nasuiya, chule houbuh tomlang nilhum lama, apang lang khat’a pang dinga jong chu golvai nga ma nasui ding ahiye.
Chutengleh thingkol chengse lailunga akimlai dona gol lailhapa chu among langtoa kigolpai pai ding ahi.

thingkol chengse chu nangman sana a natomjolsoh kei ding, chule thingkol ho chaokol chengse jong chu agoIvai ho matna dinga aboncha sana jenga natomsoh kei ding ahi; hitobanga chu golvai jouse jong sana a natom ding ahiye.
Chule molsang chunga houbuh kigon dol nakivetsah bang banga chu nangman natundoh ding ahiye.

“Chujou tengleh houbuh khu khumna dinga chu pondum, ponsandup chule ponsan-ao thim toh, pat lhuhsa kikhong tupat ponnem toh naman ding ahi; hiche ponho chu khut themna tah a khon ding, cherub te lim toh khontha cheh ding ahiye;
chule nangman apon chu sanaa kitomjolsa thinggi thinga kisui khompi li chunga chu, abiltom li sunga sana thil khaina thihkoi hoa chu nakhai lhah ding ahi.

Chujongleh alukhuna asumkol chengsea kona chu nahin khai lhahsuh ding, hita chu chule hettohsahna thing kong jeng jong apon lukhuna sunga chu nahin tol lut ding ahi; chule hiche pon lukhuna chun nangho dinga muntheng chungnunga kona chu muntheng lai chu nadaltan peh diu ahiye.
Chutah le nangman muntheng chungnungpen sunga kikoi hettohsahna thingkong chunga chu hepi touna chu nadopeh ding ahi.

Chutengleh apon lukhuna polama chu nangman dokhang chu natun ding, chule houbuh lhanglam, dokhang to kimai ngat laitah a chu thaomei khom chu natun ding ahi; hita chu dokhang chu sah lam sanga chu nado ding ahiye.
“Nangman ponbuh kotphunga lah ding chu pondum le ponsandup, ponsan-ao thim, pat lhuhsa kikhong tupat ponnem toh, heojanga pahcha jem kijepna cheh pona bou nasem ding ahi.

Chule pon dahna dinga chu thinggi thing khompi nga nasuiya, aboncha chu sana natomjolsoh kei ding ahi; akhaina thihkoi chengse jong chu sana jeng jeng hi diu, chujongle nangman hichenga abiltom nga jong chu sum-eng jenga nalhah ding ahi.
“Nangman maicham chu thinggi thinga nasema, tong nga saova, tong nga ma len ding; maicham chu abem hiya, asan lam chu tong thum lhing ding ahi.
Chule maicham ning lia ding chu aki li ma nasempeh a, akiho jong chu amaicham chutoh tikhat hicheh diu, chujongle nangman aki chu sumenga natomjol cheh ding ahi.

Chule vutvam jouse kholna dinga chu bel phabep naden ding, khekeh phabep nasui ding, twibel phabep nadena chule sumkhe phabep le khangbel phabep nakhen ding ahi; manchah ding jouse chu aboncha sum-eng jenga nasem ding ahiye.
Chule maichama pang ding chu nangman sum-eng lenpheh a kipheh khat nasem ding, chule lenpheh a kipheh chunga chu sum-engkol kolli nasema aning li laiya chu nakoi ding ahi.
Hiche chu maicham jolpi noiya chu nakhaiya, hita chu lenkipheh chu maicham kimlai geiya hung kikhai lhasuh ding ahi.
Chujongleh maicham putna dinga chu moljol ni, thinggi thing jeng nasuiya, aboncha chu sum-enga natomjol ding,
hiche moljol teni chu chaojang kol ho sunga chu kithil paiya, maicham chu akiput tengleh amoljol teni chu maicham jetle veiya pangto lhon ding ahi.
Nangman hiche ding chu thingphela nasema, alaihoma nasem ding ahin; molsang chunga nangma nakivetsah bang banga chu hicheho chu kisem cheh ding ahi.
“Nangman houbuh dinga pal nakaikhum ding ahi. Lhang lama pang ding pal pondal kikhai ding ho chu pat lhuhsa tupat ponnema kikhong, langkhat seh seh a ding chu pondal tong jakhat’a sao hi ding;

akikhaina diu khompi jong khompi som ni hiya, akhomko tunlutna ding jong som nima hi ding, aboncha chu sum-eng jeng hi diu ahi; akhompi dunga pang ding thihkoi chengse leh aluhup chengse vang chu aboncha dangka hi ding ahi.

Chule hiche tobang banga chu pal sah lam dung lhung keiya jong pondal tong jakhat lhingset kikhaiya, akhompi ding jong som nima, akhomko tunlutna ding jong som nima ma hiding, aboncha chu sum-eng hicheh ding, akhompi dunga pang ding thihkoi chengse leh aluhup chengse vang chu aboncha dangka hi ding ahi.
Chule nilhum lama apal vailama jong chu pondal tong som nga jen kikhaiya, khompi som khat chu atunlutna som khat chungma kiphut ding ahi.
Niso lam apal mailam jong chu availang tong som nga ma hi ding ahiye.
Akelkot’a pat alang khatseh a pang ding pondal chu tong som le tong nga hi ding, akhompi thum le atunlutna khomko thum toh hiding;
alang khatma pang ding pondal jong chu tong som le tong nga hiya, akhompi thum le atunlutna thum toh hitha ding ahi.

Kelkot’a kikhai ding pondal chu adung tong som ni lhing ding, pondum le ponsandup, ponsan-ao thim le pat lhuhsa kikhong tupat ponnem, heojanga hoitah a kijempolsa hi ding ahin; hicheng dinga jong chu khompi li panga chule atunlutna khomko jong li ma hi ding ahi.
Pal kimvela khompi chengsechu aboncha dangkaa alu kitomsoh kei ding, akikhaina diu thihkoi ho chu dangka ma ma hiya, khompi chengse khomko ho vang chu sum-enga kisem hi diu ahi.
Pal chu tong jakhat lhing ding, availang tong som nga lhing ding, chule asan lam chu tong nga lhing ding ahi; hichenga chu pondal dinga pat lhuhsa a kikhong tupat ponnem jeng kikhai ding ahi.
Ijakaiya manchah ding houbuh sunga manchah ding jouse chu, thil khaina jouse hihen lang, palgei dunga thil khaina ding jouse hijongleh aboncha sum-eng jenga kisem ding ahi.

“Nangman Israel chate chu thu napeh a, amahon nangma henga olive thao kiheh lha thengsel chu thaomeiya detvah dinga ahinchoi diu, hita chu aitih chan geiya vah jing jeng dinga thaomei chu kitungdoh ding ahiye.

Kikhopna ponbuh sung, hettohsahna maiya ponlu khuna polama chu Aaron le achapaten thaomei chu nilhah a pat jingkah geiya, Pakai angsunga alimbol jing jeng diu ahi. Hiche hi Israel chate dinga akhang lhum keiyuva anit jing jeng diu chonna dan khat’a umdoh ding ahiye.

Nangman Israel chate lah a konin nasopipa Aaron le achapate khu nahenga gakou lut’in lang, amaho khu keima dinga thempua pang ding ahiuve, Aaron le Aaron achapate, Nadab le Abihu chule Eleazar leh Ithamar, hicheng hi ahiuve.
Chule nangman nasopipa Aaron dinga khu aloupina ding leh amel-hoina dinga vontheng tampi nagonpeh ding ahi.

Chujongle keiman lungthim le tha kapeh chengse, thil boltheina nei jouse henga chu nangman thu naseiya, hita chu amahon Aaron von ding tam pi akhonpeh-uva, ama chu keima thempua pang dinga thenso ding ahiye.

Amahon akhonpeh diu von ho chu hicheng hi ahiye: ompho khat, konggah khat, sangkhol chol khat, thempu natohna sangkhol po-nung khat, delkop khat, taigah khat toh hitha ding, hita chu keima dinga thempua pang ding nasopipa Aaron leh achapate dinga amahon vontheng hijat chu agonpeh dingu, ahiye.
“Amahon sana jong, pondum jong, ponsandup jong, chule ponsan-ao thim jong, pat lhuhsa a kikhong tupat ponnem jong alah-uva amanchah cheh diu ahi.
Hita chu amahon konggah dinga chu sana a jong, patduma jong, patsandup ma jong, patsan-ao thima jong, khut themtah a kilhuhsa tupat ponnem pat jong amanuva asempeh diu ahiye.
Chutengleh akijopmatsoh theina dinga among te nia chu lengkouva akikhaina ding agen ni um ding ahi.

Chule hiche chunga khut themtah a kipheh patjang, konga kivei ding jong chu, konggah kisemna kimangjat manchah chengse leh akisemdol akhutsoh kibang banga kisem ding, sana jong, patdum jong, patsandup jong, patsan-ao thim jong, tupat ponnema khonthei pat lhuhsa jong pang cheh diu ahi.
Chule nangman song mantam ni nalah a, song mantam teni chunga chu Israel chate min jouse nakhetpeh ding,

song mantam khat chunga chu aminu gup nakhetpeh a, chule a val nalai aminu gupma chu song man tam khatjoh chunga chu nakhetpeh ding, hita chu amin jouseu apen dungjui cheh-uva nakhetpeh cheh ding ahi.

Sana kheng thempan khutjem dunga thillim akhetpol banga nangman jong song mantam teni chunga chu Israel chate min nakhetpol peh ding ahi; chule nakhetpopna mun jouse chu sana twiya nasun jolsoh ding ahiye.

Chutengleh song mantam teni chu Israel chate hetjingna dinga lengkouva konggah kikhaina agen tenia chu nabeh den ding ahi. Hita chu Aaron in Israel chate kihet jingna dinga amin jouseu alengkou tenia apoh a Pakai angsunga apoh lut ding ahi.
Chule nangman sana tonjih pah ho jong nasema, chule sana thengsela khaoveiya kiveisa sana jang ni jong navei ding:
hiche khaojang veiya kiveisa sana jang teni chu sana tonjih pah ho chutoh najopmat ding ahiye.

“Nangman thutanna akivon ding ompho jong khut them tah a nasempeh ding, konggah kisemna tobang banga chu nasem ding ahi, sana jong, patdum jong, patsandup jong, patsan-ao thim jong, tupat ponnema khonthei lhuhsa pat jong naman a nasempeh ding ahi.
Ning li nei hiya, chule tho ni hi ding, adung jong khap khat hiya avai jong khap khatma hi ding ahi.
Alaiya chu nangman song gol lia nagolsuh ding; agol masa a kigol ding song ho chu sardius song, topaz song, aiha song hi ding ahi;
chule agolni lhinna kigol ding song ho chu emerald song, sapphire song, chule diamond song hi diu;
chule gol thum lhinna kigol ding song ho chu jacinth song, agate song, chule amethyst song hi ding ahiuve;
chuta chu gol li lhinna kigol ding song ho jong chu beryl song, onyx song, chule jasper song hi ding ahiuvin ahi; aboncha chu sana twiya chapdet cheh ding ahiuve.

Song som le ni chu ama ama min le Israel chate min khat khat toh umtha cheh ding, hita chu song khat cheh dinga chu ama min toh Israel phung som le ni lah a phung khat min cheh chutoh mohor kinam banga kikhet lut tha cheh ding ahi.
Chule nangman ompho dinga chu sana thengsela khaojang tobanga napheh ding;
chuta chu ompho dingma ma a chu sana chaokol ni nasem ding, hiche chaokol teni chu ompho mong aning tenia nabupeh ding ahi.
Chutah leh ompho mong aninga kibut chaokol teni sunga chu sana khaojang teni chu nathil lut ding ahi;
chujongle nangman chaokol teni mong teni chu tonjih pah teni kitona sunga chu nathil lut ding, hita chu konggah lengkouva akikhaina agui teni masanga chu kijopmat ding ahi.
Nangman sana chaokol ni nasema, hiche teni chu ompho mong agei teni, asung lam agei, konggah bantah a chu nathil lut ding ahiye.

Chule nangman sana chaokol ni jong nasema, hiche chaokol teni chu konggah lengkouva akikhaina teni anoilam amasang lama chu najopmat ding, konggah dinga akijopmatna khut them tah a kipheh konggah khaina chung don a chu kimat ding ahi.

Chujongle amahon patdum jang khat’a ompho chu achaokol tenia athil paiyuva, konggah chaokol teni chutoh athilmat diu, hita chu konggah khao khut themtah a kipheh khaojang chunga chu kijamdet theiya, ompho chu konggah chutoh kilha kang louhela kihen det thei jing ding ahi.
Hitobanga chu Aaronin muntheng sunga Pakai angsunga alut tih tih leh, Israel chate geldoh jing jeng theina dinga, thutanna akivon ompho chunga chu Israel chate min jouse apoh jing jeng ding ahi.

Chule nangman thutanna ompho chunga chu Urim le Thummim kiti teni chu nadah peh ding, hita chu Pakai angsunga alut tengleh hiche teni chu Aaron dip chunga kikhai lhon ding; hitobanga chu Aaron chun Israel chate thutanna chu Pakai angsunga adip chunga apoh le jing jeng ding ahiye.
“Nangman thempun konggah a akikantan sangkhol chol chu pondum jenga nakhuipeh ding ahi.
Sangkhol chol chun luchang lutdohna ding angong hom khat aneiya, aehvah vah thei louna dinga, sangkhol dang dang banga, angongkol kimvel chu alhung keiya phatah a kiphel det chet ding ahi.

Sangkhol mong dung jousea chu nangman ajem adum le asandup, asan-ao thim naman a kolbuthei ga lim jeng nasem ding, hiche kolbuthei lim kisem ho chuleh sana changeng jeng nakah halpeh a among lhung keiya naba lhung kei ding ahi;

sana cha-ngeng khat naba a abana chu kolbuthei ga lim kisem khat naba ding, sangkhol chol mong lhung keiya chu hitobanga chu sana cha-ngeng khat naba a abana chu kolbuthei ga lim kisem khat nabapeh peh ding ahiye.

Aaron chun houin kin abol tengleh hiche sangkhol chol chu achunga akivon ding, hita chu Pakai angsung muntheng sunga alut jong leh ahung potdoh jongleh cha-ngeng gin chu kija jing jeng ding ahin; akijah louleh athi himai ding ahi.
“Nangman sana thengsela sanapheng khat nasem ding, achunga chu mohor kijepna tobanga, ‘Pakaiya thensosa’ tia ajem nakhetpeh ding ahi.
Chutengleh hiche sanapheng chu patjang dum khat’a delkop’a chu nakanbeh ding, adelkop masang lam, amaiya kitah ding ahi.

Hita chu sanapheng chu Aaron dehpanga kitah jinga, chule Aaron chun Israel chaten thil theng ato ding chengseu athensona chung changuva themmona hung lut kha tapou chu atahsa chunga apoh jeng ding ahi; hita chu Pakai angsunga thilto chengse chu sanpeh ahitheina dinga Aaronin adehpanga atot jing jeng ding ahi.
“Nangman sangkhol chol chu tupat patnema nakhon ding, delkop jong chu tupat patnema kikhongma nasempeh ding, chule konggah khat jong heojang naman a khut themna tah a napheh peh ding ahi.
“Chutengleh nangman Aaron chapate chu athupi theina diu leh avet hoi theina dinguva sangkhol ho jong, konggah ho jong chule lukhuh ho jong nagonpeh cheh ding ahiuve.
Chule von hicheng chu nangman nasopipa Aaron leh achapate navonpeh ding, thempua apanuva keima kin abol theina dinguva amaho chu thao nanua nasuh det ding, chule nathenso ding ahiuve.
Nangman amaho chu atahsa goh keovu khujolna dinga delchol nakhonpeh ding, hiche delchol ho chun akongjanguva pat akhelbuh dungu geiya akhusoh kei ding ahi;

Aaron le achapaten kikhopna ponbuh sunga ahunglut tengu hihen lang, muntheng muna kinbol dinga maicham phung ahin nailut tengu hijongleh hiche delchol ho chu akichen cheh diu ahi, achutilouleh amaho le amaho chung jenga jong themmona akipoh lut khumuva athilo jeng diu ahi. Hiche dan kisem hi Aaron ding le ama nunga ason achilhah te dinga beitih neilou chonna dan hijing jeng ding ahitai.
“Keima thempua pang dinga amaho hi nathenso tengleh nangman amaho chu hiche hi nabolpeh tei tei ding ahi. Nolna beihel bongchal gol khat le kelngoi chal ni nagamat ding,

chule cholsolou changlhah le cholsolou changlhah lhon phabep nalah ding, hicheho chu thao to kihalsa cheh hi ding, chule cholsolou changbong neldisel thaoto kihalsa jong hitha ding ahi. Hiche changlhah ho chu aboncha suhlou chang changbong neldisela kona nalah cheh ding ahiye.
Hicheng chu nangman pocha sung khat’a nakhol khoma, chuta chu apocha ma ma chu nahintodoh jeng ding, chujongle bongchal gol le kelngoi chal teni jong chu nahin kailut pai pai ding ahi.
Chutah le nangman Aaron le achapate chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phung bula chu nahin puilut pai paiya, abonchauva twiya nasil ding ahi.

Chujoule nangman ponsil von chengse chu nalah a, Aaron chu sangkhol len leh konggah a kikantan sangkhol chol chu na-ahpeh a, konggah chu nagah peh a, ompho nabeh peh a, konggah gahna dinga khut themna tah a kipheh patjanga chu akong nagah peh ding,
chule aluchanga del nakop peh a, chutengleh delkop chunga chu lukhuh theng chu nakhuh peh ding ahiye.
Chutah le nuding thao chu nalah a alujanga nasun khum jenga, chule Aaron chu thao nanu ding ahi.
Chujoule achapate nahin puilut pai paiya, abonchauva sangkhol len ho chu na-ahpeh ding,

hita chu amaho jong taigah nagah peh a lukhuh ho jong chu nakhuh peh cheh ding ahin; hitobanga hi themputna kiti chu abei thei louhel chonna dan khat’a amaho chang ding ahiuve. Hita hi nangman Aaron le achapate thempua nasuh det ding ahiye.
“Hichele chun nangman kikhopna ponbuh maiya chu bongchal nahin kailut pai ding ahitai. Aaron le achapaten bongchal lubuh a chu akhut angap’uva,
chule nangman bongchal chu Pakai angsung laitah, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu natha ding,
hita chu bongchal thisan them khat chu nathaldoh a maicham phunga selki ho chunga chu nakhut junga naloinat ding, chule thisan amoh chengse chu maicham bula chu nasun lhah ding ahi.
Chujongle bongchal sunga athao jouse, a thin tomho jong, akal teni leh achung lhona um athao jouse aboncha nalah doh a maicham chunga chu nahalvam ding ahi.
Bongchal sa vang chu avun le a-eh puma ngahmun polama meiya nagovam ding ahi; ajeh chu hiche hi chonset kithoina ahiye.
“Nangman kelngoi chal khatjoh sang chu nakailut pai pai kit’a Aaron le achapaten hiche kelngoi chal lubuh chunga chu akhut angap cheh diu,
hiche teng chuleh nangman kelngoi chal nathaa, chule athisan them khat chu nahamdoh a maicham mai, akimvela chu nathekhum ding ahi.
Chujouleh kelngoi chal sa chu nasempan pan ding, asung gil jouse jong akeng jouse jong nasop ngimsoh ding, chule asa kisempansa chengse chutoh aluchang toh aboncha nakoitha soh keiya,
hita chu kelngoi chal sa apumpia chu maicham chunga nagovam ding ahi; hiche hi Pakaiya pumgo thilto ahin, agimnam lung lhaisah na ding, Pakai dinga meiya govam thilto ahiye.
“Abana kelngoi chal khatma chu nakailut pai kit’a Aaron le achapaten kelngoi chal lubuh a chu akhut angap cheh diu,

chutengleh nangman kelngoi chal natha a, athisan them khat chu nahamdoh a Aaron bilkol jetlam mong leh achapate bilkol jetlam among dunga nanunat peh cheh ding, chujongleh akhut jetlamu akhutpi chengse chung leh akeng jetlamu akeng khopi chengse chunga jong nanunat peh cheh ding, chutengleh athisan amoh chengse chu maicham mai, akimvel chengse thekhumna nanei ding ahi.

Chule maicham chunga kikoi thisan them khat leh kinu ding thaotwi chu nalah a Aaron chung, aponsil chengse chunga nasun khuma, chujongle achapate chengse chung leh aponsil jouseu chunga nasun khum cheh ding ahi; Aaron le avon chengse akithensoa atheng hitha ding, hita chu amaleh achapate, chule achapate von jouse jong athenga um cheh diu ahitai.

“Nangman kelngoi chal asa thao, amei thao, asung thao asung tomho, akal teni leh achung lhona athao chengse, chule amal jetlam toh nalah ding ahi; ajeh chu hiche hi kisuh detna kelngoi chal kiti ahiye;
chule changlhah pheng khat le thao toh kihalsa changlhah lhon khat, chule changlhah phengneo khat toh, Pakai angsunga kikoisa cholsolou changlhah pocha sunga kona chu nalahdoh ding ahi;
hicheng thil hijat chu Aaron le achapate khut’a napehsoh keiya, aboncha chu Pakai angsunga khutjap thilto dinga najap jap ding ahi.

Hiche jouteng chuleh Aaron le achapate khut’a kona nanung lah doh a, aboncha chu pumgo thilto belapna ding, agimnam lung lhaisah na dinga, Pakai angsunga maicham chunga chu nahalvam ding ahi; hiche hi Pakaiya govam thilto khat ahiye.
“Nangman Aaron kisuh detna kelngoi chal oplhang chu nalah a, hiche chu Pakai angsunga khutjap thiltoa pang dinga najap ding ahi; chuta chu hiche hi nangma chan ding lai chu hi ding ahitai.

Chujongleh khutjap thilto oplhang le thempuho chan ding amal toh khutjap’a kijap jouse leh kisuh detna kelngoi chala kona hung kitoh doh chengse chu Aaron le achapate ding ahijeh a nangman nathenso ding ahi.

Hiche hi Aaron le achapate dinga aitih chan geiya Israel chaten apeh diu abat’uva kisei ding ahi; ajeh chu hiche hi Israel chaten chamna thil atouva kona thempuho chan dinga ahinto doh dingu chu ahiye; hiche hi ahiye Pakaiya amaho thilto ding kiti chu.
“Aaron ponsil vontheng chengse chu ama nung leh achapate chang ding ahin, thao akinu tenguleh akisuh det tenguva akivon dingu ahi.
Aaron muna thempua pang achapa chun kikhopna ponbuh sunga munthenga kinbola pang dia ahung lut tengleh, ni sagi sunga hiche vontheng chengse chu akivon ding ahi.
“Nangman kisuh detna kelngoi chal chu nalah a, atahsa sa chu muntheng lai khat’a naga hon ding;
chule Aaron le achapaten kelngoi chal sa leh pocha sunga kikoi changlhah chutoh, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu ame diu ahi.
Hicheng thil chu kisolmatna ding, kisemtohna ding, kisuh detna dinga Aaron le achapaten aneh dingu ahin, polam min vang aneh louhel ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh athil ho chu athengsa ahitai.

Chule kisuh detna sahal khattou ham, changlhah hal khattou ham chu jingkah geiya khovah den anaum khah tah a ahileh, nangman anaum khovah den chengse chu meiya nahalvam jeng ding ahi, thil thengsa ahitan, kine thei louhel ding ahiye.
“Hita hi nangman keiman kathupeh chengse dungjuiya Aaron le achapate chu nabolpeh soh kei ding ahi; ni sagi sunga amaho chu nasuh det ding,

niseh a chu solmatna dinga bongchal khat chonset thilto dinga natodoh jing jeng ding ahi. Solmatna nabolpeh teng chuleh nangman maichama kona chonset suhmangna dinga chonset thilto khat jong nato ding, hita chu maicham chu thao nanua, nathenso ding ahi.

Ni sagi sunga nangman maicham solmatna jeng jeng nabola, chule nathenso ding ahin, hijeh a chu maicham chu theng chungnung pen ding ahi; ipi hijongleh maicham tongkha chan chu thenghel hel ding ahitai.
“Nangman maicham chunga thil nato ding chu hiche hi hi ding ahiye: tang louhela, nisim niseh a kum khat lhingsa kelngoi nou ni hi jing jeng ding ahi.
Kelngoi nou khat jingkah lama nato jing ding, chule kelngoi nou khatma chu nilhah lama nato jing jeng ding ahi.

Kelngoi nou kitoh doh masa chutoh kilhona changbong neldisel thiltena hop khat’a hopsom leh heh lhahsa thaotwi hin dim khat hop lia hop hop khat toh, kilhaina ding lengpitwi hin dim khat khat hop lia hop hop khat toh hitha ding ahi.

Chule jingkah a tobang banga chu nangman nilhah lam tengleh kelngoi nou khatjoh jong chu nato ding, kelngoi nou chutoh chang thilto toh, donthei thilto jong natotha ding ahin, hiche chu Pakai dinga agimnam lung lhaina meiya govam thilto hi ding ahi.

Chule hiche hi nakhang khanguva tat le tat louva nabol jing jeng diu pumgo thilto ahin, kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu Pakai angsunga nabol jing diu ahi; hiche kotpi phungbula chu keiman nang kakimupia najah a thu kaseipeh ding nahi.
Hikom laitah a chu keiman Israel chate kakimupi ding, hita chu kaloupi nan amun chu asuh theng jeng ding ahi.
Chuteng keiman kikhopna ponbuh le maicham chu kasuh thenga, Aaron le achapate jong keima thempua pang dinga kathenso ding ahiuve.
Chutah leh Israel chate lah a kachena, amaho dinga keima hi a-Pathenu kahi jing ding ahitai.

Hichea chu amahon keima hi Pakai aPathenu kahiya, chule alah-uva kachen jing theina dinga amaho hi Egypt gamsunga kona kahin puidoh ahi, ti ahetdoh dingu ahi; keima hi Pakai kitipa, amaho Pathen chu kahi.
“Nangman achunga gimnamtui kihalnam jingna ding maicham nasemdoh ding, hiche maicham chu thinggi thing nasuiya nasem ding ahi.
Maicham chu adung tong khat hiding, avai tong khatma hiya, aning li nei hiding: a tun tong ni lhing ding; a saki chengse jong chu amaicham chutoh tikhat hisoh diu ahi.
Chule maicham chu achung ahin, ajet avei ahin, akimvel pumpi leh asaki chengse ahiuvin, abon’cha sana thengsela natomjol cheh ding, hita chu akimvel lhung keiya sana a najep pah soh ding ahi.

Chujongle hichea pang dinga chu sana chaojang kol ni nalhah a, hiche teni chu alang langa sana a akijep pahna noiya agola chu nabapeh ding, hiche chaojang kol tenia chu moljol teni kithil lutna maicham putna chu kinei ding ahi.
Nangman moljol teni ding jong chu thinggi thing cheh nasuiya, anigela chu sana a natomjol ding ahiye.

Chule nangman hettohsahna thingkong masanga kikhai pondal masang, hettohsahna kikhuna hepi laltouna mai laitah, keiman nangto kimuto na dinga kalhendoh, hiche mun laitah a chu maicham natundoh ding ahiye.
Chutengle Aaronin maicham chunga chu jingkah seh leh thaomei chengse atheh ngim phat phat leh gimnamtui alhut’a ahalnam jing jeng ding,
nilhah lam teng Aaron ma man thaomei ho chu atundoh teng jongleh ahalnam kit ding, nakhang lhum keiyuva hita hi tantih nei louhela Pakai angsunga gimnamtui kilhut nam jing jeng ding ahi.
Nanghon maicham chunga chu athenglou gimnamtui hihen pumgo thilto hihen lang chule chang thilto hijongleh natothei louhel diu ahi; chujongleh donthei thilto jong nasun khum louhel diu ahiye.

Chule kum khat sunga Aaronin khatvei seh seh bou asakiho chunga chu solmatna abol ding ahi; hiche solmatna abolna dinga chu solmatna chonset thilto gantha thisan chu aman ding, nakhang lhum keiyuva kum khat sunga khatvei vei abolji ji ding ahin, hiche hi Pakai dia thil theng chung nungpen hi ding ahiye,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hi tin ati:

“Nangman Israel chate min nasima aminbuu nasempeh tengleh amichang cheh-uva ama ama long lhenna cheh ding longman akipeh soh kei diu ahi; chuti hen lang hileh nangman amaho min nasim tengleh alah-uva gamna hise hung lang lou ding ahi.

Min simna pang ding jousen longman chu munthenga kimangji shekel dungjuiya chu shekel keh khat cheh apehsoh kei ding ahi: hiche shekel dim khat chu gerah somni alhinge; chule shekel keh khatma chu Pakai henga thilto dinga kipedoh jeng ahiye.
Hiche min simna kisimtha jouse, akum kum somnia lhah chung lamse sen, Pakai henga thilto ding chu ato cheh ding ahi.
Nanghon Pakai koma nahinkho dinguva thilto napeh tenguleh mihaovin jong shekel keh khat sanga tamjo apeh deh lou ding, mivaichan jong shekel keh khat sanga lhomjo apeh chom deh louhel ding ahiye.

Chujongle nangman Israel chatea kona kisolmatna sum kitoh chu nalah a, hiche sum chu kikhopna ponbuh kinbolna naman ding ahi; chuti hen lang hileh hiche sum chun Pakai angsunga Israel chate akihetdoh sah jing jeng thei ding, hita chu nalong lhenna dinguva solmatna kiboldoh thei ding ahi,” atin ahi.
Pakai chun Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:

“Nangman kisilna dingin sum-eng kong khat semin lang chule atunna ding jong chu sum-eng ma ma nasem ding ahi. Chule hiche sum-eng kong chu kikhopna ponbuh le maicham kikah a naluiya, asunga chu twi nasun dim ding,
atwiya chu Aaron le achapaten akhut chengseu leh akeng phang jouseu akisil ngim dingu ahiye.

Aaron le achapate chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga alut phat’u hihen lang, maicham phunga kinbol dinga ahung nailut phat’u hileh, Pakai henga meiya govam ding thilto halnam dinga hung hijongleu, amaho chu twiya kisil ngim cheh ding ahiuve, achutilouleh thi hel jeng ding ahiuvin ahi.

Hita chu amahon akhut chengseu le akeng phang jouseu akisil ngim dingu ahi, achutilouleh thi ding ahiuve; chujongle hiche hi amaho abonchauva ding hihen lang Aaron changseh ding hijongleh, chule ason achilhah te ding hileh, atonsot geiya dinga akhang lhum keiyuva chonna dan a anei diu ahiye,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a chun thu aseikit nin hitin ati:

“Nangman gimnamtui lah a anamtui pen tah kilah-in lang, gimnamtui atwi lah a myrrh kiti chu shekel ja nga lan lang, agimnam jah nom lah a thingthal chu thiltena keh khat, shekel ja ni le som nga lhing ahin, thing namtui lah a jong thing namtui shekel jani leh som nga ma nalah ding;
chule simbi lingga jong munthenga kimang shekel dungjuiya shekel ja nga hi ding, chule olive thao jong Hin dim khat nalah ding ahi;
nangman hichengsea kona chu, thao namtui semthem ho, thilbol banga, kinu ding thaotheng nasemdoh ding ahin; hiche thao chu thaothenga um ding ahiye.
Chule nangman hiche thao chu kikhopna ponbuh a jong nanu nama chule hettohsahna thingkonga jong chu nu nam ding,
dokhang le thil manchah jouse jong, thaomei khom le aman chah jouse, chule gimnamtui halnamna maicham jong chu nanusoh hel ding ahi,
hitobanga chu pumgo thiltona-maicham leh amanchah chengse ahin, twikong le akitunna jong chu nanu nam cheh ding ahi;
thil hichengse chu atheng chung nung ahi theina dinga nangman nathenso ding ahin; ipi hijongleh hicheng thil tongkha chan chu athengma ma hi jeng ding ahitai.
Chujongle keima thempua pang dinga Aaron le achapate chu nangman nathenso ding ahiye.
Chutengle nangman Israel chate jah a naseiya, “Hiche thao hi keima dinga kinu ding thaotheng ahi, tia nakhang lhum keiyuva nakoi jing diu ahi.

Hiche thaotheng chu mipou pou chunga kinu nat theiya kisun khum thei louhel ding, chujongle hiche thaotheng kihal tobanga chu thao dang jong nahal thei lou diu ahi; hiche hi thaotheng ahitan, nangho dinga jong athenga um jing jeng ding ahiye.

Koi hijongle hiche thaotheng kihal tobanga chu thao dang hal kha ahim, ahiloule hetphah lou mi khattou chunga hiche thaotheng chu ahalnat khat tou nunat kha ahim, hitobang mi chu amite lah a kona kipaidoh jeng ding ahi; tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseiyin, “Nangman thil namtui tam pikilah temin; stacte ahin, onycha ahin, galbanum ahin, thil namtui tah tah bego thengsel toh kibang banga kihal chen chu kilah-in.
Chule thao namtui sempa thilsem bang khun semin lang, chi son lang ngimsel le thengselin koiyin;

ahal them khat nangman neocha cha nameh lum luma, chule akeh khat chu keiman nang kakimuto pi na ding mun, kikhopna ponbuh sunga hettohsahna maiya chu nakoi ding hiche chu nangho dinga thil theng chung nungpen hi ding ahiye.
Nangman nasem ding nathao namtui halkhom tobanga chu nanghon ginmantui nangho manchah mai mai dinga nakisem thei louhel diu ahi; ajeh chu hiche hi nangma dinga Pakaiya atheng hiding ahitai.
Koi hijongleh gimnamtuiya manchah ding ahi, tia hiche thil theng kihal banga chu kisem aum khah a ahileh, ama chu amite lah a kona paidoh a um ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Ven, keiman Judah phunga Hur chapa, Uri chapa Bezalel kitipa chu aminin kakoutai;
chujongleh keiman Bezalel kitipa chu Pathen Lhagao kadimsah jengin, thil boltheina le chihguhna toh, hetna le khut themna abonchan kapen;
thil lim chom chom jep themna sana, dangka chule sum-eng khen themna,
set thom thom ding song tampi khen themna, thing jep polna le khut themna jouse aboncha Bezalel chu ka peh ahitai.

Chule vetan, keiman Bezalel kitipa chu Dan phunga mi Ahisamach kitipa chapa Oholiab kitipa chutoh kapan khomsah ahitai; chujongle keiman nangma kathupeh jouse hi abol theisoh keina dinguvin, keima mi ahithei chan chu bol theina kapetai.
Kikhopna ponbuh ahin, hettohsahna thingkong le achunga kido hepi touna ahin, ponbuh sunga kikoi thilkeo jouse ahin,
dokhang le dokhang manchah chengse toh, thaomei khom thengsel chuleh amanchah chengse toh, chule gimnamtui kihalnam ji na maicham chutoh ahin,
chule pumgo thilto govamna maicham le maicham manchah jouse toh, kisilna kong le kong tunna toh,
hoitah a kikhong ponsil chengse hihen lang, thempu natoh atoh tenguva akivon diu Aaron thempupa leh achapate vontheng chengse hijongleh,
kinu ding thao le munthenga lhutnam ding gimnamtui geiya abolsoh kei dingu ahi. Keiman nang kathupeh bang banga chu amahon abol diu ahiye,” ati.
Chujouvin Pakai chun Mose jah a thu ahinsei kit’in hitin ati:

“Nangman Israel chate chu seipeh-in lang, ‘Nanghon keima cholngah nikho hi nanit dingu ahi; ajeh chu hiche cholngah nikho hi nakhang khanguva nangho le keima kah a melchihna khat ahin, hita chu nanghon jong Pakai kitipa keima hin nangho kathenso nahiuve, ti nahetdoh thei dingu ahi.

Chuti ahijeh a chu nanghon cholngah nikho chu nanit tei tei diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche cholngah nikho chu nangho dinga atheng ahiye. Koi koi hijongleh cholngah nikho suboh jouse chu thadoh jeng ding ahi; koi hijeng jongleh cholngah nikhoa natong pen pen chu, amite lah a kona hitobang hinkho neipa chu kipaidoh jeng ding ahi.

Nigup sunga natoh ding chan tohdoh ding, ni sagi lhin ni vang chu thengsela kicholdona dinga cholngah nikho ahin, Pakaiya atheng ahitai; koipen hijeng jongleh cholngah nikhoa natoh khattou ana tong khapou pou chu thadoh jeng ding ahi.
Hijeh a chu Israel chaten akhang khanguva, atopna beilhela cholngah nikho chu anit jingjenguva cholngah nikho chu aman jing diu ahi, tia kitepna beithei louhel khat ahiye.

‘Nigup sungin Pakaiyin van le leiset anasemin, ni sagi nin akicholdon akitha-ole,’ kiti laitah hi atonsot atonsot geiya Israel chate leh keima kah a melchihna khat a um jing jeng ding ahi,’ ati tin,” ati.
Pakai chun Sinai molsang chungvuma Mose henga athusei chengse asei chaisoh phat’in, hettohsahna pheng teni, song pheng teni, Pathen khutjunga kisunsa chu, Mose apetai.
