Chuin molsanga konin Mose ahung kumlha vah tapoi, ti mipin amudoh phat’uvin mipi abonchauvin acham chamuvin Aaron henga ahung kikhomsoh keiyun ajah a aseitauve, “Kipat doh-in lang eilamkai diu vin keiho ding pathen lim tampi neisempeh-uvin; ajeh chu hiche Mose kitipa Egypt gama kona eihin puidoh pau chu iti hiya hitam keihon ama chung changa ipi thusoh hitam, ti kahe tapouve,” atiuve.
Hichun Aaronin jong amaho jah a aseiyin, “Najiteu numeiho le nachapateu chule nachanuteu bilba sana jouse chu sut lhauvin keima henga hinchoi soh keiyuvin,” ati.
Hijeh chun mipin abonchauvin bilba jouse sana chengse chu abi luva konin asut lhasoh heluvin, aboncha chun Aaron henga ahinchoi lutsoh keitauve.

Chuin Aaron chun akhut uva konin sana ho chu alan, sana khenna manchah khat’in akheng khengin, hiti chun bongnou lim kilhajol khat hi asodoh sah tai; hichun miho chun, “Vo Israelte, Egypt gama kona naogho hinpuidoh pathente chu hiche ho ahiuve!” tin asamtauve.
Aaron jong chu hiche bongnou lim kilhajol chu aven, hiche lim kisem masanga chun maicham khat asemtan ahi. Chuin Aaron chun thu aphongin, “Jing nikho leh Pakaiya kut khat kibol ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun mipi chu jingkah jingpin athouvun, pumgo thilto leh chamna thilto ding ahinchoi tauve; hichun mipi chu-an ne dingle twi don dingin atouvun, ahinla kichem dingin akipat doh pai kit tauve.
Chujouvin Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin, “Chesuh tan, ijeh-inem itileh namite, nangman Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh ho khu amaho le amaho akisu mang gamtauvin ahi;

keiman amaho jui dinga kapeh lamdih a konin man gangtah in akihei mang loi jenguvin, hiti chun acham chamuvin bongnou lim khat akisemuvin, hiche chu chibai aboh uvin kithoi nan aneitauve; chujongle amahon aseiyuvin, ‘Vo Israelte, Egypt gama kona nangho hinpuidoh pathente chu hiche ho hi ahiuve!’ tin aseiyuve,” ati.
Pakai chun Mose jah a aseiyin, “Keiman hiche mite hi kamu chensoh tai, vetan, amaho hi milouchalte ahiuve;

chuti ahijeh chun tun keima chang neichang lhan, chuta kalungsatna chu amaho douna hung deojah jeng ding, abonchauva hi keiman kabah gamhel ding ahiuve; ahin nangma vang keiman nam lentah a kasemdoh ding nahi,” ati.

Ahivangin Mose chu Pakai a-Pathen henga chun atao tao jengin aseitai, “Vo Pakai, ipi dinga nangman nathahat le naban-gol thahat san a Egypt gama kona nahin puidohsa namite douna dinga chubang loma nalungsat hung deoje ju jeng hi tam?

Ipi dinga Egypt mite chun ‘Pakaiyin amaho hi suhgam dinga ahinpuidoh hiya, molsang chung dunga thagama, leiset chunga kona hi amaho abonchauva bahgam hel ding ati hibouva khu,’ tia asei ding bep’uva naumdoh sah got hitam? Nalungsat nasa tah a konin kihei mangin lang chule namite chunga hiche thilse nabol dinga kon hin nalungkhelin lang bolda tei teiyin.

Nalhacha ho Abraham, Isaac chule Israel chu geldoh kit‘in lang, amaho henga chu nangle nang nakihahsel jenga, ajah-uva nanaseiya, ‘Keiman nason nachilhah miteu kapunsah a vana ahsite jat kaphah sah ding, chule keiman katep peh na hiche gam pumpi hi aboncha nason nachilhah miteu kapeh a amahon hiche gam hi atonsot atonsot geiya alo dingu ahi,’ tia nasei chu geldoh kit’in,” ati.
Chuphat nin Pakai chun amite chunga abolgot thilsea kon chun alung aheiyin ahaitai.

Chuphat in Mose jong akiheiyin molsang chunga konin ahung kumsuh pai paiyin, hettohsahna pheng teni, amai langto gela lekhajem kisutna chu akhut tenin ahin choisuh in ahi; song pheng teni chu anung lam amalama jong lekhajem kisun cheh ahiye.
Song pheng teni chu Pathen suisa ahin, lekha kisun jong chu Pathen lekhasut ahi, hita chu asong pheng teni chunga chu kijih den jeng ahi.
Joshua’n mipi ogin thongje ju pi chu ajah phat nin Mose jah a aseitai, “Ngahmun lailunga khu gal kisat gin kithong ahibouve,” atileh;
aman jong aseiyin, “Ahipoi, galjo na kholhang sam jong ahipon, gal lel jeh a kagin othong jong ahideh poi, keima jah dan ahileh la kisah gin dan ahivouve,” ati.

Chuin Mose chu ngahmun ahung nailut phat’in bongnou lim kisem jong chu amun, mipi alam lam jengu jong amun ahileh alung asa behseh jengin, hijeh chun akhut te nia achoi song pheng teni chu molsang bula asep lhan, asep keh hel jengtai.
Mose’n miho bongnou lim semsa chu alan meiyin ahalvam helin, tola achilgoi kit nin, chuin twilah a avutdi chu asung lut’in, atwi chu Israel chate adonsah-in ahi.
Hichun Mose’n Aaron jah a thu aseiyin, “Hiche mipi hin nangkoma ipi anabolu hiya, nangman achunguva hitobang loma melse chonsetna hi nalhut khum jeng hi tam?” atileh;
Aaron jong chun aseiyin, “Ilom loma kapu chutobang tah a nalungsat jeng ding ham; hiche mite hi thilse bol dinga kipedoh ahitauve, ti nangman jong nahetsa ahime.

Ajeh chu amaho hin keima jah a aseiyuva,‘Eilamkai dinguvin keiho ding pathen tam pi neisempeh-uvin; ajeh chu hiche Mose kitipa, Egypt gama kona eihin puidoh pau chu, achung changa ipi thu soh hi tam, keihon kahetapouve,’ ti geiya jong anaseiyu ahiye.

Hijeh a chu keiman jong ajah-uva kaseiya, ‘Sana bilba neichan chun sut lhauvin,’ katileh, amahon hita chu keima eipehuva, chua keiman jong sana chu meilhum sunga kalhajola ahileh, hiche bongnou lim hi hung sohdohjeng ahi,” atin aseitai.
Mose’n jong mipi chu Aaron’in analha thang jeh a chu amelmateu lah a akijumsona dinguva kilha thangsoh ahitauve, ti amudoh phat’in,

Mose atahsa tah-in ngahmun kelkot phungbula chun adingin, “Pakai dinga pang den jing miho koi koi nahiuvam, keima henga hunguvin,” tin akoutai. Hichun Levi chapate abonchauvin acham chamin Mose henga ahung kikhomsoh heluvin ahi.

Hichun Mose’n amaho jah a aseitai, “Pakai, Israel Pathenin hitin thu aseiye, ‘Pasal jousen apangpeh a chemjam kiko cheh hen lang, ngahmun chu kelkot lang khat’a pat kelkot lang khat geiyin phet lengsoh uhen, anung amaa longtou hen, pasala gimnam chun asopipa kithau hen; pasal tapou chun aloipa kithau hen, chule pasal jousen ainheng agalveng pa kithasoh keiyu hen,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chutah chun Levi chapaten Mose thusei bang bang chun aboluvin, mi athauva ahileh, hiche nikhole le chun mihem sang thum tobang athigam tauve.

Chuin Mose’n jong aseiyin, “Tuni nikhoa hi nanghon nacham chamuva Pakai kinbola pan theina dinga, mi a bang bangin achapa ham, chule abang hangman asopipa atha jenga, hita chu Pakaiyin tuni nikhoa hi nachunguva phatthei ahinboh na dinga kithensona nabolu ahitai,” atipeh-e.

Ajing nikhon Mose’n jong mipi jah a thu aseiyin, “Nanghon chonsetna melse tah naboldoh tauve; hijeh a chu tua hi keima Pakai henga chetou ding kahi; ahitheiya ahileh nangho chonsetna chu kathoi dampeh ding nahiuve,” ati.
Hijeh chun Mose chu Pakai henga ahung kile kit nin chule aseitai, “Ohe, hiche mite hi melse tah in anachonseuvin, acham chamuvin pathen tamtah sanan anakisemdoh tauve.

Hijeng tajong leh tun Pakai nangman ahitheiya ahileh achonsetnau hi ngaidam tei teiyin; ngaidam thei louhel ahi ding vangleh, nahenga katao ahiye, nangman nasutsa hiche lekhabua kon chun keima min noi mang hel jengin,” tin ataotai.
Ahivangin Pakai chun Mose jah a aseipeh in, “Koi koi hijeng jongleh keima douna chonsepa chubou keiman kalekhabua kona hiche michonsepa chu, kanoi mang ding ahi.

Hijeh chun nangma tun chen lang, keiman najah a kaseipeh na, hiche mun gei chun mipi khu galamkai tan; vetan, keima Vantil chu nangma masanga lamkai ding ahinai; ahin keiman kahung vil tenguleh hiche mite chonsetna chu achunguva kavil tha cheh ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun mipin Aaron chu bongnou lim anasemsah jal uvin Pakaiyin jong gamna hise ahinlan sah tai.

Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin, “Kipatdoh jengin lang hichea kon hin chetoutan, nangma nahin, chule Egypt gama kona nahin puidohsa mipi hi ahiuvin, keiman Abraham le Isaac chule Jacob henga kana kihahsela, ‘Nason nachilhah teu kapeh ding ahi,’ tia kanaseisa hiche gamsung chu jontou tauvin.
Keiman namasanga Vantil khat sol ing ting, hita chu keiman Canaan mite le Amor mite, Hit mite, Periz mite, Hivi mite, chule Jebus mite chu kadeldoh ding ahi.
Bongnoi le khoiju lonna gam chu jontou tauvin; keiman vang katahsa tah a kalhonpi lou ding nahi; ijeh-inem itileh nangma hi milouchal nahijeh-in, lampi dunga kamoh bahgam lo bep ding nahi,” ati.
Mipin hiche thuse kisei chengse chu ajah doh phat’uvin akap cheh tauve; hiti chun mihem khatcha jong akijepna chengsea kijem aumtapouvin ahi.

Chuin Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin, “Israel chate jah a seipeh tan, ‘Nangho hi milouchalte nahiuvin, phat chomcha kah jengcha hijongleh keiman nakilhon toupiu ving hileng, keiman kabahgam jeng ding nahiuve. Hijeh chun tun nachunga konin nakijepna chengse chu sut lhan, chutengle keiman nangma chu ikalo ding nahi kahet thei ding ahi,’ ati tin seipeh tan,” ati.
Hichejeh chun Horeb molsanga pat Israel chaten achunguva kai akijepna chengseu abonchan asut lhasoh heltauve.

Mose chun ponbuh chu alahjia, ngahmun pam lam peh, ngahmuna kona gamla tah khat’a hi anasonji ahiye; chule hiche ponbuh ason chu kikhopna ponbuh ahi, tia anaseiji ahi. Chule koi koi hileh Pakai holnom jouse chu, ngahmun pam lama kisong kikhopna ponbuh geiya chu gache tei tei ding ahi.

Chujongle Mose chu ponbuh a kona apotdoh tih tih chuleh mipi abonchauva dingdoh soh heluva, amitakip chu ama ama ponbuh kotpi phungbula dingden soh keiyuva, Mose chu ponbuh sunga alut lhum tokahsea chu anung nung chu a vet vet jeng jiu ahi.
Ponbuh sunga chu Mose alut lhum tih tih leh meibang lom chu ahung kitol lha jin, ponbuh kotpi phungbula chun akingan, chutah leh Pakaiyin Mose chu akihoupi jin ahi.

Mipin abonchauva meibang lom chu ponbuh kotpi phungbula ahung kingah amuteng leh, mipi chu abonchauva thoudoh soh keiyuva, amitakip ama ama ponbuh kotpi phungbul cheh a chu chibai aboh cheh jiu ahiye.

Hiti chun mihem khat nin agolpa akihoupi tobang khun Pakaiyin Mose chu anaki houpi jin ahi. Mose chu ngahmun sunga ahung nung lut kit tengleh, alhacha pang, Nun chapa, Joshua kitipa gollhangpa chu, ponbuh a konin apotdoh ji tapon ahi.

Mose’n jong Pakai henga aseiyin, “Vetan, nangma mong mongin kajah a naseiyin, ‘Hiche mite hi hinpui touvin’ natin; ahinla koipen hitoh keima neisol tha ding ham, ti neihetsah poi. Hiti vang hin nangman nanaseiye, ‘Keiman nang hi namina kahetsa nahinai, chujongle nangman keima lung lhaina namutai,’ nati.

Hichejeh chun chuta nangma mitmua lung lhaina chang kahileh, nahenga katao ahiye, keiman nangma kahet thema chule namitmua lung lhaina kachan jing theina dingin, nalampi dih jouse chu neihil tan. Chujongle hiche mite hi namite ahiye, ti jong hi geldoh jing jengin,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin jong, “Keima mi umpina chu nangtoh kilhon jing ding, chule keiman nangma hi choldona kapeh tei ding nahi,” ati.
Chuphat nin Mose’n jong Pakai jah a aseiyin, “Ahinai, nangma mi umpinan eilhonpi lou dinga ahivang leh, hikoma konin keiho neipui doh da tauvin.

Ajeh chu keima jong namite jong nangma mitmun lung lhaina kachanguve, ti chu ipi danga iti kihetdoh thei ding ham? Nangman keiho neilhonpi jeh uva chu keiho hi achombeh kahiuve, keima jong namite jong, leiset chung cheng midang jouse sanga hi achomhel kahiuve, ti kihetdoh na ding hilou ding ham?” ati.

Chutah chun Pakaiyin Mose jah a aseitai, “Nangman naseipen tah hiche hi keiman kabol ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh kei mitmun nangma lung lhaina nachangtan, chujeh chun ken jong nangma naminin kahetai,” ati.
Chuin Mose’n aseiyin, “Nahenga kataove, naloupina chu neivet sah tei teiyin,” atileh;

Pakaiyin jong aseiyin, “Keiman kaloupina chengse abonchan namasang sang a kitolsah ing ting, chujongle nangma masanga chu keima min ‘Pakai’ kiti chu kasap peh ding; chule kalungset dingpa chu kalungset’a, kahepi dingpa chu kahepina kamusah ding ahi.
chujongle aman aseiyin, ‘Amavang nangman kamai namu thei louhel ding ahi; ajeh chu mihemin keima eimua ahile hing louhel ding ahibouve,” ati.
Chule Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Vetan, kakoma hin nangma dingin mun khat aonge, hiche songpi chunga hi nangma nadin ding ahi;
hita chu keima loupina ahung kitol tengleh, keiman nangma chu songpi khi kah a kasel ding, keiman kajotdoh kahsea chu nangma kakhut’a kalekhu ding nahi;
kajotdoh nung vangleh kakhut kalah doh ding ahitan, hichea chu nangman kanung lambou namu ding ahiye; itijongleh kamai chu kimu thei louhel ding ahiye,” ati.

Pakai chun Mosejah a thu aseiyin, “Amasa tobang bang chun song pheng ni sui temin; hiche song pheng teni chunga chu, nangman nasekehsa song pheng masa teni chunga kisun thu cheng chengse chu keiman kasut kit ding ahi.
Chule kigosan um jingin lang jingkah teng, Sinai molsang chunga khun jingkah tengleh hung kaltouvin lang, nachamtah in molsang vuma khun keima koma hung ding temin.

Mihem koima chan nahin kilhontoupi thei louhel ding chujongle molsang pumpia chu mihem koima kilulah thei louhel ding ahi; kelngoi honte hihen lang gancha honho hijongleh molsang masanga chu nalhatsah louhel ding ahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun Mose’n jong amasa a tobang bang chun song pheng ni asuitai; chule ajing jingkah chu matah-in athouvin, Pakaiyin athupeh bang chun Sinai molsang chunga akaltoutai; chujongle song pheng teni chu akhut’a akichoiyin ahi.
Molvuma chun Pakai chu meibang lomin ahung kum lhan Mose toh ading khomtai, chule Pakai min chu ahinphong jalin ahi.
Pakai chu Mose masanga achepehin, aseiphong peh peh in, “Pakai, Pakai, hepi them leh lungset them Pathen, lung hangvah lou, lungset long louhel leh kitahna bulhingset,

mi asang sang dinga jong lungsetna long louhela neijing thei, themmona le suhkhelna chule chonset ngaidam jing, ahivanga themmona mohseh a mansah louhela mipate themmona jengjong achate chunga, atute chung geiya phul jing thei, khang thum khang li geiya jong phul jing jeng thei ahi,” ati.
Chuin Mose jong tollam ngan akun pai jengin chibai aboh pai paitan ahi.

Chujongle Mose’n aseiyin, “Vo Pakai, tua hi keiman nangma mitmua lung lhaina kanei khattouva ahileh, nahenga katao ahiye, Pakai chu, keiho milouchalte kahijeng vanguvin, keiho lah a hung jeng hen; chuti chun kathemmonau leh kachonsetnau nei ngaidam uvin lang, keiho hi nangma goulo dingin neilauvin,” ati.

Hichun Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Vetan, keiman nangto kitepna kasemgot ahitai. Namite masanga hi keiman thil kidang tah tah kabol ding ahin, hitobang thil kidang ho hi leiset chunga soh khalou laihel, koimacha nam mite lah a jong sohkha louhel lai thil ahi; nalah-uva nachenna miten abonchauva Pakai thilbol chu amusoh keidiu ahiye; ijeh-inem keiman nangma toh kabol ding hiche thil hi tijat umtah thil ahi.
“Tunia keiman nangma kathupeh hi phatechan melchih jing jengin. Neihin vetan, keiman nangma masanga Amor mite, Canaan mite, Hit mite, Periz mite, Hivi mite, chule Jebus mite kadelmang ding ahi.
Nangle nang kichih theiyin, ajole nachena lam lama cheng agamsung mite toh kitepna khattou hinsem khan natin, hiche kitepna chu nangma dinga kipalna hung panlo thei ahiye.
Hijeh a chu nanghon agamsung mite maicham jouse nasuhjal peh uva, akhompi song kiphut chengse jong navohboh peh diu, chule Asher doi akisemthuu jong chu naphuhsoh hel dingu ahi,
ijeh-inem itileh nangman pathen chom chibai naboh thei lou ding ahi; ipijeh-inem itileh amin thangtom kiti Pakai chu Pathen thangtom tah ahiye,

ajole nangman agamsunga chengte toh kitepna anasemin natin, amahon apathen semthu hou umchan athouva amaho kijoh uva, hiche apathen semthu hou henga chu kilhaina abol tenguleh mi khattouvin nangma nahin kouvin natin, nakoupa kilhaina gancha sa chu anane get nin nate;

chujongle nangman nachapate ji dingin agam mite chanu ho chu anapui peh get’in natin, achanu jouseu apathen semthu hou umchan athouva akijoh bang khun, amaho pathen semthuho umchan thouvin tin nachapate chu amaho le amaho hung kijoh get uvinte.
“Nangman nacham chama pathen lim kilhajol chu nakisem thei louhel ding ahi.

“Nangman cholsolou changlhah kut chu naman jing ding ahi. Keiman nangma kathupeh bang banga chu aphat kitep phat, Abib lhasunga chu ni sagi sunga nangman cholsolou changlhah naneh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche Abib kiti lhasunga chu nangma Egypt gama kona hung potdoh nahitai.
Naobu hintumkeh masa jouse chu aboncha keiya ahiye, nanga ahi kiti achal jouse chu, gancha hihen, bongle kelngoi soh masa hijongleh.

Sangan soh masa chu nangman kelngoi khat’a nalhatdoh ding, ijemtia nalhatdoh lou dinga ahileh sangan nou chu angong naheboh peh ding ahiye. Chujongle nachapate apeng masa chan chu nalhatdoh tei tei ding ahin, koimacha keima henga akhut goh keova hung kithah lut thei louhel ding ahiye.
“Nigup sunga nangman na natoh ding, ni sagi lhin ni vang leh nakicholdo ding ahi; loukai khoh laitah hihen lang lho lhun khoh cheh laitah hijongleh nakicholdo tei tei ding ahiye.
Nangman ni sagi lhinseh a kibolji kut chu nanit jinga, suhlou chang lhung masa kut jong nabol jing ding, kum kichai teng jongleh muchi chivo khoptup kut kiti jong chu naman jing jeng ding ahi.
Kum kha’t sunga namite pasal jouse chu thumvei cheh Pakai, Pathen, Israel Pathen angsunga kilulah cheh ding ahiuve.

Ijeh-inem itileh keiman namasanga namtin vaipi jouse kadelmanga, chuta chu nangma gamgi kakeh let ding ahi; hijeh a chu kum khat sunga Pakai na-Pathen angsunga gakilulah dinga nachetou kah lah a chu koimachan jong nagamsung chu lahpeh dinga adeichat lou ding ahitai.
“Keima henga kilhaina kithat sa thisan chu nangman cholsosa toh nahal khom louhel ding, kalchuh kut’a dinga kithat kilhaina sa jong chu jingkah geiya kikoi thei louhel ding ahi.
Nagam leiset ga masa lah a aga masapen tah chu nangman Pakai na-Pathen insunga nahin poh lut tei tei ding ahiye. Kelnou jong chu api noitwiya nahon thei louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin, “Nangman thu kisei hicheng hi abonchan sundoh in; thu hicheng dungjuiya hi keiman nangma le Israel toh kitepna kanasem ahiye,” ati.

Hikoma chun Mose jong nisom li le jansom li sungin Pakai chutoh anaum khome; hiche sungse chun Mose’n an jong anepon, twi jong adonpoi. Hiti chun kitepna thu jouse, thupeh som khat chu Mose’n song pheng teni chunga chun anasundoh tai.

Sinai molsang chunga kona Mose ahung kumlhah chun, hettohsahna song pheng teni chu akhut’a akichoiyin molsanga kona ahung kumsuh a ahileh, Mose’n Pathen to agakihou hou jeh a amaivun jouse avahpem pum lam chu anahepoi.
Ahin Aaron le Israel chate jousen Mosechu amudoh phat’uvin vetan, Mose chu amai avahpem pum jengin ahileh, amahon akichauvin ahenga ahung nailut ngam tapouve.
Hichun Mose’n jong amaho chu ahinkouvin ahileh, hiche phat chun Aaron le khoppi lamkaiho chu abonchauvin Mose henga ahung kinung le kit’uvin, hiti chun Mose’n jong amaho chu akihoulim pin ahi.
Hichejou chun Israel chate jousen ahin nailut cheh uvin, chuin Mose’n amaho chu Sinai molsang chunga Pakaiyin ama akihoulim pi na jouse abonchan Israel mite chu thupeh bangin apeh thon ahi.
Hita chu Mose’n jong amaho jah a thu aseichai phat chun amai lekhu dingin ponlu akikhuh tai;

ahin Mose chu Pakaito kihoulim dinga aangsunga alut tih tih leh, ahungdoh kit kahsen amaidal ponlukhuh chu akilahdoh jin ahi; hijeh chun Mose chu ahungdoh a Pakaiyin ama chu ipipen ahinseipeh ham, ti Israel chate chu aseipeh teng leh,
Israel chaten Mose mai chu amu uvin, Mose maivun chu avahpem pum jin ahi; chujou tengleh Mose’n jong Pakaito kihoulim kit dinga anung lut kit kahsen amai khuna ponlukhuh chu akikhuh jin ahi.
Mose’n Israel chate khoppi pumpi chu abonchauvin akoukhomsoh keiyin chuin ajah uva aseitai, “Thil hichengpi hi Pakaiyin nangho toh dinga nathupeh sau ahitai.

Toh ding chan chu nigup sunga kitong ding, ni sagi lhin ni vang chu nangho dinga nitheng ni ahin, pumchola kicholdona hi ding, Pakaiya thensosa ahitai. Koi koi hijongleh chuche nikhoa natoh khattou anatong khapen pen chu thadoh jeng ding ahiye.
Cholngah nikho chuleh nanghon na in sung jouseuva jong mei jeng jong natikong louhel diu ahiye,” ati.
Mose’n Israel chate khoppi pumpi jah a chun aseitai, “Pakaiyin athupeh a asei chu hiche hi ahi.
Nanghon Pakai henga thilto dingin naneiyu chu dong khomuvin; koi koi hijengjongleh Pakaiya thilto nom jouse chun hinchoi hen; sana jong dangka jong, chule sum-eng jong;
pondum jong, ponsandup jong, phatah a kilhuh tupat pon jong, kelchate mul jong,
julnemsa cheh kelngoichal ho vun le kelcha vun ho jong, thinggi thing jong,
vah ding thaotwi jong, kinunam ding thao namtui ahin, chujongleh halnam ding gimnamtui jong,
song mantam ho leh tun ding song ho jong, chule konggah a pang ding le omphoa pang dingjong ahi.
“Nalah-uva mi khut them jouse chu hungdoh-uvin lang Pakai thupehsa thil jouse hi abonchan semsah jenguvin; houbuh ahin,
aponbuh ding ahin, abuh chung khu ding ahin, athihkol chengse leh akol chengse ahin, ajol jouse leh akhompi chengse ahin, chule akhom todop chengse jong ahin;
thingkong le aputna ding moljol teni ahin, hepi touna ahin, chule pondal akhu khumna kimang chu ahin;
dokhang le amoljol ho, chule dokhanga manchah chengse toh ahin, changlhah kitohdohsa ahin,
meivahna dinga thaomei khom leh amanchah chengse toh, chule athaomeiho toh ahin, chujongleh detvah ding thaotwi jong ahi;
chule gimnamtui lhut namna maicham le amoljol ho toh, kinu ding thaotwi le halnam ding gimnamtui toh, chujongle houbuh kotpi phung a dal ding kot-pondal a man ding toh,
pumgo thilto halvamna ding maicham le amanchah athilkeo jouse ahin, kisilna kong le a kong tunna toh ahin;
lhong dunga khai ding chengse ahin, akikhaina khomho leh akhom todop chengse ahin, chule lhong mong kelkot’a dah ding pondal jong ahin;
houbuh kilmatna abil chengse leh lhong kilmatna ding abil chengse ahin, chule akhaojang chengse chutoh ahin;
munthenga kinbol teng leh manchah dinga nal tah a kikhong von chengse toh, thempu kinbolna a panna dinguva thempu Aaron vontheng chengse le achapate kivonna chengse toh abonchan semsah uvin,” ati.
Israel chate khoppi chu abonchauvin Mose angsunga konin apot doh tauve.

Chule amaho lah a alungthimu kitil khou jouse leh lhagaovin atildoh chan chu ahunguvin, kikhopna ponbuh a manchah ding leh akinbolna jousea manchah ding, chule kivonna thenga manchah dingin Pakai henga thilto ding ahin choitauve,

Hiti chun Israel chate lah a alungthima thanom jousen anumei apasalin, ahung kitol toluvin, heojang ho, bilba ho, khutjem ho ahin, chaokol ho jong, sanaa kisem thil ho jeng jong ahin ahin choiyuvin, amichan cheh-uvin Pakai henga sana chu thilto din ahung toh soh keiyuve.
Chujongle mihem tapou pon adum le asandup, asan-ao, tupatpon, kelchamul, kelngoichalte vun julnemsa ho, kelcha vun ho jong anei jousen abonchan ahinchoi soh heluvin ahi.

Hiti chun koi hijongle dangka le sum-eng thilto dinga toh jou ho jong chun Pakaiya thilto ding chun ahinchoi cheh uvin ahi; chujongle ipi bolna kimang hijongleh thinggi thing toh kimudoh tha chanjong chun ahinchoi jenguve.

Chule aboljou chanin jong akhut tah-uvin pat-them aboluvin, chutengleh apat-them boldoh sau chu ipi hijongleh adum hi hen lang asandup hihen lang, asan-ao hihen chule lhuhsa tupat kilhuh hijongleh ahinchoisoh keiyuvin ahi;
chule alungthimuva bol theina hung kondoh numei jousen jong abonchauvin kelchate mul alhuh-uvin ahi.
Mipi lamkaiho jong chun konggah a ba ding leh omphoa beh dingin onyx song le song man tam dang dang ahin choiyun;
gimnamtui jong, vah ding thaotwi jong, kinu ding thaotwi jong chule halnam ding gimnamtui jong ahin choiyuve.

Israel chate numeiho ahiuvin pasal ho ahiuvin, Pakaiyin Mose thu ahinpeh a bol ding ahi, tia aseisa chu bolna dinga alungthim kitilkhou chan chun apeh nom chanu thilto chu ipi hijeng jong leh Pakai henga amahon thanom tah a athilto diuvin ahinchoi choi jenguve.
Israel chate jah a chun Mose’n aseiyin, “Veuvin, Judah phunga Hur chapa, Uri chapa Bezalel chu Pakaiyin aminin akoutai;
chujongle Pakaiyin Bezalel chu Pathen lhagao adipset tan, hijeh chun amapa thilbol theitah, lung chingtah, hetna neitah leh khut themtah ahitai:
hijeh chun ama chu thil jep jong a themin, sana le dangka chule sum-engin jong thil ajem jem theiye:
phu ding song tampi jong akheng themin, thing jeppol jong athemin, khut themna jouse chu athemsoh heltai.
Chule Pakaiyin Bezalel chu ahin, Dan phunga mi Ahismach chapa Oholiab chu ahin, anigel lhona chu mihil thei ahilhon na dinga ahu alhakhum lhon ahitai.

Hita chu Pakaiyin amani chu natoh ijakai themna apeh a, thing thembol mi thepna jong, thil lim gondol them mi, themna jong, pon jeppol them in adum le asandup, asan-ao thim, chule tupat’a pon ajep tobanga ponkhui themna jong apeh lhon ahiye: hita hi Bezalel le Oholiab chun thil ijakai abol theisoh hel lhon ahitai.

Bezalel le Oholiab toh chule muntheng tundohna dinga Pakaiyin alung sunga thilbol theina leh chihna chujongle akibol ding dol hetna apeh pasala kaiyin Pakai thupeh chengse dungjui bang banga chu atoh diu ahiye.” ati.
Chuin Mose’n jong Bezalel le Oholiab toh chule Pakaiyin alung sunga thilbol theina apeh thil bolthei cheh pasala kaileh anatong dinga alungthim sunga kitilkhouna nei chan chu abonchan akouvin;

chuti chun amaho jong chun Mose angsunga konin muntheng tundohna dinga anatohna ding, tia Israel chaten acham chamuva ahintodoh sau thilto chengse chu akilah’uvin ahi. Hiche nung jong chun Israel miten ajingkahsim ajingkah seh le Mose henga acham chamuvin thilto ding ahinchoi choi jenguvin,
hijeh chun thilbol theina neiya munthenga dinga natonga pang pasal ho chu, natoh ijakai tonga pang ahiuvin, amitakip cheh chun anatoh banuva konin Mose henga ahunguvin
chule Mose henga chun aseitauve, “Mipi hin Pakaiyin keiho toh dia eithupeh chengseu kabolman sanguva tamjo ahinchoi tauve.” tin aseitauve.

Chuphat nin Mose’n jong thu apen, ama thupeh chu ngahmun thongsoh helin akisam phongle tan, “Munthenga ding thilto din pasal hihen lang numei hijongle thil imacha tobe da tahen,” tin akiphongtai. Hiche phat chun mipin athiltou chu angatauve.
Ijeh-inem itileh amahon athil todoh sau aneijat’u chu atam lheh jeng tan, natoh ding jouse josohna dingin jong alhingset jengtan ahi.

Natongho lah a thilbol thei cheh pasalse se chun pondal som khat amanguvin poubuh chu a song tauve; hichea pondala amanhou chu lhuhsa tupat jenga kikhong, adum le asandup chule asan-ao thim cheh ahin, khut themna tah a cherub lim tampi kijempah soh hel ahiye.
Pondal khat cheh chu adung tong som ni le tong get alhingin, avai lam pondal khat khat chu tong li li alhinge; hiti chun pondal ho chu akibangsoh keiyuvin ahi.
Chuin aman pondal nga chu pondal khat le khat akilmat cheh-in, chule adang pondal nga ma jong chu pondal khat le khat akilmat cheh kit’e.

Chuin amasa pondal kijong jon lah a apam nungpen geigola chun abil-hom tam pi adum jengin asemin, hitobang bang chun pondal golni lhinna akijong jon lah a pondal pam nungpen geigola jong chun abil-hom tampi adum man asempeh-e.

Hiti chun pondal jong jon masa a chun abil-hom som nga asempeh-in, chutobangma chun pondal kijong jon golni lhinna a jong chun abil-hom som nga ma asempeh in ahi; hiche abil-hom chengse chu khat le khat kimaito cheh ahiuve.
Hichun aman jong sana kol som nga akolin, hiche sanakol chengse chun pondal ho chu khat le khat akilmat soh keiyin ahileh, houbuh chu buh khatseh seh bou ahung hidoh tai.
Aman houbuh chunga chu ponbuh a son dingin kelchate mulin pondal agong kit’in, hiti chun pondal som le khat asemdoh tai.
Pondal khat cheh chu adung tong somthum alhingin, chule pondal khat cheh chu avai tong li li alhingin ahi, hiti chun pondal som le khat chu alet aneo akibang soh keiye.
Aman pondal nga chu khat le khat akilmatsoh keiyin, chule pondal amoh chengse gup jong chu khat le khat akilmatsoh kei kit’e.
Chuin aman pondal gol masa a pondal ponung pen among geigola chu abil-hom som nga asemin, chule akijopmat pi ding pondal dangho mong geigoJa jong chu abil-hom som nga ma asempeh in ahi.
Chujouvin ponbuh chu buh khatseh seh a akisondoh theina dingin akilmatna ding sum-eng kol som nga asempeh-in ahi.
Chuin ponbuh khuna ding chun kelngoichal ho vun ho chuleh kelcha vun ho akijulnemsa chengse achung khuna dingin asemtai.
Chujouvin aman jong houbuh a pang ding chun akitung jangkei ding akung phabep pi thinggi thing jengin asuiyin ahi.
Akung khat chu adung tong som alhingin, akung khat khat chu avai tong khat le tongkeh alhinge.
Akung khat cheh chun akitona ding among tenia ako le abil anei cheh-in, hichea chu kijopmat mat ahiye; houbuh a pang ding akung jouse chu hitobang chun asemsoh keiyin ahi.
Houbuh a pang ding thilkung ho chu hita hi asem ahiye: lhang langa pang ding akung som ni, ahin

chule aman akung som nia pang ding chun dangka, akitunna ding, ako le abil tomna ding chun, som li asemin, kung khat’a ako le abila pang dinga chu atomna ni cheh asem ahi; hitobanga chu akung khat dinga jong chu atomna ni ma ma hijah ahi.
Chule houbuh lang khat’a pang ding chun, asah lam gola chun aman akung som ni ma asem kit’in,
akitunna diu khom tomna dangka a kisem som li chutoh, khom khat dinga atunna ni ni ding, chujongle akung khat cheh dinga chu atunna ni ma ma asemin ahi.
Chuin houbuh anung langa pang ding chun aman akung gup asempeh-in,
houbuh tom lang aning tenia pang din akung ni ma ma asem kit’in ahi.
Hiche akung ho chu abul lam achom chom ahinan, alulam chu avelkol masapena chu kijop mat cheh ahiuve; hiti chun aning tenia pang ding chun akung teni chu hitobang chun asemtai.
Hichea chun akitunna dangka chutoh kisimtha cheh-in akung get alhingtai; akung khat’a pang dingin akitunna ni ni ahin, abonchan a kitunna som le gup alhinge.
Chujouvin aman thinggi thingin golvai asuiyin, houbuh lang khat’a pang ding akung chengsea ding chun golvai nga asuiyin ahi,
chutima chun houbuh lang khat lama pang ding jong chun akung jousea din golvai nga ma asuiyin, houbuh lhumlam anung lama akung chengsea pang dingin jong golvai nga ma ma asuiyin ahi.
Chuin aman alaigol dingin among lang khat’a kona alang khat mong lang geiya golpai din, akung ho akimlai geiya pang dingin alaigol khat asuiye.
Hiti chun akungse se chu sanan atomjol soh keiyin, chule asanakol chengse jong chu agolvaiho khut’a matna dingin asemin, chuti chun golvai chengse jong chu sanan atomjolsoh keiye.
Abuh khuna dingin aman pondum le ponsandup, asan-ao thim chule tupat ponnem akhongin, hiche pon lukhuna chu khut themtah-in cherub lim tampi akhui khumin ahi.

Chule hichea pang ding chun thinggi thing cheh khom li asuiyin, hiche khomho chu sanan aloijolsel in ahi; hicheho kikhaina ding akol ho chu sana jeng ahin, chujongle akhom li ding chun atunna ding dangka khom todop li alhajolin ahi.
Aman ponbuh kotdal pon dingin adumle asandup, asanao thim, chule lhuhsa tupat’a kikhong pon akhongin, hiche chu heojangin phatechan akijempah bet jengin ahi;
chule akhom li jong chu akikhaina ding akol chengse chutoh ahithauve. Aman akhom Iujum chengse leh akitomatna chengse chu sanan atomsoh keiyin, akitunna ding khom todop nga vang chu sum-eng jeng ahi.
Bezalel chun thingkong ding chu thinggi thing jengin asemin, adung lam tong ni le tongkeh alhingin, avai lam chu tong khat le tongkeh alhinge; chule atun chu tong khat le tongkeh ma alhingin ahi.
Chuin aman asung le apo chu sana thengselin atomjolin, akimvela chun sanan ajempol chet nin ahi.
Chule aning lia pang dingin sana chaokol li alhan, apang lang khat’a chaokol ni apangin, apang lang khat ma chaokol ni ma apange.
Chuin moljol ni asuiyin, athing chu thinggi thing ahin, hiche jong chu sanan atomjolin ahi,
chule thingkong putna dingin moljol teni chu thingkong pang langtoa chaokol li sunga chun athillut’in ahi.
Chujouvin sana thengselin hepi touna khat asemin, adung chu tong ni le tongkeh alhingin, avai lam chu tong khat le tongkeh alhinge.
Chule sana sehcha a kikhengsan cherub lim ni asemin, hepi touna mong lang tenia chu hiche cheruh teni chu asem ahiye,
among lang khat’a chun cherub khat atouvin, among lang khat ma chun cherub khat ma atouve; among lang tenia chun aman cherub teni chu hepi touna chutoh tikhat’in asemdoh jengin ahi.

Cherub teni chun alhaving teni chung lam ngan ajah lhonin, hepi touna chu alhaving tenin alekhu lhone, chule amani chu amai le amai aki ngat to lhonin ahi; cherub teni maiyin hepi touna lam chu angan ahi.
Bezalel chun dokhang jong chu thinggi thingin asemin ahi; adung lam tong ni alhingin, avai lam tong khat lhing ahin, chule atun chu tong khat le tongkeh alhinge;
chule dokhang chu sana thengselin atomjol selin, ageigola chun sana kijempol abeh peh-in ahi.
Chule dokhang kimvel kol chun akol ding khutchong tebep khat asempeh-in, hiche akol jeng jong chu akimvel kolin sanan ajempah bet jengin ahi.
Aman dokhanga manchah ding chun sana chaokol li alhan, hiche chaokol ho chu dokhang ning lia akeng lia chun abapeh-in ahi.
Chule chaokol ho chu akol chutoh kinai tah-in akibat’in, hiche ho chu dokhang putna dinga moljol teni thil lutna pang ding ahiuve.
Hiti chun aman dokhang putna dingin thinggi thingjengin moljol asuiyin, abonchan sanan atomjol cheh-in ahi.

Chujongleh aman dokhang chunga manchah ding jouse jong chu sana thengselin asemin, akong ho ahin gimnamtui halnam nading lheng ho ahin, chule akhon ho jong lengpitwi chapna ding khonjom ho chu: abonchan sanan atomsoh keiyin ahi.

Bezalel chun thaomei khom ding jong sana thengselin asemin ahi. Thaomei khom tunna ding leh aputna ding moljol jong chu phatecha sehcha a kikhengtohsa cheh ahilhone. Alutom le alujum dung ho chule apahcha chengse chu aboncha athaomei khom chutoh tikhat hicheh ahiuve.
Thaomei khom ajet le aveiya konin a bah thum thum ahung kehdoh-in, hiti chun a bah agom gomin gup alhinge,

alang khat abah thum chun jonmot ga banga kisem achal thum le alujum chutoh chule apah toh anei cheh-in, alang khat bah thuma jong chu chutobangma chun jonmot ga tobanga achal thum le alujum toh chule apah chutoh anei cheh-uve: hitobang chun thaomei khoma kon chun abah gup chu ahung kitungdoh-uvin ahi.
Athaomei khompi mong mong chun jonmot ga tobanga kisem achal li aneiyin, alujum le apah chutoh ahitha cheh-in ahi.
Chule thaomei khoma kona hung kehdoh cheh abah gup sunga abah tokhat khat noiya alujum cheh chutoh tikhat ahidoh peh cheh-in ahi.
Alujumu leh a bah chengseu jong chu akhom chutoh tikhat ahisoh keiyuvin ahi; athaomei khom pumpi chu sana thengsel sehcha a kikhengtohsa pum khatseh seh bou ahiye.
Hiti chun aman thaomei sagi chutoh ameikhao chetanna chengse chutoh, chule adopna ho chu sana thengsel cheh-in asemin ahi.
Hiche thaomei khom chu ahin, amanchah ding jouse chutoh ahin sana thengsel talent khat’a asemdoh ahiye.

Bezalel in gimnamtui halnam na dingin maicham khat thinggi thing jengin asemin ahi; amaicham chu adung lam tong khat alhingin, avai lam jong tong khat ma alhingin ahi; maicham chu abemin, aning li nei ahin, atun chu tong ni asange; chule asaki chengse jong chu amaicham chutoh tikhat ahijenge.

Aman maicham chu sana thengselin atomjol soh keiyin, achung lam jong ajet avei apang teni jong, chule asaki chengse jong atomsoh keiye; chuin akimvel lhungsoh keiyin sana kijempah bet khat abeh peh-in,
hiche sana kijempah noiya akol chunga pang ding chun aman sana chaokol ni asemin, akilang ton akhaiyin, maicham putna man dingin abil din apansah-in ahi.
Hiti chun aman amoljol ho jong chu thinggi thing jengin asemin, sanan atomsoh keiyin ahi.
Bezalel chun kinu ding thaotwi jong asemin, chule gimnamtui thengsel jong halnam dingin asemin, thao sem thempa thilsem bang tah-in asemdoh-in ahi.

Bezalel chun thinggi thing jengin pumgo thilto govamna ding maicham jong asemin ahi; maicham chu adung tong nga alhingin, avai tong nga ma alhingin ahi; amaicham chu a bem in aning li nei ahi, chule atun chu tong thum asangin ahi.
Maicham ning lia chun aman saki li asempeh-in, asakiho chuleh maicham chu tikhat ahin, chule maicham chu aman sum-engin atomjol selin ahi.

Chuin maichama manchah ding jouse jong asemsoh keiyin, bel ho jong, vutkhe ho jong, kong ho jong, sumkhe kapal ho jong, chule khangbel ho jong chu asemsoh keiyin ahi; hichengse chu aboncha sum-eng jenga kisem ahiuve.
Aman maichama pang ding chun thuh khuh khat asemin, thuhjol noiya chun akimlai don geiyin sum-eng kipheh khat hi apansah in ahi.
Chule ajol ho dopna ding aning li nei ahi, chule atun chu tong thum ding chun sumkol kolli alhan ahi;
hiche thuhjol chengse jong chu thinggi thing jenga asuiya aboncha chu sum-eng jenga atomjolsoh kei ahi.
Chuin aman maicham jet le veiya kibat sumkol chengse sunga chun ajol ho chu athil lut’in aputna nei dingin asempeh-in ahi; maicham chu atonsah-in agei ahoipeh-in ahiye.
Bezalel chun kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula lhacha a pangji numeiho phatvet tokhomhoa kon chun kisilna kong khat le akong tunna ding chun sum-eng jengin asemdoh tan ahi.
Bezalel chun inkimpal jong akaiyin, pal lhang lama khai ding pondal chengse chu tupat ponnem jenga kikhong ahin, tong jakhat alhingset’in ahi;
apalkhom chengse chu som ni alhingin, atunna ding som ni ma ma alhingin, sum-enga kisem ahicheh-uvin, ahin apalkhom chengse akikhaina ding abil ho chuleh akitona ding jouseu chu dangka jeng jeng ahi.

Chule palsah lama ding jong chu tong jakhatma ahin, apalkhom jong som ni ahin, atunna ding jong som ni ma ahin, sum-eng jenga kisem ahi; ahin apalkhom ho khaina ding abil ho chu ahin akitona ding chengse chutoh ahin abonchan dangka jenga kitom ahiye.

Chutengleh lhumlam pala khai ding pondal jong chu tong som nga alhingin, apalkhom jong som khat ahin, akhom todop jong som khat ma alhinge; palkhom khaina ding abil ho le akitona ding jouse chu dangka jenga kitom ahi cheh uvin ahi.
Chule amailam niso lama pang ding pondal jong chu tong som nga alhingin ahi.
Kelkot’a pat alang khat’a khai ding pondal chu tong som le tong nga alhingin, apalkhom thum ahin chule akhom tunna ding jong thum ma ahiye.

Chunjongle kelkot lang khat lama ding jong chutima chu ahin; kelkot’a kona hilam jong khulam jong apal kimsoh a chu amailama chu alang langa pondal tong som le tong nga nga ahi cheh-in, akhom thum thum le atunna ding atodop thum thum toh ahi.
Palkim lhung keiya dah ding pondal chu aboncha tupat ponnema kikhong jeng ahi.

Chutengleh palkhom chengse dinga khom todop chengse jong chu sum-eng jenga kisem ahin, apalkhom ho khaina ding abil ho leh akitona ding chengse vang chu dangka jenga kitom ahin, chule akhom lujum lai kitomna jouse jong chu dangka ma ma ahi; hita chu palkhom jouse chu aboncha atomatna ding jouse chu dangka jenga kitomjol cheh ahiuve.

Palmaiya kelkot phunga dah ding pondal chu phatah a adum le asandup, asan-ao thim, tupat jeng heojanga kijempah bet ahi; apondal chu asaodan tong som ni alhingin, chule avai lam let dan le asandan chu tong nga nga alhingin ahi, hichu palkima kikhaiho chutoh kitoh a kibol jong ahiye.

Kelkot’a pang palkhom chu li alhingin, akhom tuna chengse jong chu sum-eng jenga kisem ahin, akikhaina diu abil ho chu dangka ahin, alujum lai kitomna le atomatna dinga kitomna jouse jong chu dangka jeng ahi.
Hiti chun houbuh khaina ding leh akimvela pal lhung keiya pondal khaina ding jouse abonchan sum-eng jeng jenga kisem ahisoh keiyuve.
Thil hicheng hi houbuh, hettohsahna houbuh dinga Mose thupeh a kona kisimtoh, thempu Aaron chapa Ithamar phatsah dungjuiya Leviho natohna dinga kisimdohjat thilkeo ahi.
Judah phunga mi Hur chapa, Uri chapa Bezalel chun Pakaiyin Mose athupeh chengse chu abonchan abolsoh keiyin ahi;
chule amato natongkhoma pang chu Dan phunga mi Ahismach chapa Oholiab kitipa, mi khut themtah le thilgonje themtah, patdum le patsandup chule patsan-aova, chujongleh tupat’a ponjep dol themtah ahiye.

Muntheng semdohna dinga apumpia sah jouhelna ding kham, alou alanga kimang sana jouse chu abonchan munthenga kimang shekel dungjuiyin, thilto khoma kona kidongdoh sana chu talent som ni le ko toh shekel ja sagi leh somthum alhingin ahi.

Chuti chun khoppi pumpi akisimtoh dungjuiya kidongdoh dangka jong chu talent jakhat toh shekel sang khat le ja sagi toh som sagi le nga alhinge; hiche jong chu munthenga kimang shekel dungjuiya kitema ma ahiye;

akidondol jong chu munthenga ki mangji shekel dungjuiya shekel keh khat ‘beka’ kiti khat cheh a chu mikhat khat’a kidonga, min kisimna a kum som nia lhah chung lamsea lhah kidong ahin, mihem sang jagup le sangthum toh ja nga le som nga a kona kidongdoh ahiye.

Dangka talent jakhat chu munthenga manchah ding khom todop ho leh achung khuna pondal chengsea pang dinga kilhah peh ahi; khom todop khat ding lhahna a chu talent khat lut jeng ahin, khom todop jakhat lhahna a chu talent jakhat kimangah ahiye.
Chuta chu shekel sang khat le ja sagi toh som sagi le nga a chu Bezalel chun khomho akikhaina ding abil-ho semna le akhom muh chengse toh akhom tomatna among chengse tomjolna toh aman ahi.
Chule sum-eng hung kidong doh chu talent som sagi le shekel sang ni toh ja li alhinge.
Hicheng chun Bezalelin kikhopna ponbuh kotpi todop asem nan, sum-eng maicham asem nan, hiche maichama pang ding sum-eng thuhjol le maichama manchah ding athilkeo jouse asem nan ahi;

pal kim vel lhunga khom todop chengse jong asem nan, kulpi kelkot phunga khom todop chengse jong asem nan, houbuh a thil khaina jouse toh, pal kimvel lhung keiya thil khaina chengse jong asem nan ahiye.

Natongho chun munthenga kinbol tenga manchah dingin adum le asandup chule asan-ao thima kihal a kikhong hoitah a kikhong ponsil ho chun von ding ho chu akhui yuvin; hiti chun Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bang chun Aaron dingin kivonna theng ho chu asempeh-uvin ahi.
Hiti chun Bezalel chun konggah jeng jong chu sanan asemin, adum le asandup, asan-ao thim chule lhuhsa tupatnin ajemin ahi.

Chule sana halsi chu hoikeiya alim kigongsa khut themtah a thil kibol lim banga adum le asandup, asan-ao thim le lhuhsa tupat’a khuisoh kei dingin, patjang techeng chengin sehchan akheng khenguvin ahiye.
Chujongle konggah khaina ding chun lengkouva khaina ding agen ho jong asemuvin, among tenia chun ajopmat’uvin ahi.

Chule konga kigahna dingin jong hiche to bang thila kisem le khut themna kibanga kisem, phatecha kipheh chal chep akisemin, sana jeng ahin, adumin asandup’in, asan-ao thimin chule lhuhsa tupat’a kisem ahiye; hiche jong chu Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang banga kisem anahi.
Amahon onyx song ho chu agong masauvin, sanagui chun agol toh uvin, mohor kinamna kisem bang khun, hiche sanagui chun song mantam chunga chun Israel chate min jat dungjuiyin agoltoh soh keiyuvin ahi.
Chuin Bezalelin aboncha chun konggah lengkouva akikhaina agen ho chunga chun, Israel chate geldoh jing jengna dingin, agolsoh keiyin ahi; hiche jong chu Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang banga abol ahiye.
Bezalel in konggah kisemna tobang bang chun ompho jong chu sana le adum, asandup, asana-ao thim chule lhuhsa tupat’in asemin ahi.
Ompho chu aning li nei ahin, hita chu ompho chu tho nia kisem ahin, akilhep teng leh adung jong avai jong khap khat khat ahicheh jin ahi.
Chule hiche ompho chunga chun song mantam jeng gol lin agoluvin ahi. Gol masaa chun sardius song, topaz song, songdul song agoluvin;
golni lhinna a chun emarald song, sapphire song; chule songval song agoluvin;
gol thum lhinna a chun aiha song, khipi song, chule lang bel song agoluvin;
gol li lhinna a chun songkang chang toh, onyx song toh, chule samphai song toh agoluvin ahi; aboncha chun sanaguiyin akanbeh soh keiyuvin ahi.

Hiti chun ompho chunga chun Israel chate minjat dungjuiyin song mantam som le ni akigolin, amin chen toh akisut tha cheh in ahi; song khat cheh chu mohor kisem tobang cheh ahiuvin, abonchauva chu Israel phung som le phung ni dinga chu amin cheh chutoh kibeh tha cheh ahiuve.
Chuin thilbola pang ho chun ompho chunga pang ding chun sana thengsel khao kiheh bang bangin aheh lhop’uvin,
chujongle sanagui jang ni le sanakol ni jong asemvuvin, hiche sanakol teni chu ompho ning among agei tenia chun abat’uvin ahi;
chujouvin ompho mong aning tenia kibat sanakol teni sunga chun sana jang teni chu athil lut’uvin ahi.
Sana khao jang teni mong teni chu amahon sanagui teni chutoh ajopmat sau ahitan; hijeh chun konggah lengkouva akikhaina agen tenia chun ompho chu amalama abeh uvin ahi.
Chuin amahon sanakol ni asemuvin, hiche teni jong chu ompho mong agei teni, asung lam konggah ban tah a chun athil lut’uvin ahi.
Chule sana khaojang kol ni ma asemuvin, anigelin lengkouva konggah kikhaina teni noilam jep, amasang lam, khut them tah a kipheh chal chep konggah toh akijopmatna chung jep’a chun akhit mat’uve.

Chuin amahon ompho chu patjang dum khat’in achaokol ho chun athiluvin, konggah a chaokol ho chutoh athil mat’uvin ahileh, hiche phat chun khut them tah a kipheh chal chep konggah gen chunga chun akijam det cheh jengin, hijeh chun konggah a kon chun ompho chu akikangdoh jing thei tapon ahi; Pakaiyin Mose thu anapeh bang banga chu abolu ahi.
Bezalel chun adum jenga kikhong ponin thempu von din sangkhol chol khat jong asemin;
hiche sangkhol chol sunga lutdoh le le na ding chu aeh thei louhelna dingin, von dang dang kibolna bangin, ageigol chengse akiphelsoh keiyin ahi.
Sangkhol chol anoilam among geigola jong chu patdum le pat sandup, pat san-ao thim chule tupat lhuhsan kolbuthei chang lim akijempah lhung keiyin ahi.
Chuin amahon sana thengselin cha-ngeng tampi asemuvin, hiche cha-ngeng ho chu sangkhol chol mong geigola kolbuthei kibat phei pheiho, hiche kolbuthei ho kah kah a chun abat phei peh-uvin ahi;

hiti chun cha-ngeng khat akiba leh kolbuthei khat akibat’in, changeng khat akiba kit leh kolbuthei khat akibat kit’in, hita chu thempu kinbolna man ding sangkhol chol geigol lhung keiya chu kibat lhung keiyah ahiye; Pakaiyin Mose anathupeh bang banga kibolma ahi.
Thilbola pang ho chun Aaron le achapate dingin sangkhol len jong tupat lhuhsa jengin akhonpeh uvin a hi;
chule delkop ding jong tupat lhuhsa kikhong, lukhuh ding jong tupat lhuhsa ahin, chule tokachol dingjong chu tupat phatah a kilhuhsaa kikhong ahi;
hiti chun konga kigah ding jong chu tupat lhuhsa adum le asandup, asan-ao thim, phatecha heojanga kijempah bet ahiye; hita chu Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang banga abolu ahi.
Natong thilbol ho chun lallukhuh theng ding jong chu sana thengsel apeh in asemuvin, achunga chun lekhajem asun’uvin, mohor a kinam bang khun, “Pakaiya Atheng” tin akijih doh in ahi.
Chule hiche lukhuh peh chu patjang dum khat’in delkop chunga kanbeh na dingin akhaiyuvin ahi; hita chu Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang banga abolu ahiye.

Hiti hin kikhopna ponbuh a houbuh sahdohna dinga natoh thilbol abonchan akijousoh heltan, Israel chaten jong Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bangin abonchan atongdoh soh soh hel tauve; hiti chun ama hon anatoh anachaisoh tauvin ahi.

Chuin amahon Mose henga houbuh ding jong, ponbuh le amanchah athilkeo jouse ahin, akhaina ding abil-ho chu ahin, athil-kol chengse ahin, abang gol ho ahin, akhomho ahin, chule akhom todop chengse ahin ahin choiyuvin;
achung khuna ding julnemsa kelngoichalte le kelchate vun ho ahin, pondal chung khuna ding ahin,
hettohsahna thingkong ahin, thingkong putna moljol teni leh hepi to una ahin;
dokhang le athilkeo manchah jouse toh, changlhah thilto toh ahin;
sana thengsel a kisem thaomei khom athaomei chengse toh, athaomeiho chu agol gola kigoltohsa ahin, amanchah chengse chutoh ahin, chule vah ding thaotwi toh ahiye;
sana a kisem maicham le kinu ding thaotwi toh, halnam ding-gimnamtui toh, ponbuh a dah ding pondal toh ahin,
sum-eng maicham ahin, chuche maichama kimang sum-eng thuhjol ho ahin, athuhjol ho leh amanchah jouse toh ahin, kisilna kong le akitunna ahin;

palgola khai ding pondal chengse toh ahin, palkhom jouse ahin, palkhom tunna ho ahin, kulpi kelkotna dah ding pondal le akhaojang ho ahin, akhaina ding abilho chu ahin, chule houbuh a kinbolna ding jouse le ponbuh kikhopna ina kinbolna manchah ding jouse chutoh ahin;
munthenga kinbolna dinga manchah dinga hoitah a kikhong von jouse, thempu natoh atohna diuva Aaron le achapate kivon na, kivonna theng ho chu ahin, abonchan ahinchoi soh keiyuvin ahiye.
Pakaiyin Mose athupeh chengse chu abonchan athupeh bang bangin Israel chaten toh ding chan chu anatong soh keiyuvin ahi.

Hichun Mose’n natoh chu abonchan aven ahileh, vetan, Israel chaten abonchan ana tong soh heltauve; Pakaiyin athupeh bang bang chun amahon anabolsoh heluvin ahi. Hijeh chun Mose’n jong amaho chu abonchauvin phatthei abohsoh keiyin ahi.
Pakaiyin Mose jah a thu aseiyin hitin ati:
“Lha masa sunga nikho masa ni leh nangman kikhopna ponbuh a houbuh chu natundoh ding ahi.
Hou-buh sunga chu hettohsahna thingkong nakoiya, chutengleh thingkong thu pondal nadah khum ding ahi.
Chule dokhang jong nahin put lut’a, agon bang banga chu nagoltoh soh keiya, chujongle thaomei khom jong nahin dop lut ding, athaomei chengse jong natundoh ding ahi.
Chule hettohsahna thingkong maiya chu gimnamtui lhutna sana maicham chu natun ding, chujouleh houbuh kotpi phungbula dah ding pondal chu nadahpeh ding ahi.
Hita chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga houbuh kotpi masanga chu pumgo thilto govamna maicham chu nado ding ahi,
chule kikhopna ponbuh le maicham kah a chu kisilna kong chu nalui ding, kong sunga chu twi nasun dim ding ahi.
Chutengle akimvela chu pal nakai kimsoh a, kuIpi kelkot’a jong chu pondal kikhai ding jouse nakhai ding ahi.

Chutah le kinu ding thaotwi chu nalah a houbuh le asunga um thil ijakai nanusoh kei ding, hita chu houbuh le asunga thilkeo manchah jouse chu nathenso ding ahi; hichele chun houbuh chu atheng hi ding ahitai.
Nangman pumgo thilto govamna maicham le amanchah thilkeo jouse jong chu thao nanusoh hela, chuteng leh maicham chu nathenso ding ahi; chujoule maicham chu thil theng chungnungpen hi ding ahiye.
Nangman kisilna kong le akitunna jong chu thao nanua, akong chu nathenso ding ahi.
Chutah le Aaron le achapate chengse chu kikhopna ponbuh kotpi phungbula chu nahin puilut’a, konga twi kiluiya chu abonchauva nasil ding ahi,
chule ponsil theng chengse chu Aaron nasilpeh a, amaho chu thao nanua nathenso ding, chutengleh ama chu keima thempua panga keima kinbola pang ding ahi.
Hita chu achapate jong nahin puilut’a abonchauva sangkhol len na-ah peh ding,

apau Aaron nanu bang banga chu amaho jong thao nanu ding, chutengleh amaho jong keima thempua pang ding ahiuve; hita thao akinu nau chun amaho chu akhang khanguva aitih chan geiya dinga thempu hitheina apeh diu ahi,” ati.
Mose’n hiti chun abolin, Pakaiyin ama athupeh bang bang chun abonchan abolsoh keiyin ahi.
Hiti chun kum ni lhin kum, lha masa pen, chuche lha nikho masapen nin houbuh chu anakitungdoh tan ahi.
Mose’n houbuh chu anatungdoh tan, akhom todop chengse anagolin, akol chengse anatungdoh in, amoljol ho jong anagolin, apalkhom jouse jong anaphutdoh soh keiyin ahi;
chuin houbuh chunga chun ponbuh chu ason khum jengin, Pakaiyin Mose thu anapeh bang chun achunga chun ponbuh khuna chu adah khumin ahi.
Chuin Mose’n hettohsahna chu alan thingkong sunga chun akhumin, chule thingkong chunga chun moljol teni chu thil lutsan akoiyin, chule thingkong chunga chun hepi touna chu ado’n ahi;

hichun Mose’n thingkong chu houbuh sunga ahinpo lut in, chule akhuna ding pondal chu adah doh pai paiyin, hiti chun hettohsahna thingkong chu pandal akhaiden tan ahi; Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang banga chu abol ahitai.
Chuin pandal kidahna polam, houbuh sah lam kikhopna ponbuh sunga chun Mose’n jong dokhang chu ado’n ahi;
chule dokhang chunga chun Pakai angsunga changlhah chu agol golin agolin, Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang chun aboltan ahi.
Chule houbuh lhanglam lang, dokhang mai dontah, kikhopna ponbuh sunga chun Mose’in thaomei khom chu atungdoh in ahi;
hiti chun Pakai angsunga thaomeiho jong chu atungdoh soh keiyin, Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang bang chun aboltai.
Chuin kikhopna ponbuh sunga pandal masanga chun Mose’n sana maicham jong chu atungdoh tai;
chujouvin maicham chunga chun gimnamtui jong ahalnam pai paiyin ahi; hita chu Pakaiyin Mose athupeh bang banga abol ahiye.
Chule houbuh kotpi phunga chun Mose’n pondal adah tan ahi.

Chujongle kikhopna ponbuh sunga houbuh kotpi phungbula chun Mose’n pumgo thiltona maicham chu aphutdohin, maicham chunga chun pumgo thilto leh chang thilto atohdoh pai paiyin ahi; hiti chun Pakaiyin Mose anathupeh bang bangin aboltai.
Chule Mose’n maicham le kikhopna ponbuh kikah a chun kisilna kong chu adon, kisilna din gin twi jong aluiyin ahi;
hiche twiya chu Mose jong, Aaron jong chule Aaron chapaten jong akhut’u le akeng phangu akisil cheh jiuvin ahi;
hiti chun amaho chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga alut tengu hihen lang, maicham phung anailut tengu hijongleh, akhut’u leh akeng phangu akisilji jiuve; hiti dinga chu Pakaiyin Mose thu anapehsa ahitai.
Hiti hin Mose’n houbuh hihen lang maicham hijongleh akimvela chun kuIpi anakaiyin, kuIpi kelkot’a chun pondal ana khaiyin ahi. Hita chu Mose’n natoh chu aboncha anatoh jousoh hel ahiye.
Chutah chun meibang lomin kikhopna ponbuh chu ahintomin, Pakai loupina chu houbuh ahung dimset jengin ahi.
Chuphat’in Mose jeng jong chu kikhopna ponbuh sunga chun alut thei tapoi; ijeh-inem itileh achunga chun meibang lom akidal denjengin, Pakai loupina chu houbuh adimset jengin ahi.
Akholjin achaisoh kahseuvin itih hijeng jongleh houbuh chunga kona meibang lom chu akitoldoh tih tih leh Israel chate jong chu akholjin ban mano pai dingin akitol jom pai pai jiuvin;
amavang meibang lom chu akitoldoh louva ahivang leh Israel chate jeng jong meibang lom kitol doh ni geiyin ache chondeh ji tapouve.
Ipijeh-inem itileh akholjin chaisoh kahseuvin, Israel insung pumpi mitmun houbuh chunga chun sun tengleh Pakai meibang lom akidal jing jin, jan tengleh meikongin akong jing jin ahi.
